content: {清晨，阳光透过窗帘洒入卧室，你缓缓睁开眼，一脸迷茫地坐起身。}
content_en: Early morning, sunlight filtered through the curtains into the bedroom. You slowly opened your eyes, sitting up with a look of utter confusion.

content: {你看着自己陌生的双手，又环顾这间充满异世界色彩的奢华卧室，眼中充满了困惑与警惕。}
content_en: You stared at your unfamiliar hands, then looked around the luxurious bedroom filled with otherworldly decor, your eyes filled with bewilderment and wariness.

content: {这里是.......？我昨晚不是在......？怎么会.......头好痛，像是被硬塞进了很多东西.......}
content_en: Where is this.......? Wasn't I just...... last night? How did....... My head hurts so much, as if it's been crammed with many things.......

content: {你挣扎着下床，脚步有些虚浮地走到镜前，镜中映出一张完全陌生的面孔}
content_en: You struggled to get out of bed, your steps somewhat unsteady as you walked to the mirror. The reflection showed a completely unfamiliar face.

content: {这不可能！这不是我！这到底是怎么回事？！}
content_en: This is impossible! This isn't me! What on earth is going on?!

content: {就在这时，轻柔但规律的敲门声响起。未等你回应，房门便被推开。}
content_en: Just then, a soft but rhythmic knock sounded at the door. Before you could respond, the door was pushed open.

content: {一位长着毛茸茸狐狸耳朵和尾巴的少女抱着一叠文件走了进来，她神色如常，带着一丝例行公事的干练。}
content_en: A young girl with furry fox ears and a tail walked in, holding a stack of documents. Her expression was normal, carrying a hint of routine efficiency.

content: {城主大人，日安。}
content_en: Good morning, Lord.

content: {您今天的气色似乎比往常要好些.......嗯？}
content_en: You seem to be in better spirits today than usual....... Hm?

content: {话说到一半，达菲敏锐地停下了脚步。}
content_en: Mid-sentence, Duffy sharply halted her steps.

content: {她的耳朵警觉地竖起，尾巴也停止了轻摇，眼眸紧紧盯住城主，目光锐利如刀。}
content_en: Her ears perked up alertly, her tail stopped its gentle sway, and her eyes locked onto the lord, sharp as blades.

content: {眼前这人虽然有着和城主一模一样的外表，但那双眼睛里的茫然和陌生感，与她侍奉多年的那位城主截然不同。}
content_en: Although the person before her had the exact same appearance as the lord, the confusion and unfamiliarity in those eyes were completely different from the lord she had served for years.

content: {大人，您昨晚休息得可好？关于今日上午的会议，您准备从哪个议题开始？}
content_en: My Lord, did you rest well last night? Regarding this morning's meeting, which topic would you like to begin with?

content: {会、会议？什么会议？你是谁？这又是哪里？}
content_en: M-meeting? What meeting? Who are you? Where is this place?

content: {达菲的眼神瞬间变得冰冷，她缓缓上前，压低声音，语气中带着不容置疑的质问。}
content_en: Duffy's eyes instantly turned icy. She slowly stepped forward, lowering her voice, her tone carrying an unquestionable demand.

content: {达菲放下了手中的文件，随着一阵魔力元素的波动，一把长枪被召唤了出来}
content_en: Duffy placed the documents in her hands on the table. With a ripple of magical energy, a long spear materialized.

content: {只是瞬息之间，达菲手中的长枪直直的指向了城主的咽喉}
content_en: In the blink of an eye, Duffy pointed her spear straight at the lord's throat.

content: {最后一个问题。}
content_en: One final question.

content: {上周，您亲口答应了我什么事？}
content_en: What did you promise me last week?

content: {我.......我不知道！我什么都不知道！我一醒来就在这里了！}
content_en: I....... I don't know! I don't know anything! I just woke up here!

content: {达菲紧紧盯着他看了几秒，似乎是在判断你话语的真伪。}
content_en: Duffy stared intently at him for a few seconds, seemingly judging the truthfulness of his words.

content: {最终，她眼中的敌意稍减，但警惕丝毫未消，尾巴依然紧绷着。}
content_en: Finally, the hostility in her eyes diminished slightly, but her vigilance remained undiminished, her tail still held taut.

content: {看来，发生了某些超出我们理解的事情。}
content_en: It appears something beyond our understanding has occurred.

content: {听着，不管你是谁，从哪里来，现在，你占据了这座城池最高统治者的身体。}
content_en: Listen, whoever you are, wherever you come from, right now, you are occupying the body of this city's supreme ruler.

content: {我是达菲，城主府的行政助理，负责协助您的日常工作。}
content_en: I am Duffy, the administrative assistant of the lord's manor, responsible for assisting you with your daily duties.

content: {统治者？不，你搞错了！我叫.......}
content_en: Ruler? No, you've got it wrong! My name is.......

content: {我来自一个叫蓝星的地方！我只是个普通人！}
content_en: I'm from a place called Blue Star! I'm just an ordinary person!

content: {蓝星？没听过的地名。}
content_en: Blue Star? An unheard-of place name.

content: {但事已至此，纠结缘由无济于事。}
content_en: But what's done is done. Dwelling on the cause is pointless.

content: {重要的是，在真正的城主归来之前，或者说，在弄清楚真相之前，你必须扮演好他的角色。}
content_en: What matters is that, until the true lord returns, or until we uncover the truth, you must play his role convincingly.

content: {否则，一旦消息走漏，城内外的势力绝不会放过这个机会，这座城会陷入混乱。}
content_en: Otherwise, once the news leaks, forces inside and outside the city will not miss this opportunity. This city will fall into chaos.

content: {扮演？我怎么可能扮演得了？我连他是谁都不知道！}
content_en: Play a role? How could I possibly play it? I don't even know who he is!

content: {我会帮你的，但请你也尽量配合我。}
content_en: I will help you, but please try to cooperate with me as well.

content: {.......我明白了，我会尽力。}
content_en: .......I understand. I'll do my best.

content: {但是达菲小姐，原来的城主他.......？}
content_en: But Miss Duffy, the original lord.......?

content: {这不是你现在需要关心的事。}
content_en: That is not something you need to concern yourself with right now.

content: {当务之急是应付今天的日程。}
content_en: The immediate priority is to handle today's schedule.
Follow me, we......

content: {话还没说完，你眼前一暗，又陷入了昏厥}
content_en: Before she could finish her sentence, your vision darkened, and you lost consciousness once more.

content: {你怎么了？}
content_en: What's wrong with you?

content: {或许，我不应该这样威胁他？}
content_en: Perhaps I shouldn't have threatened him like that?

content: {下次装的温柔一些，或许应该换个身份展开。}
content_en: Next time, I'll act gentler. Maybe I should approach this from a different identity.

content: {你意识模糊，陷入黑暗。}
content_en: Your consciousness blurred as you sank into darkness.

content: {周围景象变幻，你来到一个充满光芒的虚空。}
content_en: The surroundings shifted, and you found yourself in a void filled with light.

content: {这里是...我又穿越了吗？}
content_en: Where is this... Have I crossed over again?

content: {不，孩子，是我召唤了你。}
content_en: No, child. I summoned you.

content: {谁在说话？我看不见你。}
content_en: Who's speaking? I can't see you.

content: {一位精灵女性的身影逐渐显现，周身环绕微光}
content_en: The figure of an elven woman gradually materialized, surrounded by a faint glow.

content: {我是曦光。}
content_en: I am Xiguang.

content: {曦光？我听说过你！}
content_en: Xiguang? I've heard of you!

content: {你能知晓我，说明你与生命内核有缘。}
content_en: The fact that you know of me indicates you have a connection to the Life Core.

content: {生命内核？那是什么？我为什么在这里？}
content_en: Life Core? What is that? Why am I here?

content: {耐心听我道来。世界始于四个原始元素核心：水土风火。}
content_en: Listen patiently as I explain. The world began with four primordial elemental cores: Water, Earth, Wind, and Fire.

content: {元素核心？像神话一样...}
content_en: Elemental cores? Like in the myths…

content: {它们相互吸引，形成世界核心。}
content_en: They were drawn to each other, forming the World Core.

content: {元素力扩散，创造万物，但融合不完美，导致大陆、海洋、风暴诞生。}
content_en: The elemental forces spread, creating all things, but the fusion was imperfect, leading to the birth of continents, oceans, and storms.

content: {所以这个世界是元素构成的？}
content_en: So this world is composed of elements?

content: {正是。而后，智慧生命出现了。}
content_en: Exactly. Afterwards, intelligent life emerged.

content: {智慧生命...就像人类、兽人、精灵？}
content_en: Intelligent life... like humans, orcs, and elves?

content: {没错。第一代生命近乎永恒，但无法融合元素；第二代部分融合，外貌奇特；第三代完全融合，但寿命短暂。}
content_en: Correct. The first generation of life was nearly eternal but could not fuse with the elements. The second generation achieved partial fusion, resulting in peculiar appearances. The third generation achieved complete fusion but possessed short lifespans.

content: {那精灵是第一代后裔？}
content_en: So elves are descendants of the first generation?

content: {是的，虽然我们拥有近乎无限的寿命，但代价是放弃元素感知。}
content_en: Yes. Although we possess nearly limitless lifespans, the price was the loss of our perception of the elements.

content: {而后，我们成为世界意志的代行者。}
content_en: Afterward, we became agents of the world's will.

content: {可你为什么被封锁？}
content_en: But why are you sealed away?

content: {你看到了曦光身上缠绕的锁链}
content_en: You see the chains entangling Xiguang's body.

content: {因为我干涉了人类。}
content_en: Because I interfered with humanity.

content: {五千年前，我赋予他们感情，我认为情感能带来所谓的平衡。}
content_en: Five thousand years ago, I bestowed emotions upon them, believing feelings could bring about so-called balance.

content: {感情是祝福也是诅咒...}
content_en: Emotions are both a blessing and a curse…

content: {情感让人类高速发展，也引发战争。}
content_en: They drove humanity's rapid advancement but also sparked wars.

content: {我因此被降罪，封锁在元素核心波动处，承受痛苦。}
content_en: For this, I was condemned, sealed within the resonance of the Elemental Core, enduring suffering.

content: {但为什么召唤我？我只是个普通人。}
content_en: But why summon me? I’m just an ordinary person.

content: {普通人？}
content_en: Ordinary?

content: {你是被选中的，因为世界正在失衡。}
content_en: You are the chosen one, because the world is falling out of balance.

content: {失衡？为什么？}
content_en: Imbalance? Why?

content: {因为世界出现了历史断层，威胁到了世界核心。}
content_en: Because a Historical Fracture has appeared in the world, threatening the World Core.

content: {可我能做什么？我只是个普通人。}
content_en: But what can I do? I’m just an ordinary person.

content: {你是关键。}
content_en: You are the key.

content: {你具有某种不属于这个世界的力量，或许能修复历史断层。}
content_en: You possess a power not of this world—perhaps you can mend the Historical Fracture.

content: {历史断层？}
content_en: Historical Fracture?

content: {真相被掩埋了，它需要你去寻回。}
content_en: The truth has been buried. It awaits your retrieval.

content: {所以你需要我做什么？}
content_en: So what do you need me to do?

content: {寻找历史，改变过去与未来，仅此而已}
content_en: Seek out history, alter the past and the future. That is all.

content: {但为什么是我？还有别人吗？}
content_en: But why me? Are there others?

content: {你接近生命内核的本质。}
content_en: You are close to the essence of the Life Core.

content: {它存在于过去未来，内心之中。}
content_en: It exists across past and future, within the heart.

content: {老城主呢？他还活着吗？}
content_en: What about the old Lord? Is he still alive?

content: {我只想回家...回蓝星。}
content_en: I just want to go home… back to Blue Star.

content: {曦光说了一些你压根听不懂的话}
content_en: Xiguang says something you simply cannot comprehend.

content: {时间不多了。醒来吧，迷茫的人子。记住，你的选择将影响世界的存亡。}
content_en: Time is running out. Awaken, lost child of man. Remember, your choices will determine the world's survival.

content: {你再次睁开眼，发现自己躺在卧室床上，达菲和荒守在旁边。}
content_en: You open your eyes once more, finding yourself lying on your bedroom bed, with Duffy and Susabi watching beside you.

content: {醒醒，快醒醒。}
content_en: Wake up! You must wake up!

content: {...这是哪？你是谁？}
content_en: ...Where... is this? Who are you?

content: {您终于醒过来了，我是冒险工会的引导员，这里是你从未来过的异世界。}
content_en: You're finally awake!I'm the Adventurer Guild guide. This is an Other world you've never been to!

content: {哈？异世界？}
content_en: Huh? Other world?

content: {没错。}
content_en: Exactly!

content: {这里就是异世界！至于你为什么会来到这里，命运会告诉你答案。}
content_en: As for why you're here... fate will reveal its answers!

content: {那我还能回去吗？}
content_en: Can I... go back home?
B-back home... That's impossible…

content: {除非，您拯救这片大陆，寻找到大陆真正的秘密！或许....或许可以回去。}
content_en: Unless... you save this continent and discover its ultimate secret! Then... maybe you can return!

content: {好吧，既然来到了异世界，就麻烦你带我熟悉一下吧。}
content_en: Alright then. Since I'm in this world now, show me around.

content: {好嘞，主人。}
content_en: okay! Master!

content: {我上次醒的时候你可不是这个态度。}
content_en: You weren't this attitude when I woke up last time.

content: {什么态度，主人。}
content_en: What attitude, Master?

content: {嗯...一种人见人爱的态度。}
content_en: Hmm... an attitude that makes everyone adore you.

content: {气氛变得有些诡异}
content_en: The atmosphere grows somewhat strange.

content: {荒悄悄地用魔法传送走了}
content_en: Susabi quietly teleports away using magic.

content: {就在这时，一个带着戏谑笑意的女声从门口传来，伴随着细微的翅膀扇动声。}
content_en: Just then, a woman’s voice, laced with playful mockery, drifts from the doorway, accompanied by the faint sound of fluttering wings.

content: {哦？今天二位的气氛格外严肃呢~是在商讨什么我不能听的秘密吗？}
content_en: Oh? The atmosphere between you two is especially serious today~ Are you discussing some secret I’m not allowed to hear?

content: {一位有着红色长发和黑色翅膀的女性倚在门框上，她手中把玩着一只发光的魔法蝴蝶，饶有兴致地打量着室内僵持的两人。}
content_en: A woman with crimson long hair and black wings leans against the doorframe. She toys with a glowing magical butterfly, studying the two tense figures in the room with keen interest.

content: {莉莉丝！现在不是开玩笑的时候！}
content_en: Lilith! Now is not the time for jokes!

content: {嗯？奇怪.......城主大人，您今天的气息.......怎么变得如此.......清澈见底了？简直像换了个人似的。}
content_en: Hm? How strange... Lord, your aura today... has become so... transparent? It's as if you're a completely different person.

content: {你被莉莉丝看得心里发毛，下意识地避开了她的视线。}
content_en: You feel uneasy under Lilith's gaze and instinctively avoid her eyes.

content: {你细微的举动让莉莉丝脸上的笑容更深了。}
content_en: Your subtle reaction only deepens the smile on Lilith's face.

content: {莉莉丝！主人是.......情况特殊，你别吓到他。}
content_en: Lilith! Master is... in a special situation. Don't frighten him.

content: {嚯？？这可真是.......太有趣了！所以......放心吧，小菲菲，我的嘴巴可是很严的。不过嘛.......作为封口费和协助费，下次我的实验经费，可得翻倍哦？}
content_en: Oho?? This is... truly fascinating! So... don't worry, little Duffy, my lips are sealed. However~ as payment for my silence and assistance, my next experimental budget will need to be doubled, alright?

content: {你！.......算了，现在没工夫跟你讨价还价。}
content_en: You!... Fine, there's no time to bargain with you now.

content: {莉莉丝，你来得正好，上午的会议你也要参加，万一有需要，你来应对。}
content_en: Lilith, you came at the right time. You'll attend the meeting this morning as well. Be prepared to handle things if needed.

content: {包在我身上~不过新城主，你得先学学老城主的样子。}
content_en: Leave it to me~ But new Lord, you'll need to learn how to act like the old Lord.

content: {老城主会见到我就两眼放光，问我能不能隐匿掉魔法外衣。}
content_en: The old Lord’s eyes would light up upon seeing me, asking if I could hide his magical aura...
L-Lilith... you...

content: {达菲瞬息之间就来到莉莉丝旁边，掐了掐莉莉丝腰间的软肉。}
content_en: Duffy appears beside Lilith in an instant and pokes Lilith in the side.
Eep!...

content: {算了算了，这语气可骗不了人。}
content_en: Alright, alright, that tone just won't fool anyone.

content: {还是先按达菲说的，装失忆吧？就说昨晚处理公务太晚，精神不济，记忆有些混乱。这个借口虽然老套，但暂时能用。}
content_en: For now, let's follow Duffy's suggestion and pretend to have amnesia? Just say you stayed up too late handling official duties last night, you're mentally exhausted, and your memory is a bit muddled. It's a cliché excuse, but it'll work for now.

content: {不要担心，大家都是这样说的，那些写剧本的人想不到好的故事展开，主角肯定是失忆的，后面再加上一些寻回记忆的破烂剧情就算写完了。}
content_en: Don't worry, everyone says that. Those scriptwriters can't come up with a good story premise, so the protagonist is definitely amnesiac. Later, they just tack on some cliché plot about recovering memories and call it a day.

content: {这样的剧本哪有人看啊？？？}
content_en: Who would watch a script like that???

content: {其实我记得很多事情的......}
content_en: Actually, I remember a lot of things...

content: {上午的会议终于结束。你跟在达菲和莉莉丝身后走出会议厅，感觉比连续加三天班还要疲惫。}
content_en: The morning meeting finally concluded. You followed Duffy and Lilith out of the council chamber, feeling more exhausted than after three consecutive days of overtime work.

content: {尽管大部分时间你只是按照达菲事先叮嘱的“少说话，多点头”，但那些陌生的议题、各色人等的目光，都让你神经紧绷。}
content_en: Even though you mostly just followed Duffy's prior advice to speak less, nod more, the unfamiliar topics and the scrutinizing gazes of all sorts of people kept your nerves on edge.

content: {表现不错嘛，城主大人~虽然像个提线木偶，但总算没穿帮。}
content_en: Not bad at all, Lord~ You were like a puppet on strings, but at least you didn't blow your cover.

content: {我先走一步，实验室还有几个小家伙等着喂呢。}
content_en: I'll take my leave now. There are a few little ones back at the lab waiting to be fed.

content: {莉莉丝挥挥手，翅膀一振便消失在走廊尽头。}
content_en: Lilith waved her hand and, with a beat of her wings, vanished down the corridor.

content: {总算.......应付过去了。看来失忆的借口暂时是有效的。}
content_en: Finally... we pulled it off. It seems the amnesia excuse is working for now.

content: {她转向你，看到你一脸恍惚的样子。}
content_en: She turned to you, seeing your dazed expression.

content: {喂，你还好吧？}
content_en: Hey, are you okay?

content: {还好.......就是信息量太大，头有点晕。}
content_en: I'm fine... just a bit dizzy from information overload.

content: {他们说的.......我完全听不懂。}
content_en: Everything they said... I couldn't understand a word.

content: {哼，那是自然。接下来的日子，有你学的。}
content_en: Hmph, naturally. You have a lot to learn in the days to come.

content: {你们并肩走了一段，沉默片刻后，你停下脚步。}
content_en: You walked side by side for a while. After a moment of silence, you stopped.

content: {达菲，我想.......自己待一会儿，就在这附近转转，可以吗？}
content_en: Duffy, I'd like... to be alone for a bit. Just look around nearby, is that okay?

content: {想静静？}
content_en: Want some quiet?

content: {静静是谁？}
content_en: Who's Quiet?

content: {别玩这种冷笑话，这并不好笑。}
content_en: Don't play that kind of corny joke. It's not funny.

content: {嗯。需要点时间.......消化一下。}
content_en: ...Yes. Need some time... to process things.

content: {顺便，亲眼看看这座城市。}
content_en: And also, to see this city with my own eyes.

content: {毕竟，我现在是“城主”了。}
content_en: After all, I am the 'Lord' now.
...Fine. Don't wander too far.

content: {你现在对这里一无所知，乱跑容易惹麻烦。}
content_en: You know nothing about this place yet. Roaming around recklessly could cause trouble.

content: {放心吧，我不会走远的。}
content_en: Don't worry, I won't go far.

content: {哦，对了，如果遇到一个咋咋呼呼、长得跟我有点像的小丫头，那就是我妹妹达比。}
content_en: Oh, right. If you run into a noisy little girl who looks a bit like me, that's my sister, Darby.

content: {她要是缠着你问东问西，随便应付两句就行。}
content_en: If she pesters you with questions, just give her vague answers.

content: {达比？你妹妹？}
content_en: Darby? Your sister?

content: {看来这个世界的人际关系也比想象中复杂}
content_en: It seems interpersonal relationships in this world are more complicated than imagined too.

content: {嗯。那丫头精力过剩，烦得很。}
content_en: Yeah. That kid has too much energy. A real nuisance.

content: {你快去吧，趁现在没什么事。记得午饭前回来，还有文件要你看。}
content_en: You should go now, while there's nothing urgent. Remember to be back before lunch. There are documents for you to review.

content: {达菲转身走向办公室方向。你独自一人，深吸一口气，开始探索这座陌生的府邸。}
content_en: Duffy turned and headed towards the office. Alone, you took a deep breath and began to explore the unfamiliar manor.

content: {你信步走到庭院，阳光和煦，花草修剪得十分整齐。与室内奢华压抑的风格不同，这里让人心情稍缓。}
content_en: You strolled into the courtyard. The sunlight was warm, the flowers and plants meticulously trimmed. Unlike the opulent and oppressive style indoors, this place offered some relief to your mood.

content: {城主大人！日安！}
content_en: Lord! Good day!

content: {她活力四射地打招呼，毛茸茸的尾巴快速摇晃着。}
content_en: She greeted you with overflowing energy, her fluffy tail wagging rapidly.

content: {哦，是达比啊，你好。}
content_en: Oh, it's Darby. Hello.

content: {您看见我姐姐了吗？我找她有点事！}
content_en: Have you seen my sister? I need to talk to her about something!

content: {达菲她刚回办公室了。}
content_en: Duffy just went back to the office.

content: {谢谢城主大人！我这就去！}
content_en: Thank you, Lord! I'll go find her right now!

content: {达比像一阵风似的跑开了。}
content_en: Darby ran off like a gust of wind.

content: {城主大人，真巧在此遇见您。}
content_en: Lord, what a coincidence meeting you here.

content: {你闻声转头，认出是会议上坐在前排的曙光骑士团团长。}
content_en: You turned at the voice and recognized the leader of the Dawn Knight Order who had been seated in the front row during the meeting.

content: {阿古丽娅，会议刚结束，你没有去休息吗？}
content_en: Aguria, the meeting just ended. Aren't you going to rest?

content: {职责在身，不敢懈怠。}
content_en: Duty calls. I dare not be negligent.

content: {我正要去巡查城防。}
content_en: I was just on my way to inspect the city's defenses.

content: {倒是您.......看起来有些疲惫。}
content_en: As for you... you look somewhat weary.

content: {上午的会议对刚经历.......“不适”的您来说，想必很辛苦。}
content_en: This morning's meeting must have been quite taxing for you, especially after recently experiencing... 'discomfort'.

content: {确实有点。很多事情都记不清了，需要重新熟悉。}
content_en: It was, a bit. I've forgotten many things and need to re-familiarize myself.

content: {光明总会驱散迷雾。}
content_en: Light will always dispel the mist.

content: {如果您需要静心，这片庭院是个不错的选择。}
content_en: If you need peace of mind, this courtyard is an excellent choice.

content: {这里的向日葵.......总是很有生机。}
content_en: The sunflowers here... are always so full of life.

content: {谢谢。我只是想随便走走。}
content_en: Thank you. I just wanted to walk around a bit.

content: {那我就不打扰您了，愿光明与您同在。}
content_en: Then I shall not disturb you any further. May the light be with you.

content: {阿古丽娅行礼后离开。}
content_en: Aguria bowed and departed.

content: {就在这时，达菲的声音从身后传来。}
content_en: Just then, Duffy's voice came from behind.

content: {喂！你果然还在这里。}
content_en: "Hey! So you're still here."

content: {达菲？怎么了？}
content_en: "Duffy? What's wrong?"

content: {没什么，只是来看看你有没有笨到迷路。}
content_en: "Nothing. Just came to see if you were foolish enough to get lost."

content: {另外，阿古丽娅团长是个值得信赖的人，你.......不必过于戒备。}
content_en: "Also, Captain Aguria is a trustworthy person. You... don't need to be overly wary of her."

content: {嗯，我看得出来。达菲，谢谢你。}
content_en: "Hmm, I could tell. Duffy, thank you."

content: {少来这套！快中午了，跟我回去。下午还得教你怎么看账本呢，别想偷懒！}
content_en: "Cut it out! It's almost noon. Come back with me. I still have to teach you how to read ledgers this afternoon. Don't even think about slacking off!"

content: {你看着达菲明明关心却嘴硬的样子，又想起活泼的达比和稳重的阿古丽娅，心中那份穿越而来的恐慌和迷茫，似乎被冲淡了一些。}
content_en: Looking at Duffy, who was clearly concerned but putting on a tough front, and thinking of the lively Darby and the steady Aguria, the panic and confusion brought by your transmigration seemed to ease slightly.

content: {好，我们回去吧。}
content_en: "Alright. Let's go back."

content: {你跟上达菲的脚步。阳光洒在肩头，虽然未来依旧充满未知，但你开始觉得，或许自己真的能在这个世界找到立足之地。}
content_en: You followed Duffy's steps. The sunlight fell on your shoulders. Although the future remained full of unknowns, you began to feel that perhaps you could truly find your footing in this world.

content: {在达菲的引导下，你勉强应付完了第一天的公务，精神上的疲惫远胜身体的劳累。尽管大部分时间你只是按照叮嘱的“少说话，多点头”，但那些陌生的议题和各方人物的审视目光，依旧让你神经紧绷。}
content_en: Guided by Duffy, you barely managed to get through the first day's official duties. The mental exhaustion far outweighed any physical fatigue. Even though you mostly adhered to the advice of "speak less, nod more," the unfamiliar topics and the scrutinizing gazes of various individuals still kept your nerves on edge.

content: {午后，你以想要静一静、亲眼看看这座城市为由，婉拒了达菲的继续陪同，独自在城主府邸的庭院中散步。阳光和煦，花草整齐，这让你的心情稍稍舒缓。}
content_en: In the afternoon, using the excuse of wanting some quiet and to see the city with your own eyes, you politely declined Duffy's continued company and took a solitary walk in the manor's courtyard. The warm sunlight and neatly kept flora soothed your mood somewhat.

content: {信步而行，你不知不觉竟走到了城池的边缘，一片茂密的森林映入眼帘。一种莫名的熟悉感牵引着你的脚步，使你下意识地踏入林间。}
content_en: Walking aimlessly, you unconsciously reached the edge of the city, where a dense forest came into view. An inexplicable sense of familiarity pulled at your steps, leading you subconsciously into the woods.

content: {月光透过树叶洒下斑驳的光点，四周一片宁静。}
content_en: Moonlight filtered through the leaves, casting dappled spots of light. Everything was serene.

content: {就在这时，一位身影缓缓从林深处走近，她有着异于常人的特征，眼神中带着一丝复杂难辨的期待。}
content_en: Just then, a figure slowly approached from deep within the forest. She had features unlike ordinary people, and a complex, hard-to-read anticipation flickered in her eyes.

content: {你来了。许久不见，一切可好？}
content_en: "You've come. It's been a long time. Is all well with you?"

content: {你是谁？我好像没见过你。}
content_en: "Who are you? I don't think we've met."

content: {果然，你又忘记了。我是荒。}
content_en: "As expected, you've forgotten again. I am Susabi."

content: {你怎么如此肯定？这太荒谬了。}
content_en: "How can you be so sure? This is absurd."

content: {因为时间对你来说，是混乱的。而我觉醒了对时间之力的感知。}
content_en: "Because time is chaotic for you. And I have awakened the perception of temporal power."

content: {九尾狐？时间之力？这到底是什么意思？}
content_en: "Nine-tailed fox? Temporal power? What does that even mean?"

content: {我活了许多年，见证了无数时光流逝。而你，穿越了时空，与我相遇。}
content_en: "I have lived for many years, witnessing countless eras pass. And you, you have traversed time and space to meet me."

content: {穿越时空？我完全记不得。}
content_en: "Traversed time and space? I don't remember any of it."

content: {第一次见面时，你还年轻，从时空裂隙中跌落至此。那时的我，还只是只幼狐。}
content_en: "When we first met, you were young, having fallen here through a spacetime rift. At that time, I was but a kit."

content: {所以……你以前就见过我？多次？}
content_en: "So... you've seen me before? Multiple times?"

content: {是的。从你中年、青年，甚至更早的时候，我都见过。你花了一生建造那座城池，成为真正的城主。}
content_en: "Yes. I've seen you in your middle age, your youth, even earlier. You spent a lifetime building that city, becoming its true Lord."

content: {那座城……就是我刚刚离开的地方？可我现在什么都不知道，只觉得这片森林让人安心。}
content_en: "That city... is the place I just left? But I don't know anything about it now. I just feel... this forest is comforting."

content: {因为这里是我们多次见面的地方，时间在此交错。时空穿越会扰乱记忆，但我会帮你找回联系。}
content_en: "Because this is where we have met many times, where timelines intersect. Spacetime traversal disrupts memory, but I will help you reconnect."

content: {你为什么要这么做？对我有什么目的？}
content_en: "Why would you do this? What is your purpose with me?"

content: {因为你是我的变数，是我亲自命名的唯一存在。第一次相遇时，你自称城主，我便沿用了这个称呼。它贯穿你的一生，标记着我们的关系。}
content_en: "Because you are my variable, the only existence I have personally named. At our first meeting, you called yourself the Lord, so I adopted that title. It has threaded through your entire life, marking our connection."

content: {关系？我们之间是什么关系？}
content_en: "Connection? What is our relationship?"

content: {我是你的见证者，你是我漫长岁月中永恒的陪伴。我厌恶孤单，而你是我对抗孤独的常数。}
content_en: "I am your witness, and you are my eternal companion in these long years. I despise solitude, and you are my constant against loneliness."

content: {常数？所以……无论我从哪个时间点来，你都会在这里？}
content_en: "Constant? So... no matter which point in time I come from, you will be here?"

content: {是的。无论你何时迷失，我都会在此等待，就像今天这样。这是我们的约定。}
content_en: "Yes. Whenever you are lost, I will be here waiting, just like today. It is our promise."

content: {你沉默片刻，内心的困惑并未完全消散，但对方的语气有种不容置疑的平静}
content_en: You fell silent for a moment. The confusion in your heart hadn't completely dissipated, but there was an undeniable calmness in the other's tone.

content: {那现在，我该做什么？}
content_en: "What should I do now?"

content: {回到城池，继续你的旅程。记忆会慢慢恢复。如果暂时想不起来，也无妨。我会一直在这里，当你需要时，出现提醒。}
content_en: "Return to the city. Continue your journey. Memories will slowly return. If you cannot recall for now, it is fine. I will always be here. When you need it, I will appear to remind you."

content: {提醒我是城主……这个称呼，现在感觉……有些重量了。}
content_en: "Remind me that I am the Lord... This title feels... somewhat weighty now."

content: {因为它本就是你的，从始至终。记住，荒和城主，是时空中的唯一。}
content_en: "Because it has always been yours, from beginning to end. Remember, Susabi and the Lord are a singularity across time and space."

content: {唯一……我会记住的。再见，荒。}
content_en: "Singularity... I will remember. Goodbye, Susabi."

content: {再见，城主。直到下次相遇。}
content_en: "Goodbye, Lord. Until we meet again."

content: {你转身离开森林，步伐不再像来时那般迷茫，虽然仍有无数疑问，但心中似乎多了某种坚定的东西。}
content_en: You turned and left the forest. Your steps were no longer as lost as when you arrived. Though countless questions remained, it seemed something firm had taken root in your heart.

content: {月光下，荒望着你的背影，轻声自语。}
content_en: Under the moonlight, Susabi watched your retreating figure and whispered to herself.

content: {又一次开始，但愿这次你能早些记起。}
content_en: "Another beginning. I hope you remember sooner this time."

content: {或许}
content_en: Perhaps...

content: {几日后，你在达菲的引导下，漫步于城东区的街道上，开始体察民情}
content_en: A few days later, guided by Duffy, you strolled through the streets of the city's eastern district, beginning to observe the lives of the people.

content: {达菲，今天我们要多看看商户们的生活。}
content_en: Duffy, today we should observe more of the merchants' daily lives.

content: {达菲点头示意，你独自走进诗嘉古尔的面包坊}
content_en: Duffy nodded in acknowledgment, and you entered Skagull's Bakery alone.

content: {欢迎光临，城主大人！今天怎么有空来小店？}
content_en: Welcome, Lord! What brings you to our humble shop today?

content: {我来了解一下城中的日常，听说你的面包很受欢迎。}
content_en: I'm here to understand the daily life in the city. I heard your bread is very popular.

content: {您太客气了。请尝尝我刚出炉的新品杏仁饼。}
content_en: You flatter me. Please, try my freshly baked almond cookies.

content: {嗯，味道真不错！香甜松软。}
content_en: Hmm, truly delicious! Sweet and fluffy.

content: {这是用本地蜂蜜特制的，希望能合您的口味。}
content_en: They're specially made with local honey. I hope they suit your taste.

content: {确实很棒。我最近在学治理城市，想多听听大家的意见。}
content_en: They certainly do. I've been learning about city governance lately and want to hear more opinions from everyone.

content: {城主大人有心了，平民百姓的生活其实很简单。}
content_en: It's thoughtful of you, Lord. The lives of common folk are actually quite simple.

content: {说说看，你们平时有什么烦恼吗？}
content_en: Tell me, what concerns do you usually have?

content: {主要是物价波动，但大家都很努力。}
content_en: Mainly price fluctuations, but everyone is working hard.

content: {我会注意的。你的面包坊每天都很忙吧？}
content_en: I'll keep that in mind. Your bakery must be very busy every day.

content: {是的，清晨就开始烘烤，顾客络绎不绝。}
content_en: Yes, we start baking at dawn, and customers come in a steady stream.

content: {我看到橱窗里的可颂很诱人，你怎么保持品质？}
content_en: The croissants in the display look tempting. How do you maintain such quality?

content: {用心就好，我喜欢烹饪，每个细节都精心处理。}
content_en: Just put your heart into it. I love cooking and handle every detail with care.

content: {这种热情很难得。城中还有其他热门地方吗？}
content_en: Such passion is rare. Are there other popular spots in the city?

content: {说到热门，乌托里餐厅最近格外火红呢。}
content_en: Speaking of popular, Utopia Restaurant has been exceptionally lively recently.

content: {乌托里餐厅？我听说过，是那个调酒师雅雅的地方吧？}
content_en: Utopia Restaurant? I've heard of it. Is that the place with the mixologist Yaya?

content: {对，雅雅的鸡尾酒很有名，晚上总是人满为患。}
content_en: Yes, Yaya's cocktails are famous. It's always packed in the evenings.

content: {为什么这么受欢迎？是因为酒水特别吗？}
content_en: Why is it so popular? Is it because the drinks are special?

content: {部分原因吧，但更多是氛围好，适合各种人聚会。}
content_en: That's part of it, but more so because the atmosphere is great, suitable for all kinds of gatherings.

content: {听起来很有趣。我该去看看，体察一下夜生活。}
content_en: Sounds interesting. I should visit to get a feel for the nightlife.

content: {城主大人若去，记得点他们的特调，很有特色。}
content_en: If you go, Lord, remember to try their signature cocktails. They're quite unique.

content: {好建议。乌托里餐厅有什么特别事件吗？}
content_en: Good suggestion. Any notable incidents at Utopia Restaurant?

content: {听说经常有贵族和商人光顾，聊天很热闹。}
content_en: I've heard nobles and merchants frequent the place. The conversations are always lively.

content: {那可能能听到不少民间声音。你怎么知道的？}
content_en: That might be a good source for hearing public sentiment. How do you know this?

content: {我常给餐厅供应面包，所以略知一二。}
content_en: I regularly supply bread to the restaurant, so I know a little.

content: {原来如此。你的面包也送到那里？}
content_en: I see. Your bread is delivered there too?

content: {是的，每周都送，乌托里是我们的老客户。}
content_en: Yes, weekly. Utopia is one of our regular clients.

content: {这倒是个好渠道，连接了不同商户。}
content_en: That's a good channel, connecting different businesses.

content: {没错，城市就是这样交织在一起的。}
content_en: Exactly. That's how a city is woven together.

content: {诗嘉古尔，你觉得治理城市最关键是什么？}
content_en: Skagull, what do you think is the most crucial part of governing a city?

content: {我认为是倾听，像您今天这样走近大家。}
content_en: I believe it's listening, just like you're doing today by getting close to everyone.

content: {谢谢你的直言。乌托里餐厅有什么负面传闻吗？}
content_en: Thank you for your candid words. Any negative rumors about Utopia Restaurant?

content: {没什么大问题，只是偶尔有醉客，但雅雅处理得很好。}
content_en: No major issues. Occasionally there are rowdy drunks, but Yaya handles them well.

content: {雅雅是个能干的调酒师吧？我该见见她。}
content_en: Yaya is a capable mixologist, then? I should meet her.

content: {她确实厉害，能调和各种关系。}
content_en: She is indeed remarkable, adept at balancing all sorts of relationships.

content: {就像你调和面粉一样，都需要技巧。}
content_en: Just like you balance your ingredients. Both require skill.

content: {您比喻得真妙。治理城市也像烘焙，要耐心。}
content_en: What a wonderful analogy, Lord. Governing a city is also like baking, requiring patience.

content: {是啊，火候很重要。乌托里餐厅的营业时间呢？}
content_en: Yes, timing is crucial. What are Utopia Restaurant's operating hours?

content: {通常傍晚到深夜，城主大人如果想体察，晚上去最好。}
content_en: Usually from evening until late night. It would be best if you visited in the evening, Lord.

content: {我会安排的。诗嘉古尔，你平时去那里吗？}
content_en: I'll arrange that. Skagull, do you go there often?

content: {偶尔去坐坐，尝尝新酒，放松一下。}
content_en: Occasionally, to try new drinks and relax.

content: {听起来很惬意。城中还有什么其他热点？}
content_en: Sounds pleasant. Any other hotspots in the city?

content: {乌托里算是顶流了，但市场区也有不少好地方。}
content_en: Utopia is probably the top spot, but the market district has many good places too.

content: {我得多走走。诗嘉古尔，你的新品还有什么？}
content_en: I need to explore more. Skagull, what other new items do you have?

content: {有姜饼和蜂蜜蛋糕，您要再试试吗？}
content_en: There are gingerbread cookies and honey cake. Would you like to try them?

content: {好啊，我都尝尝。乌托里餐厅的饮食怎么样？}
content_en: Sure, I'll try them all. How's the food at Utopia Restaurant?

content: {酒水为主，但搭配的小吃也不错，有些用我的面包。}
content_en: They focus on drinks, but the accompanying snacks are also good. Some use my bread.

content: {这合作很默契。诗嘉古尔，你建议我怎么改善城市？}
content_en: That's seamless collaboration. Skagull, what suggestions do you have for improving the city?

content: {保持这种走访就好，大家会感受到关怀。}
content_en: Just keep up these visits. Everyone will feel cared for.

content: {谢谢。乌托里餐厅有没有什么独特之处？}
content_en: Thank you. Is there anything else unique about Utopia Restaurant?

content: {它的装饰别致，常有音乐表演，吸引年轻人。}
content_en: Its décor is distinctive, and they often have live music performances, which attract young people.

content: {那可能代表城市活力。我该多支持这种地方。}
content_en: That likely represents the city's vitality. I should support such places more.

content: {城主大人明智。乌托里最近还推出了新酒单。}
content_en: Wise decision, Lord. Utopia recently introduced a new cocktail menu.

content: {哦？什么新酒单？}
content_en: Oh? What's on the new menu?

content: {比如一款叫“曙光”的鸡尾酒，寓意很好。}
content_en: For example, a cocktail called "Dawnlight." The symbolism is quite nice.

content: {曙光？听起来有深意。诗嘉古尔，你常和雅雅交流吗？}
content_en: Dawnlight? Sounds meaningful. Skagull, do you often chat with Yaya?

content: {是的，我们偶尔聊聊生意和城市趣事。}
content_en: Yes, we occasionally talk about business and interesting happenings in the city.

content: {那她对你有什么评价？}
content_en: What does she think of you?

content: {雅雅说我面包做得好，能带来温暖。}
content_en: Yaya says my bread is good and brings warmth.

content: {确实温暖。乌托里餐厅的安全状况如何？}
content_en: It truly does feel warm. How's the security situation at Utopia Restaurant?

content: {总体安全，雅雅很有分寸，很少出乱子。}
content_en: Generally safe. Yaya has a good sense of control, so incidents are rare.

content: {好，我放心了。诗嘉古尔，今天聊得很愉快。}
content_en: Good, that's reassuring. Skagull, it's been a pleasant chat today.

content: {城主大人随时欢迎再来，我总有新品招待。}
content_en: You're always welcome, Lord. I always have new treats for you.

content: {我会的。乌托里餐厅，我今晚就去看看。}
content_en: I will. As for Utopia Restaurant, I'll go check it out tonight.

content: {祝您体察顺利，或许能在那里听到真话。}
content_en: I wish you a successful visit. You might hear some honest words there.

content: {谢谢你的建议。诗嘉古尔，保持你的热情。}
content_en: Thank you for the advice. Skagull, keep up your passion.

content: {我会的，城主大人。愿城市越来越好。}
content_en: I will, Lord. May the city grow better every day.

content: {再见，诗嘉古尔。}
content_en: Goodbye, Skagull.

content: {再见，城主大人。路上小心。}
content_en: Goodbye, Lord. Take care on your way.

content: {你离开面包坊，诗嘉古尔微笑目送}
content_en: You left the bakery, with Skagull smiling as she watched you depart.

content: {你推开乌托里餐厅的门，铃铛发出清脆的响声，一股混合着酒香和食物气息的暖意扑面而来。餐厅内部装饰雅致，阳光透过窗户洒在木质地板上，营造出温馨的氛围。}
content_en: You pushed open the door to Utopia Restaurant. A clear bell chimed, and a wave of warmth carrying the mingled scents of alcohol and food washed over you. The interior was tastefully decorated. Sunlight streamed through the windows, spilling onto the wooden floorboards and creating a cozy atmosphere.

content: {下午好！欢迎来到乌托里餐厅。}
content_en: Good afternoon! Welcome to Utopia Restaurant.

content: {你好，诗嘉古尔推荐我来这里尝尝调酒。}
content_en: Hello. Skagull recommended I come here to try the cocktails.

content: {啊，是诗嘉古尔小姐的朋友！请随便坐，吧台还是餐桌？}
content_en: Ah, a friend of Miss Skagull! Please, make yourself comfortable. Would you prefer the bar or a table?

content: {吧台就好，我想看看你调酒。}
content_en: The bar is fine. I'd like to watch you mix drinks.

content: {好的，请跟我来。}
content_en: Certainly. Right this way.

content: {雅雅微笑着引导你到吧台座位，你注意到她动作利落，显然对这里非常熟悉。}
content_en: Yaya smiled and guided you to a seat at the bar. You noticed her movements were deft and efficient, clearly very familiar with her surroundings.

content: {这里环境很舒适，阳光斜照进来很温馨。}
content_en: The ambiance here is very comfortable. The slanted sunlight is quite warm.

content: {谢谢夸奖。我们尽力保持餐厅的氛围。今天想喝点什么？}
content_en: Thank you for the compliment. We try our best to maintain the restaurant's atmosphere. What would you like to drink today?

content: {我通常喝葡萄酒，但诗嘉古尔说调酒特色，所以试试。}
content_en: I usually drink wine, but Skagull said the cocktails are the specialty, so I'll give them a try.

content: {没问题。我们有各种经典调酒，也可以根据您的口味定制。您喜欢甜的还是烈一点的？}
content_en: No problem. We have various classic cocktails, and I can also create something custom based on your taste. Do you prefer sweet or stronger drinks?

content: {中等就好，不要太甜，带点劲道。}
content_en: Something moderate. Not too sweet, with a bit of a kick.

content: {那我推荐威士忌酸或金汤力。威士忌酸酸甜平衡，金汤力比较清爽。}
content_en: Then I'd recommend a Whiskey Sour or a Gin and Tonic. The Whiskey Sour has a balanced sweet and sour profile, while the Gin and Tonic is more refreshing.

content: {就来杯威士忌酸吧。}
content_en: I'll have a Whiskey Sour, please.

content: {好的选择，我马上为您准备。}
content_en: Excellent choice. I'll prepare it for you right away.

content: {雅雅开始熟练地调制酒水，你趁机观察四周。餐厅里客人不多，但布置得很有格调，墙上挂着一些当地艺术品的复制品。}
content_en: Yaya began expertly mixing the drink, and you took the opportunity to observe your surroundings. The restaurant wasn't crowded, but it was tastefully decorated, with reproductions of local artwork hanging on the walls.

content: {你当调酒师多久了？}
content_en: How long have you been a mixologist?

content: {从小就对调酒感兴趣，但专业做这行大概两年。}
content_en: I've been interested in mixing drinks since I was young, but I've been doing it professionally for about two years now.

content: {看来是真心喜欢这份工作。}
content_en: It seems you genuinely enjoy this work.

content: {是的，我很享受创造新口味的过程。每个顾客的喜好不同，很有挑战性。}
content_en: Yes, I really enjoy the process of creating new flavors. Each customer's preference is different, so it's always challenging.

content: {我理解。诗嘉古尔还说你服务很细心。}
content_en: I understand. Skagull also mentioned you're very attentive in your service.

content: {她过奖了，我只是做好本分工作。}
content_en: She flatters me. I'm just doing my job properly.

content: {最近城里有些动荡，你这里受影响吗？}
content_en: There's been some unrest in the city recently. Has it affected you here?

content: {嗯，有点小影响，但老顾客们都很支持，我们照常营业。}
content_en: Hmm, a little, but our regular customers have been very supportive. We're operating as usual.

content: {那就好。我听说边境有魔物聚集，希望别蔓延到城里。}
content_en: That's good. I've heard monsters are gathering at the border. I hope it doesn't spread to the city.

content: {是啊，大家都希望平安。不过餐厅生意还算稳定。}
content_en: Yes, everyone hopes for peace. But business at the restaurant has remained relatively stable.

content: {你的调酒技术是自学的吗？}
content_en: Did you learn your mixology skills on your own?

content: {部分自学，部分在以前工作的地方学的。}
content_en: Partially self-taught, partially learned from a previous job I had.

content: {很厉害。}
content_en: That's terrible.

content: {谢谢。您的威士忌酸好了，请慢用。}
content_en: Thank you. Here is your Whiskey Sour. Please enjoy.

content: {谢谢。颜色看起来很正宗。}
content_en: Thank you. The color looks authentic.

content: {希望合您口味。}
content_en: I hope it suits your taste.

content: {嗯，味道不错，酸甜适中。}
content_en: Hmm, it's good. Balanced sweet and sour.

content: {很高兴您喜欢。}
content_en: I'm glad you like it.

content: {诗嘉古尔开玩笑说你这儿情报灵通，别介意。}
content_en: Skagull jokingly said you're well-informed here. Don't mind her.

content: {哦？我只是个调酒师，偶尔听顾客聊天而已，没什么情报。}
content_en: Oh? I'm just a bartender. I occasionally overhear customers chatting, that's all. No special information.

content: {别紧张，我开玩笑的。她常夸你聪明。}
content_en: Don't be nervous, I was joking. She often praises you for being smart.

content: {谢谢。诗嘉古尔小姐才是真正聪明的人。}
content_en: Thank you. Miss Skagull is the truly clever one.

content: {你平时除了调酒，还有什么爱好？}
content_en: Besides bartending, what other hobbies do you have?

content: {主要是调酒，偶尔看看书或处理餐厅事务。}
content_en: Mainly bartending. Sometimes I read or handle restaurant matters.

content: {听起来很充实。餐厅的食材是本地供应的吗？}
content_en: Sounds fulfilling. Are the restaurant's ingredients sourced locally?

content: {大部分是本地供应商，确保新鲜。}
content_en: Mostly from local suppliers, to ensure freshness.

content: {很好。诗嘉古尔说你的龙舌兰日出很有名。}
content_en: Good. Skagull said your Tequila Sunrise is famous.

content: {是的，那是招牌之一。如果您下次来，可以尝尝。}
content_en: Yes, that's one of our signatures. You can try it next time you visit.

content: {一定。最近有遇到什么有趣的顾客吗？}
content_en: Definitely. Have you encountered any interesting customers recently?

content: {偶尔有生面孔，但大家都挺友好的。}
content_en: Occasionally there are new faces, but everyone is quite friendly.

content: {看来你善于交际。}
content_en: It seems you're good at socializing.

content: {过奖了，只是工作所需。}
content_en: You flatter me. It's just part of the job.

content: {你正想再问问关于餐厅的历史，店外突然传来一阵喧哗和争吵声，打断了谈话。}
content_en: Just as you were about to ask more about the restaurant's history, a sudden commotion and sounds of an argument from outside interrupted the conversation.

content: {什么声音？外面好像出事了。}
content_en: What's that noise? Something seems to have happened outside.

content: {听起来像是骚动。最近街上偶尔有这种情况，可能是些小摩擦。}
content_en: Sounds like a disturbance. There have been occasional incidents on the streets lately, probably minor disputes.

content: {我是城主，有责任去看看情况。}
content_en: As the Lord, it's my duty to check the situation.

content: {您是城主？失敬了。请务必小心，可能有危险。}
content_en: You are the Lord? My apologies. Please be careful, there might be danger.

content: {我会的。谢谢你的酒。}
content_en: I will. Thank you for the drink.

content: {不客气。需要我帮忙报警或做点什么吗？}
content_en: You're welcome. Do you need me to call the guards or do anything?

content: {先不用，我出去查看一下再说。}
content_en: Not yet. Let me check it out first.

content: {好的，我会锁好门，确保安全。}
content_en: Alright. I'll lock the door and ensure safety.

content: {感谢。酒钱是多少？}
content_en: Thank you. How much for the drink?

content: {这次我请客吧，算是感谢您的光临。}
content_en: It's on the house this time, as a thank you for your visit.

content: {那怎么行，我必须付钱。}
content_en: I can't accept that. I must pay.

content: {好吧，谢谢您。威士忌酸是五枚银币。}
content_en: Well then, thank you. The Whiskey Sour is five silver coins.

content: {给你。保持联系，诗嘉古尔会转达。}
content_en: Here you are. Keep in touch. Skagull can relay messages if needed.

content: {祝您平安。}
content_en: Stay safe.

content: {你起身走向门口，心中有些紧张，但作为城主的责任感驱使你行动。}
content_en: You stood up and headed for the door, feeling somewhat nervous, but the sense of responsibility as the Lord drove you to act.

content: {如果需要帮助，随时回来。}
content_en: If you need help, feel free to come back.

content: {我会的。再见。}
content_en: I will. Goodbye.

content: {再见，小心点。}
content_en: Goodbye. Be careful.

content: {你离开乌托里餐厅，循着喧哗声望去，只见不远处花店前已聚集起人群。}
content_en: You left Utopia Restaurant and looked towards the source of the noise. A crowd had already gathered in front of a flower shop not far away.

content: {空气中弥漫着紧张，与餐厅内的宁静截然不同。}
content_en: The air was thick with tension, a stark contrast to the tranquility inside the restaurant.

content: {你快步上前，挤进人群中心，看到花店店主德莉法正紧紧抓着一个少年的手腕，她的妹妹德古娜则不安地站在一旁。}
content_en: You quickly approached and pushed through the crowd to the center. There, you saw the flower shop owner, Derifa, tightly gripping a young boy's wrist, while her sister, Degunnr, stood nearby looking anxious.

content: {大家请让一让！这里发生了什么事？}
content_en: "Everyone, please make way! What's going on here?"

content: {德莉法小姐，你快看！你家花店前有人被抓了！}
content_en: "Miss Derifa, look! Someone's been caught in front of your flower shop!"

content: {请问，这是怎么了？}
content_en: "Excuse me, what happened?"

content: {好像是抓住了偷花的惯犯！德莉法小姐的花最近总是不见。}
content_en: "Seems they caught a habitual flower thief! Miss Derifa's flowers have been disappearing recently."

content: {德莉法目光扫过人群，与你视线相接。}
content_en: Derifa's gaze swept over the crowd and met your eyes.

content: {她见你气度不凡，如同抓住救命稻草般提高了声音。}
content_en: Seeing your dignified bearing, she raised her voice as if clutching at a lifeline.

content: {这位先生，您看起来像个明白人！请过来帮我们评评理吧！}
content_en: "You, sir! You look like a reasonable person! Please come and help us judge this matter!"

content: {我只是路过。不过，如果我能帮上忙的话，愿意听听情况。}
content_en: "I'm just passing by. But if I can help, I'm willing to hear the situation."

content: {太好了！您看，这个少年，多次偷我店里的花，今天终于被我抓了个现行！}
content_en: "Wonderful! Look, this boy has stolen flowers from my shop multiple times, and today I finally caught him red-handed!"

content: {我没有偷！我只是路过！}
content_en: I didn't steal! I was just passing by!

content: {还敢狡辩？我亲眼看到你从花架上拿了一束新摘的铃兰！}
content_en: Still lying? I saw you with my own eyes taking a freshly picked bunch of lilies of the valley from the display!
Sister... he seems so pitiful...

content: {德古娜，偷东西就是错的，不管可不可怜！这次绝不能轻易放过。}
content_en: Degunnr, stealing is wrong, regardless of pity! We can't let him off easily this time!

content: {就在这时，身穿守卫制服的波蒙闻讯赶来，她分开人群，表情严肃。}
content_en: Just then, Pomon, wearing a guard's uniform, arrived after hearing the commotion. She parted the crowd, her expression stern.

content: {这里怎么回事？为什么聚集这么多人？}
content_en: "What's going on here? Why is everyone gathered?"

content: {波蒙，你来得正好！我抓住了这个偷花贼！}
content_en: "Pomon, you're just in time! I caught this flower thief!"

content: {偷花？有证据吗？}
content_en: "Flower thief? Any proof?"

content: {我亲眼所见！而且这已经不是第一次了！街坊邻居都可以作证，我的花经常在清晨莫名减少。}
content_en: "I saw it with my own eyes! And this isn't the first time! The neighbors can testify—my flowers often go missing mysteriously in the early morning."

content: {是啊，波蒙，我早上开店时，好几次看到这小子在花店附近鬼鬼祟祟地转悠。}
content_en: "That's right, Pomon. When I open my shop in the morning, I've seen this kid lurking suspiciously near the flower shop several times."

content: {你有什么要说的？}
content_en: "What do you have to say for yourself?"

content: {守卫大人，我真的没偷！是误会！我只是想摘朵花送给生病的母亲.......}
content_en: "Officer, I really didn't steal! It's a misunderstanding! I just wanted a flower for my sick mother..."

content: {胡说！你之前偷花时可没提过什么母亲！这分明是找借口！}
content_en: "Nonsense! You never mentioned any mother before when you stole flowers! This is clearly an excuse!"

content: {德莉法，稍安勿躁。德古娜，你看到了什么吗？}
content_en: "Derifa, calm down. Degunnr, did you see anything?"

content: {我前几天早上，好像看到他在花店附近转悠.......但我不确定他有没有拿花.......}
content_en: "A few days ago in the morning... I think I saw him hanging around the flower shop... but I'm not sure if he took any flowers..."

content: {看吧！连我妹妹都指认了！}
content_en: "See! Even my sister can identify him!"

content: {她胡说！我根本没偷！}
content_en: "She's lying! I didn't take anything!"

content: {安静！我会调查清楚。这位先生，您似乎也在旁观，不知有何见解？}
content_en: "Quiet! I will investigate this properly. Sir, you seem to be observing as well. Do you have any insight?"

content: {你感受到波蒙递过来的眼神，明白她希望你能提供一些判断。你深吸一口气，努力让自己看起来镇定且公正。}
content_en: You felt the look Pomon gave you and understood she hoped you could offer some judgment. You took a deep breath, trying to appear calm and fair.

content: {既然双方各执一词，或许应该更仔细地查证。少年，你说花是送给生病的母亲，可有办法证明你母亲确实生病住院？}
content_en: "Since both sides have different stories, perhaps we should investigate more carefully. Young man, you said the flower was for your sick mother. Can you prove your mother is indeed in the hospital?"

content: {有！我母亲就住在城西的疗养院，那里的修女可以作证！我叫阿伦，我母亲叫玛莎！}
content_en: "Yes! My mother is at the West District Sanatorium! The nuns there can vouch for me! My name is Alan, and my mother's name is Martha!"

content: {城西疗养院.......我知道那里。德莉法，你损失了多少花？}
content_en: "West District Sanatorium... I know the place. Derifa, how many flowers have you lost?"

content: {至少十几朵了！都是新鲜的花材，有些还是准备预留给老主顾的，价值不菲！}
content_en: "At least a dozen! They were all fresh blooms, some even reserved for regular customers! They're quite valuable!"

content: {少年，如果你需要花，为什么不堂堂正正地请求帮助？或许德莉法小姐会愿意帮助你。}
content_en: "Young man, if you needed flowers, why not ask for help properly? Perhaps Miss Derifa would have been willing to assist you."

content: {我怕被拒绝.......我家很穷，买不起花.......母亲最喜欢花了，我只是想让她开心一点.......}
content_en: "I was afraid of being rejected... My family is very poor, we can't afford flowers... Mother loves flowers so much. I just wanted to make her happy..."

content: {姐姐.......我们工坊有时会有修剪下来的残花，其实也可以送人的.......}
content_en: "Sister... our workshop sometimes has trimmed or leftover flowers. We could actually give those away..."

content: {德古娜！这不是施舍的问题，这是原则问题！}
content_en: "Degunnr! This isn't about charity, it's about principle!"

content: {德莉法，我理解你的愤怒。但若他所言属实，此事或许有情有可原之处。按律法，偷窃需赔偿损失或服劳役。}
content_en: "Derifa, I understand your anger. But if what he says is true, there might be mitigating circumstances. According to the law, theft requires compensation for losses or labor service."

content: {我有个提议。既然少年承认拿了花，无论初衷如何。不如这样，让他用劳动来补偿德莉法小姐的损失？例如，为花店帮忙打理、送货，直到抵偿花的价值。波蒙可以负责监督。同时，我们可以派人去疗养院核实他母亲的情况。}
content_en: "I have a proposal. Since the young man admits to taking the flowers, regardless of his intent. How about this: let him compensate for Miss Derifa's losses through labor? For example, helping out at the flower shop—tidying up, making deliveries—until the value of the flowers is repaid. Pomon can oversee it. At the same time, we can send someone to the sanatorium to verify his mother's situation."

content: {如果他真能老实干活，并且以后不再犯.......我可以考虑。}
content_en: "If he truly works diligently and doesn't offend again... I might consider it."

content: {我愿意！我可以帮您打扫花店、搬运花盆、送货！什么都行！我发誓！}
content_en: "I will! I can clean your shop, move pots, make deliveries! Anything! I swear!"

content: {这倒是个折中的办法。既能补偿损失，也能给年轻人一个改过的机会。德莉法，你觉得呢？}
content_en: "That seems a reasonable compromise. It compensates for the loss and gives the young man a chance to make amends. Derifa, what do you think?"

content: {好吧。看在这位先生和波蒙你的面子上。但如果他偷懒或者再犯，我绝不会再客气！}
content_en: "Fine. For your sake, sir, and yours, Pomon. But if he slacks off or offends again, I won't be so lenient!"

content: {那就这么定了。波蒙，麻烦你安排人去核实一下情况，并监督这项协议的执行。}
content_en: "Then it's settled. Pomon, please arrange for someone to verify the details and supervise the agreement."

content: {好的，先生。阿伦，你跟我来一下，登记你的信息。}
content_en: "Understood, sir. Alan, come with me to register your information."

content: {正当局面似乎趋于缓和时，人群外围传来一阵清脆而急促的盔甲摩擦声。}
content_en: Just as the situation seemed to be calming down, the crisp, rapid sound of clinking armor came from the edge of the crowd.

content: {让一让！让一让！曙光骑士团巡逻！这里发生什么纠纷了？}
content_en: "Make way! Make way! Dawn Knight Order on patrol! What is the dispute here?"

content: {波蒙？你也在这里。这位是.......}
content_en: "Pomon? You're here too. And this is..."

content: {她的目光落在你身上，闪过一丝惊讶，但迅速恢复了平静，微微颔首示意。}
content_en: Her gaze fell on you, flickering with surprise before quickly returning to calm. She gave a slight nod of acknowledgment.

content: {瑶琳，邦妮，你们来得正好。这位是城主大人，碰巧路过，正在帮忙调解。}
content_en: "Yao Lin, Bonnie, you've arrived just in time. This is the Lord. He happened to be passing by and was helping to mediate the situation."

content: {邦妮，瑶琳，不必多礼。我只是见此处有争执，试图寻个两全之策。}
content_en: "Bonnie, Yao Lin, no need for formalities. I merely saw a dispute and tried to find a fair solution."

content: {城主大人，您没事吧？需要我们协助吗？}
content_en: "Lord, are you alright? Do you require our assistance?"

content: {纠纷缘由？请简要说来。}
content_en: "The reason for the dispute? Please provide a brief summary."

content: {邦妮小姐，这个少年偷我的花，城主判决他劳役补偿，但我觉得太轻了！我这些花可都是精心栽培的！}
content_en: "Miss Bonnie, this boy stole my flowers! The Lord ruled he should compensate through labor service, but I think it's too lenient! These flowers were all carefully cultivated!"

content: {骑士大人，我真的知错了！我只是想让我生病的母亲开心……}
content_en: "Knights, I truly know I was wrong! I just wanted to make my sick mother happy..."

content: {邦妮姐姐，瑶琳姐姐，你们帮帮我们吧。}
content_en: "Sister Bonnie, Sister Yao Lin, please help us."

content: {偷花？动机若是孝心，光明指引我们同情弱者，但也不能纵容错误。}
content_en: "Flower theft? If the motive was filial piety, the Light guides us to sympathize with the weak, but we cannot condone wrongdoing."

content: {德莉法，你的损失估算过吗}
content_en: "Derifa, have you estimated your losses?"

content: {大约值二十枚银币的花材！}
content_en: "The floral materials are worth about twenty silver coins!"

content: {少年，你能偿还吗？}
content_en: "Young man, can you repay that?"

content: {我……我现在没钱，但可以干活抵债！}
content_en: I... I don't have any money now, but I can work to pay it off!

content: {城主大人，您的判决是？}
content_en: Lord, what is your verdict?

content: {我提议让他为花店工作，直至抵偿花价。波蒙守卫可从中协调。}
content_en: I propose he works at the flower shop until the value of the flowers is compensated. Guard Pomon can oversee the coordination.

content: {判决合理。但德莉法似乎仍有顾虑？}
content_en: The judgment is reasonable. But Derifa still seems to have reservations?

content: {是的，我怕他再偷，或者偷懒……我这小本生意，经不起折腾。}
content_en: Yes. I'm afraid he might steal again, or be lazy... My business is small, it can't handle such disruptions.

content: {我可以监督，但公务繁忙，恐难周全。}
content_en: I can supervise, but with my official duties, I might not be able to give it full attention.

content: {你感到德莉法的担忧确有道理，正思索如何完善方案，邦妮适时开口。}
content_en: You felt Derifa's concerns were valid and were pondering how to improve the plan when Bonnie spoke up appropriately.

content: {这样吧，我们曙光骑士团可以介入此事。城主大人，您似乎另有要事，此处交由我们处理可好？}
content_en: "In that case, our Dawn Knight Order can intervene in this matter. Lord, you seem to have other pressing affairs. Would it be acceptable to leave this to us?"

content: {城主请随我们来，这里交给我们便是。}
content_en: "Lord, please come with us. We will handle things here."

content: {也好，多谢你们解围。德莉法，请相信骑士团会公正处理。}
content_en: "That's fine. Thank you for stepping in. Derifa, please trust that the Knights will handle this fairly."

content: {德莉法，请随我们至骑士团办事处，详细拟定一份补偿与监督方案，如何？}
content_en: "Derifa, please accompany us to the Knights' office to draft a detailed compensation and supervision plan, how does that sound?"

content: {姐姐，去吧，邦妮姐姐是好人。}
content_en: "Sister, let's go. Sister Bonnie is a good person."

content: {德莉法，我陪你们一同前去。}
content_en: "Derifa, I'll go with you."

content: {少年也一起来。城主，请这边走。}
content_en: "Young man, come along too. Lord, this way please."

content: {邦妮和瑶琳巧妙地将你从人群中引开，护送你至一旁安静处。随后她们返回，带着德莉法、德古娜和少年阿伦向骑士团驻地走去。}
content_en: Bonnie and Yao Lin skillfully guided you away from the crowd, escorting you to a quiet spot nearby. Then they returned and led Derifa, Degunnr, and the boy Alan toward the Knights' headquarters.

content: {德莉法，我们理解你经营花店不易，但光明亦教导我们宽容与给予机会。}
content_en: "Derifa, we understand running a flower shop is not easy, but the Light also teaches us tolerance and giving second chances."

content: {我只是想讨个公道……}
content_en: "I just wanted justice..."

content: {公道不止于惩罚。让少年参与骑士团组织的社区服务，由我们直接督导，既可补偿你的损失，亦能引导他向善，你看如何？}
content_en: "Justice is more than punishment. Having the boy participate in community service organized by the Knights, under our direct supervision, can both compensate your loss and guide him toward good. What do you think?"

content: {我愿意！我一定好好干！}
content_en: "I'm willing! I'll work hard, I promise!"

content: {姐姐，这个办法好！还能让花店多个帮手呢。}
content_en: "Sister, this is a good plan! It could even give the flower shop an extra helper."

content: {邦妮，你们骑士团常处理此类事务吗？}
content_en: "Bonnie, does your Knight order often handle such matters?"

content: {时常有之。我们倡导以光明化解纷争，而非单纯惩处。}
content_en: "Quite frequently. We advocate resolving disputes with Light, not simply through punishment."

content: {……好吧，既然你们保证会监督。}
content_en: "...Alright, since you guarantee supervision."

content: {那就此定下。少年，你明日清晨便来骑士团报到，我们会安排具体工作。}
content_en: "Then it's settled. Young man, report to the Knights first thing tomorrow morning. We will arrange specific tasks for you."

content: {谢谢各位大人！谢谢德莉法小姐！我一定改过自新！}
content_en: "Thank you, honorable sirs and madams! Thank you, Miss Derifa! I will truly reform!"

content: {城主想必已安全离开。德莉法，日后若有类似困扰，可直接寻我们相助。}
content_en: "The Lord has likely left safely by now. Derifa, if you have similar troubles in the future, you can seek our help directly."

content: {谢谢你们。波蒙，也劳烦你了。}
content_en: "Thank you. Pomon, thank you for your trouble as well."

content: {分内之事。瑶琳，邦妮，这次多亏你们及时赶到。}
content_en: "My duty. Yao Lin, Bonnie, thank you for arriving promptly this time."

content: {无需客气。守护生命与秩序，本就是我辈誓言。}
content_en: "No need for thanks. Protecting life and order is our sworn oath."

content: {姐姐，我们回家吧？我想把今天的事画下来。}
content_en: "Sister, shall we go home? I want to draw what happened today."

content: {好，我们回去。阿伦，记住你的承诺。}
content_en: "Yes, let's go back. Alan, remember your promise."

content: {纠纷终于圆满解决，人群渐渐散去。邦妮与瑶琳相视点头，继续她们的巡逻任务。}
content_en: The dispute finally resolved satisfactorily, and the crowd gradually dispersed. Bonnie and Yao Lin exchanged a nod and continued their patrol duties.

content: {你推开住所的门，略显疲惫地走进来。达菲正埋头整理文件，听到动静后耳朵微微抖动了一下，但并没有立刻抬头。}
content_en: You pushed open the door to your residence and walked in, looking somewhat weary. Duffy was bent over organizing documents. Hearing the noise, her ears twitched slightly, but she didn't look up immediately.

content: {达菲，我回来了。}
content_en: "Duffy, I'm back."

content: {哼，你还知道回来？今天又跑去哪里闲逛了？文件堆了一桌子，还以为你被早上的会议吓跑了。}
content_en: "Hmph, so you remembered to come back? Where did you wander off to today? The paperwork is piled high on the desk. I thought you'd run off scared by this morning's meeting."

content: {有些事情需要处理，本来想和你细说的。}
content_en: "There were some matters that needed handling. I wanted to tell you in detail."

content: {说吧，我听着呢。不过别指望我有多感兴趣，除非是能让我早点下班的好事。}
content_en: "Go on, I'm listening. But don't expect me to be overly interested unless it's something that lets me leave work early."

content: {你正想开口讲述花店前的风波，急促的敲门声打断了你。尼可尔和奥兰多一同进入，两人脸上都带着凝重。}
content_en: Just as you were about to recount the incident at the flower shop, rapid knocking interrupted you. Nicole and Orlando entered together, both with grave expressions.

content: {抱歉打扰，城主大人。我们有紧急情报必须立即汇报。}
content_en: "Apologies for the intrusion, Lord. We have urgent intelligence that must be reported immediately."

content: {事态紧急，边境有异动，我们不得不来。}
content_en: "The situation is critical. There is unusual movement at the border. We had no choice but to come."

content: {请进，正好达菲也在。发生了什么？}
content_en: "Please come in. Duffy is here too. What's happened?"

content: {边境巡逻队传来密报，邻国的贵族近期活动异常频繁，小股部队在边界线附近反复试探。}
content_en: "Border patrol has sent a secret report. Nobles from the neighboring country have been unusually active recently, with small troop units repeatedly probing near the boundary line."

content: {我通过灵眼观测到那片区域的能量流动极不寻常，充满了躁动与恶意，怀疑他们在策划大规模的事端。}
content_en: "Through Spirit Eyes, I observed that the energy flow in that area is extremely unusual, filled with restlessness and malice. I suspect they are planning a large-scale incident."

content: {兽人族群呢？他们离边境最近，有没有受到影响？}
content_en: "What about the Orc tribes? They are closest to the border. Have they been affected?"

content: {这正是问题的关键。根据可靠消息，靠近边境线的几个兽人部落已经遭到了不明身份的武装人员骚扰，冲突一触即发。}
content_en: "That is precisely the key issue. According to reliable information, several Orc tribes near the border have already been harassed by unidentified armed personnel. Conflict is imminent."

content: {具体说说，尼可尔。}
content_en: "Explain in detail, Nicole."

content: {那些贵族以贸易纠纷、牲畜越界等琐事为借口，在边境制造摩擦，挑起争端。他们似乎有意激怒兽人。}
content_en: "Those nobles are using trivial pretexts like trade disputes or livestock crossing the border to create friction and provoke conflict. They seem intent on angering the Orcs."

content: {能量显示，有一股黑暗、蛊惑性的气息正在兽人领地内蔓延，部分兽人战士的情绪被点燃，变得极具攻击性。}
content_en: "The energy readings show a dark, seductive aura spreading within Orc territory. The emotions of some Orc warriors have been inflamed, making them highly aggressive."

content: {那些阴魂不散的家伙！总是这样，不告而别地就想挑起争端！}
content_en: "Those restless troublemakers! Always like this, trying to stir up conflict without warning!"

content: {达菲，冷静点。奥兰多，你能确定兽人目前的整体动向吗？}
content_en: Duffy, calm down. Orlando, can you confirm the current overall movement of the Orcs?

content: {兽人内部出现了分裂的迹象。一部分族群主张克制，但更多年轻气盛的战士被煽动起来，认为是我们纵容甚至勾结了那些挑衅者。如果放任不管，他们极有可能被利用，成为攻击我们的先锋。}
content_en: Within the Orc tribes, signs of division are appearing. Some factions advocate for restraint, but more hot-blooded young warriors are being incited, believing that we have condoned or even colluded with the provocateurs. If left unchecked, they are highly likely to be manipulated into becoming the vanguard attacking us.

content: {形势很严峻。一旦兽人被完全蛊惑，我们将面临两面受敌的危险局面。}
content_en: The situation is critical. Once the Orcs are fully corrupted, we will face the dangerous predicament of being attacked on two fronts.

content: {这确实麻烦。直接武力干预恐怕会正中那些贵族下怀，坐实他们的谣言。达菲，你怎么看？}
content_en: This is indeed troublesome. Direct military intervention would likely play right into the nobles' hands, confirming their rumors. Duffy, what do you think?

content: {我……我只是个行政助理，但兽人毕竟是我的同胞。我必须说，不能眼睁睁看着他们被欺骗、被利用！}
content_en: I... I'm just an administrative assistant, but the Orcs are my kin after all. I have to say, I can't just stand by and watch them be deceived and used!

content: {城主大人，我们需要立刻行动，赶在危机全面爆发前阻止它。}
content_en: Lord, we need to act immediately, to stop this before the crisis fully erupts.

content: {我建议立刻加强边境哨所的巡逻力量，同时派出精干人员秘密调查兽人内部的真实情况和那股黑暗气息的源头。}
content_en: I suggest immediately strengthening the patrol forces at the border outposts, while also dispatching a capable team to secretly investigate the true situation within the Orc tribes and the source of that dark aura.

content: {但调查必须隐秘，避免刺激双方。尼可尔，在外交层面有什么可行的方案吗？}
content_en: But the investigation must be covert to avoid provoking either side. Nicole, are there any feasible diplomatic options?

content: {或许可以尝试派出秘密使者，直接与受影响最深的兽人部落长老沟通，揭露贵族的阴谋，解开误会。}
content_en: Perhaps we could try sending a secret envoy to communicate directly with the elders of the Orc tribes most affected, expose the nobles' conspiracy, and clear up the misunderstanding.

content: {沟通？那些躲在幕后的贵族会轻易让我们接触兽人吗？他们肯定布下了层层阻碍！}
content_en: Communicate? Will those nobles lurking in the shadows let us approach the Orcs so easily? They've surely laid down layers of obstacles!

content: {达菲小姐的担忧不无道理。我的灵眼也察觉到，我们内部的情报传递似乎受到了干扰，有被渗透的迹象。}
content_en: Miss Duffy's concerns are not without reason. My Spirit Eyes also detected that our internal intelligence transmission seems to be interfered with, showing signs of infiltration.

content: {看来这是一场精心策划的、典型的借刀杀人之计。我们必须比他们更快。}
content_en: It seems this is a meticulously planned, classic case of "using another's sword to kill." We must be faster than them.

content: {我们不能坐视不管！你……你得做点什么！}
content_en: We can't just stand by and do nothing! You... you have to do something!

content: {我建议请曙光骑士团以中立调停者的身份介入，他们公正的名声或许能为对话创造机会。}
content_en: I suggest involving the Dawn Knight Order as neutral mediators. Their reputation for fairness might create an opportunity for dialogue.

content: {但骑士团的调动需要阿古丽娅团长批准。我们需要一个完整的计划。}
content_en: But mobilizing the Knights requires Captain Aguria's approval. We need a complete plan.

content: {阿古丽娅团长那边我会亲自沟通。现在，先听听你们的完整评估。尼可尔，边境的冲突具体到了什么程度？}
content_en: I will personally communicate with Captain Aguria. For now, let's hear your full assessment. Nicole, how severe are the border conflicts specifically?

content: {我们的哨所已经报告了多次小规模的武装冲突，双方均有伤亡，但主要是兽人部落的损失更重，这进一步激化了他们的愤怒。}
content_en: Our outposts have reported multiple small-scale armed clashes. Both sides have suffered casualties, but the losses are heavier for the Orc tribes, further fueling their anger.

content: {能量流动显示，危机的临界点可能在几天内，甚至更短的时间内就会到来。}
content_en: The energy flow indicates the crisis point could arrive within days, or even sooner.

content: {伤亡？具体是哪个部落？达比……达比她今天去了边境集市！她会不会有危险？}
content_en: Casualties? Which specific tribe? Darby... Darby went to the border market today! Could she be in danger?

content: {暂未收到涉及平民的详细报告，但冲突区域确实靠近贸易路线。达菲小姐，请放心，目前没有大规模平民受害的消息。}
content_en: We have not yet received detailed reports involving civilians, but the conflict zones are indeed near trade routes. Ms. Duffy, rest assured, there are currently no reports of large-scale civilian casualties.

content: {达菲，别担心，我们会处理好的，绝不会让达比和任何无辜者受到伤害。}
content_en: Duffy, don't worry. We will handle this properly. We won't let Darby or any innocent people come to harm.

content: {谁、谁担心那个疯丫头了！我只是……只是不想让麻烦变得更大！}
content_en: Who, who's worried about that crazy girl! I just... I just don't want the trouble to get any bigger!

content: {城主大人，我提议立即召开核心幕僚紧急会议。}
content_en: Lord, I propose convening an emergency meeting of the core council immediately.

content: {同时，我请求立刻组织一支侦察队，由我带领，前往能量异常点核实兽人动向和黑暗气息的源头。}
content_en: At the same time, I request to organize a reconnaissance team right away, led by me, to proceed to the energy anomaly site to verify Orc movements and the source of the dark aura.

content: {同意。尼可尔，你负责立刻进行外交联络的准备工作；奥兰多，你挑选可靠人手，准备出发，持续监控能量变化。}
content_en: Agreed. Nicole, you are responsible for immediately preparing diplomatic liaison work. Orlando, you select reliable personnel, prepare to depart, and continue monitoring the energy changes.

content: {我呢？我也要帮忙！情报梳理和内部防卫检查我可以做！}
content_en: What about me? I want to help too! I can handle intelligence collation and internal defense checks!

content: {达菲，你协助我整合所有情报，并重点准备与兽人沟通时可能用到的要点和承诺，你最了解他们的习俗和需求。同时，府内的安全警戒级别提升，交给你了。}
content_en: Duffy, assist me in integrating all intelligence, and focus on preparing key points and promises that might be used when communicating with the Orcs. You understand their customs and needs best. Also, raise the security alert level within the manor. I leave that to you.

content: {哼，算你还有点眼光，知道哪些事离不开我。}
content_en: Hmph, it seems you have some sense after all, knowing which tasks can't be done without me.

content: {那么，我即刻去安排使者和会议。}
content_en: Then, I will immediately arrange for the envoys and the meeting.

content: {我会在一小时内组织好侦察队出发。愿圣光指引我们，揭露黑暗。}
content_en: I will have the reconnaissance team organized and ready to depart within an hour. May the Holy Light guide us to expose the darkness.

content: {尼可尔和奥兰多行礼后迅速离开。达菲转向你，脸上的焦虑掩饰不住，尾巴也无精打采地垂着。}
content_en: Nicole and Orlando saluted and quickly departed. Duffy turned to you, her anxiety unconcealed, her tail drooping listlessly.

content: {你……你真的认为这次能和平解决吗？那些贵族……还有被激怒的兽人……}
content_en: You... do you really think this can be resolved peacefully this time? Those nobles... and the enraged Orcs...

content: {我相信只要展现足够的诚意，并让他们看清真相，兽人的长老和战士们会做出明智的判断。关键在于速度和时间。}
content_en: I believe if we show enough sincerity and let them see the truth clearly, the Orc elders and warriors will make wise judgments. The key lies in speed and timing.

content: {但贵族们不会罢休的。你记得老城主……也就是你之前的那位，经常说的话吗？}
content_en: But the nobles won't give up. Do you remember what the old Lord—your predecessor—often said?

content: {当然。他说，治理城市如同驯服野兽，既需要耐心，也需要在关键时刻展现不容置疑的勇气和力量。}
content_en: Of course. He said governing a city is like taming a beast: it requires patience, but also showing unquestionable courage and strength at critical moments.

content: {那这次，你打算怎么展现你的勇气？像今天处理花店纠纷那样，靠说服和妥协吗？}
content_en: So this time, how do you plan to show your courage? Like today, handling the flower shop dispute through persuasion and compromise?

content: {先收集足够的信息，看清全局，再决定行动的方向和力度。莽撞的勇气是愚蠢。达菲，你先去提升警戒级别，然后整理相关卷宗。}
content_en: First, gather enough information to see the full picture clearly. Then decide the direction and intensity of our actions. Reckless courage is foolish. Duffy, first go raise the alert level, then organize the relevant files.

content: {知道了。不过……别一个人逞强，有什么计划……要告诉我。}
content_en: Understood. But... don't try to handle everything alone. If you have any plans... tell me.

content: {谢谢，达菲。}
content_en: Thank you, Duffy.

content: {少来这套！我只是在尽一个行政助理的责任而已！我……我去忙了！}
content_en: Cut it out! I'm just fulfilling my duty as an administrative assistant! I... I'm going to get busy!

content: {达菲快步离开，尾巴尖却不自觉地轻轻晃动了一下。你独自留在房间，目光投向窗外边境的方向，感觉肩上的责任比以往任何时候都要沉重。}
content_en: Duffy left quickly, but the tip of her tail couldn't help but give a slight, unconscious twitch. You remained alone in the room, your gaze turning toward the direction of the border outside the window, feeling the weight of responsibility on your shoulders heavier than ever before.

content: {尼可尔和奥兰多汇报完边境危机后匆匆离去，书房内只剩下你一人，空气中弥漫着紧张的气息。你深知事态紧急，不能再有丝毫耽搁，立即唤来侍从去请阿古丽娅团长和莉莉丝顾问。}
content_en: After Nicole and Orlando hurriedly left after reporting the border crisis, you were alone in the study, the air thick with tension. Knowing the urgency of the situation allowed no further delay, you immediately summoned a servant to request the presence of Captain Aguria and Advisor Lilith.

content: {阿古丽娅快步走入书房，身披曙光骑士团徽章，神情严肃；莉莉丝悄然现身，红发飘逸，脸上带着一丝不耐烦。}
content_en: Aguria strode into the study, adorned with the Dawn Knight Order' emblem, her expression grave. Lilith appeared quietly, her crimson hair flowing, a trace of impatience on her face.

content: {城主，您紧急召见，是出了什么事？}
content_en: Lord, your urgent summons—has something happened?

content: {哼，这么晚还打扰人，最好是真有要事。}
content_en: Hmph, disturbing people so late... this better be truly important.

content: {边境传来坏消息，邻国贵族正在煽动兽人族群，冲突一触即发。}
content_en: Bad news from the border. Nobles from the neighboring country are inciting the Orc tribes. Conflict is imminent.

content: {兽人？他们一向独来独往，为何突然异动？}
content_en: Orcs? They usually keep to themselves. Why the sudden unrest?

content: {我的情报网显示，邻国在背后散布谣言，说我们压迫兽人，想借刀杀人。}
content_en: My intelligence network indicates the neighboring country is spreading rumors behind the scenes, claiming we are oppressing the Orcs—trying to use them as a blade against us.

content: {正是如此。尼可尔汇报说，兽人部落已遭到骚扰，部分族群被蛊惑，开始有小规模动作。}
content_en: Exactly. Nicole reports that Orc tribes have already been harassed. Some factions have been corrupted and have begun taking small-scale actions.

content: {这太危险了！若兽人全员动员，我们将腹背受敌。}
content_en: This is highly dangerous! If the Orcs mobilize fully, we will be caught between two fronts.

content: {邻国使者频繁出入兽人营地，伪造证据，说我们囚禁了兽人同胞，比如尤蕾拉。}
content_en: Envoys from the neighboring country are frequently entering Orc camps, fabricating evidence, saying we have imprisoned their kin, such as Eurella.

content: {尤蕾拉是自愿留下的，但兽人可能因误会而敌视我们。我们必须尽快化解这场危机。}
content_en: Eurella stayed voluntarily, but the Orcs may harbor hostility towards us due to misunderstanding. We must resolve this crisis as quickly as possible.

content: {我建议以曙光骑士团名义出使，与兽人面对面沟通，解开误会。}
content_en: I suggest sending an envoy in the name of the Dawn Knight Order to communicate with the Orcs face-to-face and clear up the misunderstanding.

content: {直接出使太冒险！兽人现在戒备森严，可能直接攻击使者。不如先从文化入手，派使者送礼示好，比如药材或矿石，表示诚意。}
content_en: Sending an envoy directly is too risky! The Orcs are heavily guarded now and might attack the messenger outright. Perhaps we should start with a cultural approach—sending an envoy with gifts to show goodwill, like medicinal herbs or ore, to express sincerity.

content: {但礼物需精心选择，避免被误解为挑衅。同时，邻国动向不能忽视，他们可能趁虚而入。}
content_en: But the gifts must be chosen carefully to avoid being misinterpreted as provocation. At the same time, we cannot ignore the neighboring country's movements; they might exploit any opening.

content: {我会加强边境巡逻，防止邻国进一步挑衅。若能与兽人结成同盟，不仅能化解危机，还能增强我们的防御。}
content_en: I will strengthen border patrols to prevent further provocation from the neighboring country. If we can form an alliance with the Orcs, it would not only defuse the crisis but also strengthen our defenses.

content: {同盟？兽人可不会轻易信任外人。但若能成功，确实是损失最小的方式。我建议先搜集更多情报，了解兽人内部的分歧。}
content_en: An alliance? The Orcs don't easily trust outsiders. But if successful, it would indeed minimize losses. I suggest first gathering more intelligence to understand the divisions within the Orc tribes.

content: {好，那就双管齐下。阿古丽娅，你准备出使事宜，但务必确保安全；莉莉丝，你利用魔法深入调查兽人动向和邻国阴谋。}
content_en: Good, then we proceed on both fronts. Aguria, you prepare the envoy mission, but ensure safety above all. Lilith, you use magic to investigate the Orc movements and the neighboring country's conspiracy thoroughly.

content: {光明总会驱散迷雾，我相信沟通能化解干戈。}
content_en: Light will always dispel the mist. I believe communication can resolve the conflict.

content: {别太乐观！若和谈失败，我们得准备武力防御，但优先避免冲突。}
content_en: Don't be too optimistic! If the talks fail, we must prepare for military defense, but avoiding conflict remains the priority.

content: {事不宜迟，立即行动。愿我们找到破局之策。}
content_en: Time is of the essence. Let's act immediately. May we find a way to break this deadlock.

content: {是，我这就去筹备。}
content_en: Yes, I will make preparations immediately.

content: {哼，交给我吧，但事后别忘了我的报酬。}
content_en: Hmph, leave it to me. But don't forget my payment afterward.

content: {阿古丽娅行礼后快步离开，莉莉丝翻个白眼，但眼神认真，随即化作一道红光消失。你独自站在书房中，心中盘算着接下来的行动，希望这次商议能带来转机。}
content_en: Aguria saluted and left swiftly. Lilith rolled her eyes, but her gaze was serious, before disappearing in a flash of red light. Alone in the study, you contemplated the next steps, hoping this discussion would bring a turning point.

content: {书房内的空气凝重，你刚与阿古丽娅和莉莉丝敲定了以和谈为先的大方向，但一个关键问题悬而未决。}
content_en: The air in the study was heavy. You had just settled on a general direction of prioritizing peace talks with Aguria and Lilith, but a critical question remained unresolved.

content: {方案是有了，但由谁去执行？兽人部落现在对我们充满敌意，派谁去才能让他们愿意坐下来谈？}
content_en: We have a plan, but who will carry it out? The Orc tribes are full of hostility towards us now. Who can we send that they would be willing to sit down and talk with?

content: {让骑士团大张旗鼓地去，无异于火上浇油。我们需要一个他们不会立刻视为敌人的人。}
content_en: Sending the Knights openly would only add fuel to the fire. We need someone they won't immediately see as an enemy.

content: {一个中间人……一个他们能够信任的桥梁。}
content_en: An intermediary... a bridge they can trust.

content: {哼，我倒是想到了一个合适的人选。}
content_en: Hmph, I can think of one suitable candidate.
Who?

content: {尤蕾拉。那个小兽娘。}
content_en: Eurella. That little beastkin girl.

content: {尤蕾拉？她确实是个兽人，但她的性格……有些跳脱，这件事关系重大，她能胜任吗？}
content_en: Eurella? She is indeed an Orc, but her personality... is rather flighty. This matter is of great importance. Is she up to the task?

content: {别被她表面的顽皮骗了。她血脉纯正，在兽人同胞中有着天然的亲和力，这是外人无法比拟的优势。}
content_en: Don't be fooled by her playful surface. Her bloodline is pure, giving her a natural affinity among her Orc kin—an advantage no outsider can match.

content: {我明白她的身份或许能打开对话的门，但此行太过危险，我不想将她卷入其中。}
content_en: I understand her identity might open the door for dialogue, but this journey is too dangerous. I don't want to drag her into this.

content: {危险？她可是曾经为你挡下过能量反噬的人，你忘了吗？她远比你以为的要坚强。}
content_en: Dangerous? She was the one who shielded you from that energy backlash once. Have you forgotten? She's far stronger than you think.

content: {我没有忘……但那一次是意外。这次是主动将她送往漩涡中心。}
content_en: I haven't forgotten... but that was an accident. This is actively sending her into the eye of the storm.

content: {正因为她是你的友人，且自愿为你付出，由她去传递和平的意愿，才更能打动兽人长老们。他们重视血脉，也更看重“情义”二字。}
content_en: Precisely because she is your friend and voluntarily chose to stand by you, sending her to convey the message of peace would move the Orc elders more deeply. They value bloodline, but they also hold 'bonds of loyalty and feeling' in high regard.

content: {可她喜欢恶作剧的性子，万一在关键时刻……}
content_en: But her mischievous nature... what if at a crucial moment...

content: {那是她保护自己的方式，或者说，是她表达关心的一种笨拙形式。她早就察觉到你肩上的重担，只是用她的方式来为你分担，比如偷偷放些能宁神的花草在你桌上。}
content_en: That's her way of protecting herself, or perhaps a clumsy way of showing she cares. She's long been aware of the burden on your shoulders, just trying to share it in her own way—like secretly placing calming herbs on your desk.

content: {这些小事你都知道？}
content_en: You know about these small things?

content: {哼，我自然知道。所以，让她去。不过，你得亲自和她谈，而且要注意方式。}
content_en: Hmph, of course I know. So, let her go. However, you must speak to her personally, and mind your approach.

content: {方式？}
content_en: Approach?

content: {她吃软不吃硬，最讨厌被命令。你得“请求”她，而不是“指派”她。我已经传讯给她，她应该快到了。}
content_en: She responds better to kindness than force, and hates being ordered around. You must 'request' her, not 'assign' her. I've already sent her a message. She should be here soon.

content: {你沉吟片刻，觉得莉莉丝的话不无道理。就在这时，书房门被敲响。}
content_en: You pondered for a moment, finding Lilith's words reasonable. Just then, the study door was knocked.

content: {城主，莉莉丝顾问。关于使团的人选，我还有一些补充建议。}
content_en: "Lord, Advisor Lilith. Regarding the envoy selection, I have some additional suggestions."

content: {请讲，阿古丽娅团长。}
content_en: "Please, speak, Captain Aguria."

content: {我认为，如果能让一位在兽人中有威望、同时又与我们交好的人同去，成功的可能性会更大。我刚刚想到，尤蕾拉小姐或许是极佳的人选。}
content_en: "I believe if we can have someone who holds prestige among the Orcs and is also on good terms with us accompany the mission, the chances of success would be greater. It just occurred to me—Miss Eurella might be an excellent candidate."

content: {看吧，连不灭的光都这么想。}
content_en: "See? Even the undying light thinks so."

content: {连你也这么认为……我明白了。阿古丽娅，如果由尤蕾拉担任信使，你能否确保她的安全？}
content_en: "You think so too... I understand. Aguria, if Eurella were to act as the messenger, can you ensure her safety?"

content: {曙光骑士团会倾力保护每一位和平的使者，尤蕾拉小姐也不例外。我会亲自挑选精锐，在后方接应，确保一旦有变，能立刻支援。}
content_en: "The Dawn Knight Order will spare no effort in protecting every envoy of peace, Miss Eurella included. I will personally select elite troops to provide support from the rear, ensuring immediate assistance if anything goes awry."

content: {我也会用魔法暗中留意，双重保险。}
content_en: "I'll also keep a magical eye on things from the shadows. A double layer of insurance."

content: {好。那……等她来了，我会和她好好谈谈。}
content_en: "Good. Then... when she arrives, I will speak with her properly."

content: {愿光明指引她，也指引我们。我先去筹备接应事宜。}
content_en: "May the Light guide her, and guide us all. I shall go prepare the support arrangements now."

content: {阿古丽娅行礼后离开。莉莉丝也伸了个懒腰。}
content_en: Aguria saluted and left. Lilith also stretched lazily.

content: {好了，关键人物给你找到了，怎么说服她就看你的了。我也得去宝石库房转转，看看我的宝贝们。}
content_en: "Well, I've found you the key person. Convincing her is up to you now. I need to visit the gem vault and check on my treasures."

content: {谢谢你，莉莉丝。}
content_en: "Thank you, Lilith."

content: {记住，是“请求”。我走了。}
content_en: "Remember, 'request.' I'm off."

content: {莉莉丝化作点点光粒消失。你独自走到窗边，望着窗外逐渐暗下来的天色，心中思索着该如何对尤蕾拉开口，既不能让她感到压力，又要让她明白此事关乎无数人的安危。远处，一个活泼的身影正蹦蹦跳跳地朝书房跑来。}
content_en: Lilith dissolved into particles of light and vanished. Alone, you walked to the window, gazing at the gradually darkening sky outside, pondering how to approach Eurella. You couldn't make her feel pressured, yet she needed to understand this concerned the safety of countless lives. In the distance, a lively figure was hopping and skipping toward the study.

content: {尤蕾拉……希望你能帮我，也希望我们能一起避免这场战争。}
content_en: Eurella... I hope you can help me, and I hope we can avoid this war together.

content: {你心中泛起一丝不安，但想到尤蕾拉的纯真，又坚定了信心。}
content_en: A thread of unease stirred within you, but thinking of Eurella's pure-hearted nature, your resolve strengthened.

content: {窗外夜色渐深，你决定先整理一下思绪，为即将到来的谈话做准备。}
content_en: Outside the window, the night deepened. You decided to gather your thoughts first, preparing for the upcoming conversation.

content: {尤蕾拉悄悄地飘到你的身后}
content_en: Eurella quietly drifted up behind you.

content: {哇！吓到你了吧！}
content_en: "Boo! Did I scare you?"

content: {啊！尤蕾拉，你真是的！}
content_en: "Ah! Eurella, you really are something!"

content: {嘿嘿，终于成功啦！你这次的表情太有趣了！}
content_en: "Hehe, finally succeeded! Your expression this time was too funny!"

content: {确实出乎意料，我没想到你会这样出现。}
content_en: "Quite unexpected. I didn't think you'd appear like that."

content: {那当然，我这次可是精心策划的！}
content_en: "Of course! I planned this one carefully!"

content: {你的恶作剧越来越有创意了。}
content_en: "Your pranks are getting more and more creative."
