content: {以前你总是面无表情，现在终于有反应了！}
content_en: "You used to have no expression at all, but now you finally react!"

content: {或许是我放松了警惕。}
content_en: "Perhaps I've let my guard down."

content: {这说明我进步了，对吧？}
content_en: "That means I'm improving, right?"

content: {是的，尤蕾拉，你确实很努力}
content_en: "Yes, Eurella, you really are putting in effort."

content: {所以，你被吓到的感觉怎么样？}
content_en: "So, how did it feel to be scared?"

content: {有点惊讶，但还挺有趣的。}
content_en: "A bit surprised, but rather amusing."

content: {哈哈，我就知道你会喜欢！}
content_en: "Haha, I knew you'd like it!"

content: {不过，尤蕾拉，我正好有事想和你谈谈。}
content_en: "But, Eurella, there's actually something I wanted to discuss with you."

content: {什么事？不会是要批评我的恶作剧吧？}
content_en: "What is it? You're not going to scold me for my prank, are you?"

content: {不，是关于周围的局势问题。}
content_en: "No, it's about the surrounding situation."

content: {局势？}
content_en: "Situation?"

content: {最近兽人部落和人类城镇之间关系紧张，冲突可能升级。}
content_en: "Recently, tensions have been rising between the Orc tribes and the human towns. Conflict might escalate."

content: {哦？我怎么没注意到？}
content_en: "Oh? How come I didn't notice?"

content: {我觉得你能帮忙缓和这种紧张。}
content_en: "I think you could help ease these tensions."

content: {我？一个兽人？}
content_en: "Me? An Orc?"

content: {正因为你是兽人，但又和我这个中立者友好，可以游走两方之间。}
content_en: "Precisely because you are an Orc, yet friendly with a neutral party like me, you can move between both sides."

content: {游走两方？什么意思？}
content_en: "Move between both sides? What do you mean?"

content: {就是传递信息，帮助双方理解彼此，避免误会。}
content_en: "Carry messages, help both sides understand each other, and prevent misunderstandings."

content: {听起来像间谍活动，好玩！}
content_en: "Sounds like spy work! Fun!"

content: {不，是和平的桥梁，需要谨慎。}
content_en: "No, it's a bridge for peace. It requires caution."

content: {尤蕾拉，这很重要。}
content_en: "Eurella, this is very important."

content: {不过，我一个人可能不够哦。}
content_en: "But, I might not be enough on my own."

content: {我知道。}
content_en: "I know."

content: {好吧，我答应你。反正我也无聊了。}
content_en: "Alright, I'll do it. I'm bored anyway."

content: {局势很复杂，兽人部落内部也有分歧。}
content_en: "The situation is complex. There are divisions even within the Orc tribes."

content: {比如哪些分歧？}
content_en: "Like what divisions?"

content: {有些兽人主张强硬，有些希望和平，就像你的朋友露卡那样。}
content_en: "Some Orcs advocate a hardline approach, while others hope for peace, like your friend Luka."

content: {露卡？她确实总说人类食物好吃！}
content_en: "Luka? She's always saying how delicious human food is!"

content: {是的，她正在人类城镇做类似的事。}
content_en: "Yes, she's already doing similar work in the human towns."

content: {那我该从哪里开始？}
content_en: "Then where should I start?"

content: {先从了解兽人部落的动向开始，悄悄收集信息。}
content_en: "Start by understanding the movements within the Orc tribes. Gather information quietly."

content: {这个我擅长！}
content_en: "I'm good at that!"

content: {但记住，要小心，别引起冲突。}
content_en: "But remember, be careful. Don't provoke conflict."

content: {放心，我可是隐藏高手！}
content_en: "Don't worry, I'm a master of stealth!"

content: {另外，人类那边也可能有误解兽人的地方。}
content_en: "Also, there might be misunderstandings about Orcs on the human side as well."

content: {比如觉得我们都很凶？}
content_en: "Like thinking we're all fierce?"

content: {没错，你需要展示兽人友好的一面。}
content_en: "Exactly. You need to show the friendly side of Orcs."

content: {就像我对你这样？虽然一开始是恶作剧。}
content_en: "Like how I am with you? Even though it started with pranks."

content: {对，你的天真能化解敌意。}
content_en: "Right. Your innocence can dissolve hostility."

content: {好，我明天就去兽人部落看看。}
content_en: "Okay! I'll go check out the Orc tribes tomorrow."

content: {不急，先计划一下。局势可能危险。}
content_en: "No rush. Let's make a plan first. The situation could be dangerous."

content: {没关系，我有兽人的勇气！}
content_en: "It's fine! I have the courage of an Orc!"

content: {尤蕾拉，你的热情让我欣慰。}
content_en: Eurella, your enthusiasm heartens me.

content: {如果你遇到麻烦，随时回来找我。}
content_en: If you encounter any trouble, come back to me anytime.

content: {知道啦！}
content_en: Got it!

content: {嘿嘿，那就说定了！}
content_en: Hehe, it's a deal then!

content: {尤蕾拉答应帮忙后，你们又详细讨论了初步的行动计划。几天后，她兴冲冲地再次找到你。}
content_en: After Eurella agreed to help, you discussed the initial action plan in detail. A few days later, she eagerly found you again.

content: {喂！我想到一个好主意！}
content_en: "Hey! I've thought of a great idea!"

content: {什么好主意？}
content_en: "What great idea?"

content: {光靠我一个人跑来跑去，效率太低了！我有个朋友，她肯定能帮上忙！}
content_en: "Just me running back and forth alone isn't very efficient! I have a friend who could definitely help!"

content: {朋友？}
content_en: "A friend?"

content: {对！她叫露卡，可厉害了！她一直在人类城镇和兽人部落之间来往，懂得可多了！}
content_en: "Yes! Her name is Luka! She's amazing! She's been moving between human towns and Orc tribes and knows a lot!"

content: {听起来是个很合适的人选。}
content_en: "She sounds like a suitable candidate."

content: {我们去找她吧？她现在应该就在灰岩镇附近练习射箭！}
content_en: "Shall we go find her? She should be near Greyrock Town practicing archery right now!"

content: {你欣然同意，跟随尤蕾拉来到镇外的一座小山坡，果然看到一位身手矫健的兽人少女正在练习箭术。}
content_en: You readily agreed and followed Eurella to a small hill outside the town. Sure enough, you saw an agile beastkin girl practicing archery.

content: {露卡！看我带谁来了！}
content_en: "Luka! Look who I brought!"

content: {尤蕾拉？这位是……？}
content_en: "Eurella? And this is...?"

content: {你好，露卡。我是这座城市的城主。}
content_en: "Hello, Luka. I am the Lord of this city."

content: {城主大人？尤蕾拉常常提起您。请问找我有事吗？}
content_en: "Lord? Eurella often mentions you. Do you need something from me?"

content: {是的。关于目前人类与兽人之间的紧张局势，我希望能够得到你的帮助。}
content_en: "Yes. Regarding the current tensions between humans and Orcs, I was hoping for your assistance."

content: {局势……我确实有所察觉。最近两边的关系越来越紧张了。}
content_en: "The situation... I have indeed noticed. Relations between the two sides have been growing increasingly tense lately."

content: {露卡可厉害了！她在人类城镇很受欢迎，大家都喜欢她！}
content_en: "Luka is incredible! She's very popular in human towns. Everyone likes her!"

content: {我只是分享一些兽人的狩猎技巧和美食而已。我一直希望两个族群能够和平共处。}
content_en: "I just share some Orc hunting techniques and cuisine. I've always hoped the two races could coexist peacefully."

content: {这正是我来找你的原因。我希望能与兽人部落展开和谈，避免冲突升级。尤蕾拉认为你可以成为我们之间的桥梁。}
content_en: "That is precisely why I've come to you. I wish to initiate peace talks with the Orc tribes to prevent the conflict from escalating. Eurella believes you could be a bridge between us."

content: {和谈吗？这确实比小打小闹的交流更重要。我愿意帮忙。}
content_en: "Peace talks? That is indeed more significant than small-scale exchanges. I am willing to help."

content: {太好了！我们三个一起行动，肯定能成功！}
content_en: "Excellent! The three of us working together are sure to succeed!"

content: {为了表示诚意，我希望能亲自参与谈判。}
content_en: "To show sincerity, I hope to personally participate in the negotiations."

content: {您亲自出面？这确实能展现最大的诚意。人类城主主动寻求和平，兽人长老们应该会认真考虑。}
content_en: "You personally? That would indeed demonstrate the utmost sincerity. A human Lord actively seeking peace would likely make the Orc elders consider it seriously."

content: {是的。但我对兽人的习俗和谈判方式了解有限，需要你们的协助。}
content_en: "Yes. But my understanding of Orc customs and negotiation methods is limited. I need your assistance."

content: {这个包在我身上。我可以先带您拜访几位相对温和的兽人长老，试探他们的态度。}
content_en: "Leave that to me. I can first take you to visit a few relatively moderate Orc elders to gauge their attitude."

content: {我也可以先去部落里散布消息，让大家知道城主是带着善意来的！}
content_en: "I can also go spread the word in the tribes first, letting everyone know the Lord comes with goodwill!"

content: {很好的分工。那么，我们该如何开始？}
content_en: "Good division of labor. So, how should we begin?"

content: {首先，我们需要准备一些见面礼。兽人部落重视礼节，合适的礼物是良好沟通的开始。}
content_en: "First, we need to prepare some gifts. Orc tribes value etiquette. Appropriate gifts are a good start to communication."

content: {我知道！部落的长老们很喜欢云海特产的星光草和蜂蜜！}
content_en: "I know! The tribe elders really like Starlight Grass and honey from the Cloudsea region!"

content: {没错。另外，我也准备了一些自己制作的弓箭和兽皮工艺品，可以作为礼物。}
content_en: "Correct. Also, I have some self-made bows and leather crafts that can serve as gifts."

content: {我会准备一些代表人类善意的礼物，比如粮食种子和药品。}
content_en: "I will prepare gifts representing human goodwill, such as grain seeds and medicine."

content: {这样组合起来就非常周全了。那么，我们三天后在这里集合，然后一起前往兽人部落如何？}
content_en: "That combination is very thoughtful. So, shall we meet back here in three days, then proceed to the Orc tribe together?"

content: {好的。感谢你的加入，露卡。有你们的帮助，我对和平的前景更有信心了。}
content_en: "Agreed. Thank you for joining, Luka. With your help, I am more confident about the prospects for peace."

content: {这也是我的愿望。尤蕾拉，我们分头去准备吧。}
content_en: "This is my wish as well. Eurella, let's go prepare separately."

content: {嗯！我已经开始期待这次冒险了！}
content_en: "Mm! I'm already looking forward to this adventure!"

content: {看着眼前两位充满活力的兽人少女，你感到一丝希望。或许通过共同努力，和平真的能够实现。}
content_en: Looking at the two energetic beastkin girls before you, you felt a glimmer of hope. Perhaps through joint efforts, peace could truly be achieved.

content: {次日清晨，你站在书房窗前，望着庭院中逐渐忙碌起来的景象，心中对即将到来的旅程既期待又忐忑。达菲、莉莉丝和阿古丽娅准时前来，脸上都带着询问的神色。}
content_en: The next morning, you stood by the study window, watching the gradually bustling scene in the courtyard, feeling both anticipation and unease about the upcoming journey. Duffy, Lilith, and Aguria arrived on time, their faces bearing questioning looks.

content: {感谢各位前来。我有一件重要的事想商议。}
content_en: "Thank you all for coming. There is an important matter I wish to discuss."

content: {你这么早叫我们来，是出了什么事吗？}
content_en: "You called us here so early. Has something happened?"

content: {哼，肯定又是那些麻烦的政务吧？我还没睡醒呢。}
content_en: "Hmph, it must be more troublesome official business, right? I'm not even fully awake yet."

content: {请直接说吧，曙光骑士团随时待命。}
content_en: "Please speak directly. The Dawn Knight Order are ready."

content: {我决定亲自前往，与兽人部落进行谈和。}
content_en: "I have decided to go personally to negotiate peace with the Orc tribes."

content: {什么？你要亲自去？这太危险了！}
content_en: "What? You're going personally? That's far too dangerous!"

content: {哦？有趣。那些家伙可不好对付，你确定吗？}
content_en: "Oh? Interesting. Those guys aren't easy to deal with. Are you sure?"

content: {是的，和平需要诚意，我作为城主必须出面。}
content_en: "Yes. Peace requires sincerity. As the Lord, I must show my face."

content: {可是……你的安全怎么办？那里局势不稳定，冲突刚发生过。}
content_en: "But... what about your safety? The situation there is unstable; conflicts just occurred."

content: {我理解你的决心，但谈和之事可以交给经验丰富的外交官。}
content_en: "I understand your resolve, Lord, but peace talks could be entrusted to experienced diplomats."

content: {尼可尔虽然优秀，但这次需要更高级别的代表，才能显示出我们的诚意。}
content_en: Nicole is indeed capable, but this time we need a higher-level representative to truly show our sincerity.

content: {我……我觉得你不该冒险。但如果你坚持，我会支持。}
content_en: I... I still think you shouldn't take the risk. But if you insist, I'll support you.

content: {支支吾吾什么？达菲，你总是这么犹豫。你，我也要去！}
content_en: Hesitating about what, Duffy? You're always so indecisive. You! I'm going too!

content: {莉莉丝，你没必要卷入这种事务。}
content_en: Lilith, you don't need to get involved in this kind of affair.

content: {怎么？嫌我碍事？我可是你的魔法顾问，我的幻术和探测魔法能帮上大忙。}
content_en: What? Think I'm in the way? I'm your magical advisor. My illusions and detection magic can be of great help.

content: {莉莉丝，这不是儿戏。请你三思。}
content_en: Lilith, this isn't a game. Please reconsider.

content: {阿古丽娅，我知道你担心，但这是必要的。只有我亲自去，才能打破邻国散布的谣言。}
content_en: Aguria, I know you're concerned, but this is necessary. Only by going personally can I break the rumors spread by the neighboring country.

content: {你还记得老城主的教导吗？安全第一。万一这是陷阱……}
content_en: Do you remember the old Lord's teaching? Safety first. What if this is a trap...

content: {达菲，别拿老家伙说事。我的魔法能保护他，至少比某些只会挥舞长剑的人灵活。}
content_en: Duffy, don't bring the old man into this. My magic can protect him—it's at least more flexible than someone who only knows how to swing a longsword.

content: {如果你执意要去，请允许我带领骑士团精锐护送。这是底线。}
content_en: If you insist on going, please allow me to lead an elite Knight escort. That is my bottom line.

content: {阿古丽娅，我不想动用太多兵力，以免引起兽人方的误解和紧张。}
content_en: Aguria, I don't want to deploy too many troops to avoid misunderstanding and tension from the Orc side.

content: {不！我必须坚持。谈和路上可能有埋伏，邻国的探子无处不在。我不能让你独自涉险。}
content_en: No! I must insist. The peace talks route might have ambushes; spies from the neighboring country are everywhere. I cannot let you walk into danger alone.

content: {阿古丽娅团长说得对，你不能独自行动。至少……至少要让可靠的人跟着。}
content_en: Captain Aguria is right. You can't go alone. At the very least... at least have reliable people accompany you.

content: {喂，你们别吵了。这样吧，我们一起去。阿古丽娅带一小队精锐明着护卫，我用魔法在暗处策应。这样既能保证安全，也不至于显得声势浩大。}
content_en: Hey, stop arguing. How about this: we all go together. Aguria provides an open escort with a small elite team, and I'll support from the shadows with magic. That way, we ensure safety without appearing overly imposing.

content: {莉莉丝，你的能力我很欣赏，但……}
content_en: Lilith, I appreciate your abilities, but...

content: {这个方案……可以考虑。我会只挑选尼可尔、奥兰多等少数几人，他们擅长侦察和外交，能够低调行事。}
content_en: This plan... is worth considering. I will only select a few, like Nicole and Orlando. They excel in reconnaissance and diplomacy and can operate discreetly.

content: {尼可尔？她很厉害……但你真要去吗？我还是不放心。}
content_en: Nicole? She's very capable... But are you really going? I'm still uneasy.

content: {达菲，你刚才说支持我的，现在又动摇了？}
content_en: Duffy, you just said you'd support me. Are you wavering now?

content: {不是动摇！我只是……担心。但我会帮你们准备行装和必需物资。}
content_en: Not wavering! I'm just... worried. But I'll help prepare your gear and necessary supplies.

content: {达菲，别啰嗦了。你，快决定吧。时间不等人。}
content_en: Duffy, stop dithering. You, make a decision. Time won't wait.

content: {时间紧迫。如果你同意这个联合方案，我立刻就去集结队员，明天清晨即可出发。}
content_en: Time is short. If you agree to this joint plan, I'll immediately assemble the team. We can depart at dawn tomorrow.

content: {看来这是最优解了。好吧，阿古丽娅，我同意你带领精锐同行。莉莉丝，也麻烦你一起了。}
content_en: It seems this is the optimal solution. Very well, Aguria, I agree to have you lead the elite escort. Lilith, your assistance is also appreciated.

content: {哼，这还差不多。记住，你又欠我一个人情。}
content_en: Hmph, that's more like it. Remember, you owe me another favor.

content: {谢谢你！我会确保万无一失。我这就去安排路线和防卫计划。}
content_en: Thank you! I will ensure everything is foolproof. I'll go arrange the route and defense plan now.

content: {我会通知后勤准备物资和补给。但你们一定要小心，随时保持联络。}
content_en: I'll notify logistics to prepare supplies and provisions. But you must be careful and maintain communication at all times.

content: {达菲，感谢你的支持。我知道你一直很可靠。城堡这边就拜托你了。}
content_en: Duffy, thank you for your support. I know you've always been reliable. I leave the castle in your care.

content: {这是我该做的。你一定要平安回来。}
content_en: It's my duty. You must come back safely.

content: {放心，有我在，没人能伤到他。倒是你，阿古丽娅，你的骑士们可别拖后腿。}
content_en: Don't worry. With me here, no one can harm him. More importantly, Aguria, don't let your knights hold us back.

content: {莉莉丝，做好你分内的事。我的队员个个都是好手。那么，我们分头准备吧。}
content_en: Lilith, focus on your own responsibilities. Every member of my team is highly skilled. Then, let's prepare separately.

content: {你看着三人虽然争执但最终达成共识，心中稍安。你知道这次旅程充满未知，但为了和平，这一步必须迈出。}
content_en: You watched as the three, despite their disputes, finally reached a consensus, feeling somewhat relieved. You knew this journey was full of unknowns, but for peace, this step had to be taken.

content: {次日清晨，城堡广场上已是人头攒动。你与阿古丽娅并肩走出，看到达菲、莉莉丝以及曙光骑士团的成员们早已在此等候。}
content_en: The next morning, the castle square was already bustling with activity. You walked out side by side with Aguria and saw Duffy, Lilith, and the members of the Dawn Knight Order already waiting.

content: {一切准备就绪，就等你们了。}
content_en: "Everything is ready. Just waiting for you."

content: {我们来了！没迟到吧？}
content_en: "We're here! Not late, are we?"

content: {路上清理了一点小障碍，所以耽搁了片刻。}
content_en: "We cleared a minor obstacle on the way, so we were slightly delayed."

content: {时间刚好。}
content_en: "Timing is perfect."

content: {尤蕾拉，露卡，归队。}
content_en: "Eurella, Luka, fall in."

content: {哼，每次都这么毛躁，就不能更稳妥些吗？}
content_en: "Hmph, always so reckless. Can't you be more careful?"

content: {达菲姐姐别生气嘛，你看，我特意给你摘了最新鲜的星星草！}
content_en: "Don't be mad, Sister Duffy! Look, I picked the freshest star grass for you!"

content: {谁、谁要你的草啊！……不过还是谢谢了。}
content_en: "Wh-who wants your grass! ... But thank you anyway."

content: {报告团长，人员已清点完毕，可以出发了。}
content_en: "Reporting, Captain. All personnel accounted for. Ready to depart."

content: {希娜伽，我们离开期间，骑士团的日常事务就交由你全权负责。}
content_en: "Synaga, while we're away, you are fully responsible for the Knights' daily affairs."

content: {明白，请放心。}
content_en: "Understood. Please rest assured."

content: {团长，请务必保重。}
content_en: "Captain, please take care of yourself."

content: {阿古丽娅，凡事别太勉强，安全第一。}
content_en: "Aguria, don't push yourself too hard. Safety first."

content: {谢谢你们，我会的。}
content_en: "Thank you. I will."

content: {克丽奥娜与海芙约特已经按计划先行一步了。}
content_en: "Cliodna and Herfjotur have already set off ahead of schedule as planned."

content: {也就是说，我们这一路是直奔兽人部落进行和谈？}
content_en: "So, we are heading directly to the Orc tribe for peace talks?"

content: {是的，这次任务的核心就在于此。}
content_en: "Yes. That is the core mission this time."

content: {嘿嘿，有我和露卡在，肯定能让那些长老们坐下来好好谈！}
content_en: "Hehe, with me and Luka here, we'll definitely get those elders to sit down and talk properly!"

content: {尤蕾拉，切记以大局为重，可别又突发奇想搞什么恶作剧。}
content_en: "Eurella, remember to prioritize the overall situation. Don't suddenly get any mischievous ideas about pulling pranks."

content: {达菲姐姐你也太不信任我啦！}
content_en: Sister Duffy, you really don't trust me!

content: {尤蕾拉近期表现确实可靠，我相信她。}
content_en: Eurella has indeed been reliable lately. I believe in her.

content: {是啊，她最近可是做了不少功课呢。}
content_en: Yes, she's done quite a bit of homework recently.

content: {所有物资和马匹都已备妥，就在门外。}
content_en: All supplies and horses are ready, right outside.

content: {达菲，城内政务就辛苦你了。}
content_en: Duffy, the city's affairs will be a burden on you.

content: {请你放心，我一定会处理妥当。}
content_en: Please rest assured, I will handle everything properly.

content: {城主，这个护符请您带上，其中附有防护能量，或许能派上用场。}
content_en: Lord, please take this talisman. It contains protective energy and might come in handy.

content: {多谢你，塞蕾娜。}
content_en: Thank you, Serena.

content: {阿古丽娅，这个治愈宝石你带着，以备不时之需。}
content_en: Aguria, take this healing gem with you, just in case.

content: {伊莎贝尔，还是你想得周到。}
content_en: Isabelle, you're always so thoughtful.

content: {少来这套，完整归队就是最好的感谢。}
content_en: Cut it out. The best thanks is everyone returning safely.

content: {露卡！等到了下一个镇子，我们去尝尝那里特产的蜂蜜馅饼吧！}
content_en: Luka! When we reach the next town, let's try their special honey pie!

content: {先专注任务！……不过，如果一切顺利，倒也不是不行……}
content_en: Focus on the mission first! ...But, if everything goes smoothly, it might be possible...

content: {各位，出发前还有任何问题吗？}
content_en: Everyone, any last questions before we depart?

content: {边境区域近来不太平静，推测可能有零星伏击，请务必谨慎行事。}
content_en: The border region has been unsettled lately, and sporadic ambushes are anticipated. Please proceed with utmost caution.

content: {我们已规划好路线，会尽量避开主干道，选择相对隐蔽的小路。}
content_en: We have planned our route to avoid main roads as much as possible, opting for relatively hidden paths.

content: {请你……一定要平安回来。}
content_en: Please... you must return safely.

content: {别担心，达菲。有这么多可靠的伙伴同行。}
content_en: Don't worry, Duffy. With so many reliable companions by my side.

content: {就是！达菲姐姐，我会保护好他的！}
content_en: Exactly! Sister Duffy, I'll protect him!

content: {你呀，先保证自己别闯祸就好啦！}
content_en: You just make sure you don't cause any trouble yourself!

content: {时间不早了，我们该动身了。}
content_en: It's getting late. We should set off.

content: {好。曙光骑士团，暂别！}
content_en: Alright. Dawn Knight Order, for now, farewell!

content: {愿光明指引你们的道路。}
content_en: May the Light guide your path.

content: {期待你们凯旋的好消息。}
content_en: We look forward to good news of your triumphant return.

content: {阿古丽娅，记住我说的话。}
content_en: Aguria, remember what I said.

content: {知道啦，你们也多保重。}
content_en: I know. You all take care too.

content: {开门吧，我们出发。}
content_en: Open the gates. Let's depart.

content: {众人推开城堡厚重的大门，门外的送行队伍分立两侧。}
content_en: The group pushed open the castle's heavy gates. Outside, the farewell party lined both sides.

content: {一路顺风！}
content_en: Have a safe journey!

content: {我们会每日通过信鸽保持联络。}
content_en: We will maintain daily contact via carrier pigeons.

content: {有劳各位了。}
content_en: We appreciate your efforts.

content: {哇，大家都来送我们啦！}
content_en: Wow, everyone came to see us off!

content: {保持仪态，尤蕾拉，我们代表的是城邦的形象。}
content_en: Maintain decorum, Eurella. We represent the city-state's image.

content: {尤蕾拉，露卡，跟上队伍。}
content_en: Eurella, Luka, keep up with the formation.

content: {达菲，这里就交给你了。}
content_en: Duffy, I leave this place to you.

content: {是！请你放心！}
content_en: Yes! Please be at ease!

content: {团长，若遇到复杂的能量扰动，随时可以联系我。}
content_en: Captain, if you encounter complex energy disturbances, feel free to contact me at any time.

content: {好的，塞蕾娜，谢谢你。}
content_en: Understood, Serena. Thank you.

content: {早点回来，庆功宴的酒我包了。}
content_en: Come back soon. I'll cover the drinks for the victory banquet.

content: {庆功宴！我要吃好多好多烤肉！}
content_en: A victory banquet! I want to eat lots and lots of roasted meat!

content: {尤蕾拉……注意力集中！}
content_en: Eurella... stay focused!

content: {各位，就此别过。}
content_en: Everyone, this is goodbye.

content: {全体出发！}
content_en: All units, move out!

content: {小队成员们迈着坚定的步伐踏上征程，身后是送行人群挥动的手臂与殷切的目送。}
content_en: The squad members set off with determined strides, behind them the waving arms and earnest gazes of the seeing-off crowd.

content: {一定要平安啊……}
content_en: You must be safe...

content: {我们回去吧，还有许多公务需要处理。}
content_en: Let's return. There's still much official business to attend to.

content: {伊莎贝尔，我们该去训练场了。}
content_en: Isabelle, we should head to the training grounds.

content: {嗯，走吧。}
content_en: Yes, let's go.

content: {小队沿着边境小路沉默地行进，四周的景色愈发荒凉，枯萎的田野和废弃的村舍无声地诉说着战乱的创伤}
content_en: The squad moved in silence along the border path. The surrounding scenery grew increasingly desolate. Withered fields and abandoned cottages silently spoke of the scars of war.

content: {这里就是屡次挑衅的邻国边境吗？比我想象的还要凋敝}
content_en: Is this the border of the neighboring country that has repeatedly provoked us? It's even more desolate than I imagined.

content: {嗯，连年的摩擦和冲突，让这片土地饱受摧残}
content_en: Indeed. Years of friction and conflict have ravaged this land.

content: {草木枯萎，村庄废弃，几乎看不到人烟…太凄惨了}
content_en: The plants are withered, villages abandoned, barely any sign of human habitation... It's truly tragic.

content: {你心情很低落啊}
content_en: You seem quite downcast.

content: {看到普通百姓因为争斗而流离失所，难免感到沉重}
content_en: Seeing ordinary people displaced by strife inevitably weighs heavily on the heart.

content: {哼，你倒是越来越像个心软的老好人了}
content_en: Hmph, you're becoming more and more like a soft-hearted do-gooder.

content: {莉莉丝，你觉得我们这次的和谈，真能改变这里的现状吗？}
content_en: Lilith, do you really think our peace talks this time can change the situation here?

content: {总比继续打仗要强。但光靠一纸协议远远不够}
content_en: It's better than continuing to fight. But a mere agreement on paper is far from enough.

content: {我真心希望兽人和人类能够和平共存，就像尤蕾拉和露卡那样，打破隔阂}
content_en: I sincerely hope Orcs and humans can coexist peacefully, breaking down barriers like Eurella and Luka do.

content: {理想很美好，但现实往往复杂得多。仇恨和猜忌不是一朝一夕能化解的}
content_en: The ideal is beautiful, but reality is often much more complex. Hatred and suspicion can't be resolved overnight.

content: {你说得对，但总要有人迈出第一步去尝试}
content_en: You're right. But someone has to take the first step and try.

content: {别一直愁眉苦脸的，放松点，我给你讲个故事吧}
content_en: Don't keep frowning like that. Relax, I'll tell you a story.

content: {故事？}
content_en: A story?

content: {关于一个叫夏蒂的女孩的故事}
content_en: About a girl named Shady.

content: {夏蒂？我没听说过这个名字，她是谁？}
content_en: Shady? I haven't heard that name. Who is she?

content: {她曾经就住在这附近，是个很普通的人类孩子}
content_en: She used to live around here, just an ordinary human child.

content: {后来发生了什么？}
content_en: What happened later?

content: {战争爆发的时候，她不顾危险，独自照顾那些受伤的兽人难民}
content_en: When war broke out, she risked danger to care for injured Orc refugees all by herself.

content: {兽人难民？在人类聚居区？}
content_en: Orc refugees? In a human settlement area?

content: {是啊，她顶着族人的反对和斥骂，偷偷给藏身在树林里的兽人送食物和药草}
content_en: Yes. Despite opposition and condemnation from her own people, she secretly delivered food and herbs to Orcs hiding in the woods.

content: {她为什么要这么做？}
content_en: Why would she do that?

content: {她说兽人也是活生生的生命，不该被无端的仇恨牵连和迫害}
content_en: She said Orcs were living beings too and shouldn't be caught up in baseless hatred and persecution.

content: {真是个勇敢的孩子}
content_en: What a brave child.

content: {后来她被村里人发现并驱赶，不得不离开家乡四处流浪}
content_en: Later, she was discovered and driven out by the villagers, forced to leave her hometown and wander.

content: {结果怎么样？}
content_en: What happened in the end?

content: {她最后在这片边境地带开垦了一小块菜园，靠种植作物养活那些路过的、无家可归的人}
content_en: She eventually cleared a small vegetable garden in this border area, growing crops to feed those who passed by, the homeless and displaced.

content: {包括兽人？}
content_en: Including Orcs?

content: {对，无论是兽人、人类，还是其他种族，只要需要帮助，她都会伸出援手}
content_en: Yes. Whether they were Orcs, humans, or other races, if they needed help, she would extend a hand.

content: {那她现在在哪里？}
content_en: Where is she now?

content: {去年冬天病逝了。但那个菜园还在，听说一直有人接着打理，延续着她的善举}
content_en: She passed away from illness last winter. But that garden remains. I heard someone has been maintaining it, continuing her good work.

content: {真是个善良的人…即使在乱世中也坚守着内心的光}
content_en: What a kind person... holding onto the light within even in tumultuous times.

content: {所以别太灰心，世界上总还是存在像夏蒂这样的人，默默无闻地维系着希望}
content_en: So don't lose heart too much. There are always people like Shady in the world, quietly sustaining hope.

content: {谢谢你，莉莉丝，这个故事让我心里好受了一些}
content_en: Thank you, Lilith. This story has made me feel a bit better.

content: {哼，我只是不想看你一直垮着脸，影响队伍士气}
content_en: Hmph, I just didn't want to see you moping around, affecting the team's morale.

content: {但我确实更加坚定要和谈的决心了}
content_en: But I am indeed more determined to proceed with the peace talks.

content: {那就好。不过前面的路还长着呢，挑战只会更多}
content_en: That's good. But the road ahead is still long. The challenges will only increase.

content: {你偶尔也会说点鼓舞人心的话嘛}
content_en: You occasionally say something uplifting too.

content: {谁、谁特意安慰你了！我只是…只是刚好想到这个故事而已！}
content_en: Wh-who's specifically comforting you! I just... happened to remember this story!

content: {不管怎样，还是谢谢你}
content_en: Regardless, thank you.

content: {快走吧，天色不早了，得抓紧时间赶路}
content_en: Let's keep moving. It's getting late. We need to make time.

content: {夏蒂的故事让我相信，善良和勇气确实能够跨越种族和仇恨的隔阂}
content_en: Shady's story makes me believe that kindness and courage can indeed cross the barriers of race and hatred.

content: {没错，但光有善良不够，还需要有保护这份善良的实力和智慧}
content_en: Correct. But kindness alone isn't enough. You also need the strength and wisdom to protect that kindness.

content: {我会用行动证明和平的可能性和价值}
content_en: I will prove the possibility and value of peace through action.

content: {这才像话，像是我愿意追随的盟友}
content_en: Now that's more like it. More like an ally I'm willing to follow.

content: {莉莉丝，等这次任务结束，我们多花些精力来帮助边境的百姓重建家园吧}
content_en: Lilith, after this mission is over, let's devote more effort to helping the border people rebuild their homes.

content: {随你便，反正我到时候跟着凑凑热闹就是了}
content_en: As you wish. I'll just tag along for the fun anyway.

content: {你其实也很关心这片土地和这里的人吧？}
content_en: You actually care about this land and its people too, don't you?

content: {少胡说！我只是…只是对这片土地下可能埋藏的古代宝石感兴趣，顺便看看而已！}
content_en: Stop talking nonsense! I'm just... just interested in the ancient gems that might be buried under this land! And looking around is just incidental!

content: {好，好，我不说了}
content_en: Alright, alright, I won't say more.

content: {不过…如果你真打算做点实事，我倒是可以出点力}
content_en: But... if you're really planning to do something substantial, I suppose I could contribute a little.

content: {那就说定了}
content_en: It's a deal then.

content: {前提是你能成功完成这次和谈任务}
content_en: Provided you successfully complete this peace negotiation mission.

content: {有尤蕾拉和露卡协助，我有信心}
content_en: With Eurella and Luka assisting, I have confidence.

content: {但愿如此吧}
content_en: I hope so.

content: {看，前面似乎有炊烟，可能还有住户}
content_en: Look, there seems to be smoke from a chimney ahead. There might still be residents.

content: {过去看看吧，但务必保持警惕}
content_en: Let's go take a look, but remain vigilant.

content: {嗯，继续前进}
content_en: Yes, let's continue.

content: {记住夏蒂的故事，别被残酷的现实压垮了意志}
content_en: Remember Shady's story. Don't let the harsh reality crush your spirit.

content: {我会的。为了让更多人能拥有安稳的生活和微笑的未来}
content_en: I will. So that more people can have stable lives and a future with smiles.

content: {尽是些天真的傻话…不过，我并不讨厌}
content_en: Such naive, foolish talk... But I don't dislike it.

content: {我们走吧，莉莉丝}
content_en: Let's go, Lilith.

content: {跟紧了，别掉队}
content_en: Keep up. Don't fall behind.

content: {小队行进数日，抵达一个偏僻但宁静的小村庄，决定在此休整}
content_en: The squad traveled for several days and arrived at a remote but tranquil small village, deciding to rest there.

content: {大家辛苦了，我们在这里停留两日，恢复体力}
content_en: "Everyone, well done. We'll stay here for two days to recuperate."

content: {好的，村长已经为我们安排了住处}
content_en: "Understood. The village chief has arranged accommodation for us."

content: {太好了！终于可以不用睡帐篷了！}
content_en: "Great! Finally, no more sleeping in tents!"

content: {尤蕾拉，别光想着玩，记得检查装备}
content_en: "Eurella, don't just think about playing. Remember to check your gear."

content: {这村子真小，希望有像样的食材}
content_en: "This village is so small. I hope they have decent ingredients."

content: {几日来，你与队员在村中树下商议时，总感觉有视线追随}
content_en: For several days, while you and the team were discussing matters under a tree in the village, you kept feeling a gaze following you.

content: {你们有没有觉得，好像有人在看着我们？}
content_en: "Do any of you feel like someone is watching us?"

content: {我也隐约有所察觉，但每次望去都没发现异常}
content_en: "I've had a vague sense of it too, but never see anything when I look."

content: {诶？有吗？我怎么没发现？是不是小动物？}
content_en: "Huh? Really? I haven't noticed! Maybe it's a little animal?"

content: {不像动物，更像是个……}
content_en: "Doesn't feel like an animal. More like a..."

content: {哼，需要我把她揪出来吗？一个小法术的事}
content_en: "Hmph, want me to flush them out? A simple spell would do."

content: {不必，或许只是好奇的村民。我们继续}
content_en: "No need. It might just be a curious villager. Let's continue."

content: {又一次讨论时，你眼角瞥见一个纤细的身影迅速躲到屋后}
content_en: During another discussion, you caught a glimpse of a slender figure quickly ducking behind a house out of the corner of your eye.

content: {又来了。这次我去看看}
content_en: "Again. This time, I'll take a look."

content: {城主，小心为上}
content_en: "Lord, be careful."

content: {放心，我没有感到恶意}
content_en: "Don't worry. I don't sense any malice."

content: {你走向屋后，却发现空无一人}
content_en: You walked behind the house but found no one there.

content: {动作真快……就像一阵风}
content_en: "So fast... like the wind."

content: {城主城主！你找到什么了吗？}
content_en: "Lord, Lord! Did you find anything?"

content: {没有，她溜走了。看来我们被一位神秘的朋友关注了}
content_en: "No, they slipped away. It seems we have a mysterious friend keeping an eye on us."

content: {需要我守在附近吗？我的弓箭可以确保安全距离}
content_en: "Shall I keep watch nearby? My arrows can ensure safety from a distance."

content: {暂时不用。我倒想看看，她究竟想做什么}
content_en: "Not for now. I'd like to see what they're up to."

content: {随你便，但别耽误正事}
content_en: "Suit yourself. But don't delay our main task."

content: {次日，你故意在同一地点与阿古丽娅交谈，余光留意着周围}
content_en: The next day, you deliberately spoke with Aguria at the same spot, keeping an eye on your surroundings.

content: {阿古丽娅，关于接近兽人部落的路线……}
content_en: "Aguria, regarding the route to approach the Orc tribe..."

content: {是，我认为从东侧山谷穿行更为隐蔽}
content_en: "Yes, I believe passing through the eastern valley is more concealed."

content: {你低声说道}
content_en: You whispered,

content: {她来了，就在那堆干草后面}
content_en: She's here. Behind that pile of hay.

content: {我看到了，是个小姑娘。要我去请她过来吗？}
content_en: "I see her. It's a young girl. Should I invite her over?"

content: {不，这次我来。你们继续说话，吸引她注意}
content_en: "No, I'll handle it this time. Keep talking to draw her attention."

content: {你悄悄绕向干草堆后方}
content_en: You quietly circled around to the back of the haystack.

content: {哇！城主你要去抓她吗？带上我！}
content_en: "Wow! Lord, are you going to catch her? Take me!"

content: {尤蕾拉，安静！别吓跑她}
content_en: "Eurella, quiet! Don't scare her off."

content: {啧，真麻烦}
content_en: "Tch, what a hassle."

content: {你靠近干草堆，却只看到一件旧斗篷挂在木叉上}
content_en: You approached the haystack, but only saw an old cloak hanging on a wooden post.

content: {又让她跑了……真是个机灵的小家伙}
content_en: "She got away again... What a clever little one."

content: {她对我们的行动似乎非常了解，总能提前避开}
content_en: "She seems to know our movements very well, always avoiding us in advance."

content: {看来，我们得换个方法了。今晚，我就在这儿等她}
content_en: It seems we need to change our approach. Tonight, I'll wait for her here.

content: {你决定在干草堆附近设置一个简单的陷阱，但并非为了捕捉，而是为了制造一次对话机会}
content_en: You decided to set a simple trap near the haystack—not to capture, but to create an opportunity for dialogue.

content: {喂，你可别把事情搞复杂了}
content_en: "Hey, don't complicate things."

content: {我只是想和她和平交流，毕竟她可能知道一些边境的情报}
content_en: "I just want to talk to her peacefully. She might have information about the border."

content: {城主，晚上我可以陪你一起等吗？我保证不吵闹！}
content_en: "Lord, can I wait with you tonight? I promise I won't make noise!"

content: {尤蕾拉，你还是留下来帮忙警戒营地吧}
content_en: "Eurella, you should stay and help guard the camp."

content: {城主，需要我安排轮班值守吗？}
content_en: "Lord, should I arrange a rotating watch?"

content: {不用，我独自等待就好。大家先回去休息，保持警惕}
content_en: "No need. I'll wait alone. Everyone else, go back and rest. Stay alert."

content: {夜幕降临，你独自坐在干草堆旁，静静等待那位神秘女孩的出现}
content_en: Night fell, and you sat alone by the haystack, quietly waiting for the mysterious girl to appear.

content: {干草堆旁笼罩在夜色中，你独自坐在石阶上，耐心等待。你设置的简单陷阱并未触发，但你感觉到她的接近。}
content_en: Bathed in the night beside the haystack, you sat patiently on a stone step. Your simple trap wasn't triggered, but you felt her approach.

content: {我知道你在这里。出来吧，我没有恶意，只想和你聊聊。}
content_en: "I know you're here. Come out. I mean no harm. I just want to talk."

content: {寂静片刻，一个纤细的身影从干草堆后缓缓走出。}
content_en: After a moment of silence, a slender figure slowly emerged from behind the haystack.

content: {您......您怎么知道我会来？}
content_en: "How... how did you know I would come?"

content: {直觉。你连续跟了我们好几天，一定有话想说。}
content_en: "Instinct. You've been following us for several days. You must have something to say."

content: {对不起，我不是故意要偷听......}
content_en: "I'm sorry... I didn't mean to eavesdrop..."

content: {没关系。能告诉我你的名字吗？}
content_en: "It's alright. Can you tell me your name?"

content: {我叫米娅。}
content_en: "My name is Mia."

content: {米娅......很好听的名字。我是这座城市的城主。}
content_en: "Mia... a very nice name. I am the Lord of this city."

content: {我知道。我听过村民们议论您。}
content_en: "I know. I've heard the villagers talking about you."

content: {那么，米娅，你为何对我们如此好奇？}
content_en: "Then, Mia, why are you so curious about us?"

content: {我......我听到了你们的谈话。你们是要去阻止战争，对吗？去寻求和平。}
content_en: "I... I overheard your conversations. You're going to stop the war, right? To seek peace."

content: {是的。战争带来的只有痛苦，我们想尝试另一条路。}
content_en: "Yes. War only brings suffering. We want to try a different path."

content: {另一条路......和平.......真的可能吗？}
content_en: "A different path... peace... Is it really possible?"

content: {很难，但值得尝试。就像在废墟中种下种子，需要耐心和勇气。}
content_en: "It's difficult, but worth trying. Like planting seeds in ruins—it takes patience and courage."

content: {米娅深吸一口气，声音轻微但坚定}
content_en: Mia took a deep breath, her voice soft but firm.

content: {我......我知道这很冒昧。但是，大人，我可以……可以跟你们一起去吗？}
content_en: "I... I know this is presumptuous. But, sir... can I... can I go with you?"

content: {你想加入我们？}
content_en: "You want to join us?"

content: {是的！我......我可能帮不上大忙，但我可以帮忙照料物品，或者......我跑得很快！}
content_en: "Yes! I... I might not be of much help, but I can take care of things, or... I can run very fast!"

content: {能告诉我为什么吗？为什么想加入这么危险的旅程？}
content_en: "Can you tell me why? Why join such a dangerous journey?"

content: {因为......因为我讨厌战争。我见过它带来的东西。您和您的朋友们......你们在谈论和平时，眼睛里有光。那道光......让我觉得，或许这个世界还有希望。}
content_en: "Because... because I hate war. I've seen what it brings. You and your friends... when you talk about peace, there's a light in your eyes. That light... makes me feel that maybe there's still hope for this world."

content: {你若有所思地注视米娅}
content_en: You regarded Mia thoughtfully.

content: {米娅，你看起来年纪不大，但你的眼神……却像经历过很多。}
content_en: "Mia, you look young, but your eyes... seem to have seen much."

content: {你并非普通女孩，对吗？你的敏锐，你的隐匿技巧……}
content_en: "You're not an ordinary girl, are you? Your alertness, your stealth skills..."

content: {我......我只是个想帮忙的人。}
content_en: "I'm... just someone who wants to help."

content: {我明白你的心意，也很感激。但正是因为你可能不普通，我才更不能轻易答应你。}
content_en: "I understand your feelings, and I'm grateful. But precisely because you might be extraordinary, I can't easily agree."

content: {为什么？}
content_en: "Why?"

content: {这次任务前途未卜，危险重重。我不能让一个不明底细的人加入，这对我的队员们不负责任。更重要的是，米娅，你的人生应该由你自己选择，而不是贸然卷入他人的纷争。}
content_en: "This mission is uncertain and fraught with danger. I cannot let someone with an unclear background join—it would be irresponsible to my team. More importantly, Mia, your life should be your own choice, not hastily entangled in others' conflicts."

content: {可是，这就是我的选择！我鼓起了很大勇气才......}
content_en: "But this is my choice! I mustered a lot of courage to..."

content: {我明白。但请理解我的立场。作为领导者，我必须谨慎。}
content_en: "I understand. But please understand my position. As a leader, I must be cautious."

content: {我明白了……对不起，提出这样任性的请求。}
content_en: "I see... I'm sorry for making such a selfish request."

content: {不必道歉。保持这份对和平的渴望，米娅。它非常珍贵。或许在未来，当时机成熟，我们会有并肩作战的机会。}
content_en: "No need to apologize. Hold onto that desire for peace, Mia. It is very precious. Perhaps in the future, when the time is right, we will have a chance to fight side by side."

content: {未来吗……谢谢您，城主大人，没有把我当成怪人或者斥责我。}
content_en: "The future... Thank you, Lord, for not treating me like a freak or scolding me."

content: {早点休息吧，米娅。愿你能找到属于自己的道路。}
content_en: "Rest early, Mia. May you find your own path."

content: {米娅微微躬身，表情中闪过一丝失落，随后退入阴影中，悄然离去。}
content_en: Mia gave a slight bow, a flicker of disappointment crossing her expression, before retreating into the shadows and slipping away.

content: {你望着她消失的方向，心中泛起一丝波澜}
content_en: You gazed in the direction she disappeared, a ripple of emotion stirring within.

content: {米娅......一个带着过往伤痕，却依然向往光明的灵魂。希望你能平安。}
content_en: "Mia... a soul bearing past scars yet still yearning for the light. I hope you find peace."

content: {米娅离开后，你独自站在村庄边缘的土坡上，目光凝视着远处零星的灯火。}
content_en: After Mia left, you stood alone on the earthen slope at the village's edge, your gaze fixed on the scattered lights in the distance.

content: {希望她能平安......这条路对她来说太沉重了。}
content_en: "I hope she finds peace... this path is too heavy for her."

content: {夜色渐深，月亮从地平线升起，苍白的光辉洒在荒芜的田野上。}
content_en: The night deepened, and the moon rose from the horizon, its pale glow spilling over the desolate fields.

content: {这样的月光，本该照亮欢笑的，却总是映着孤独。}
content_en: Such moonlight should illuminate laughter, yet it often reflects loneliness instead.

content: {风中传来炊烟的余味，你深吸一口气，眼神中带着疲惫。}
content_en: The scent of lingering chimney smoke drifts on the wind. You take a deep breath, weariness in your eyes.

content: {和平啊.......究竟要付出多少代价才能触及？}
content_en: Peace... what price must be paid to touch it?

content: {寂静中，一个清冷的声音从背后传来。}
content_en: A cool voice speaks from behind in the silence.

content: {你在想什么？}
content_en: What are you thinking about?

content: {你一惊，迅速转身}
content_en: You startle, swiftly turning around.

content: {谁在那里？}
content_en: Who's there?

content: {一个过客。看你站了许久，连影子都凝固了。}
content_en: A passerby. I've watched you stand here so long even your shadow has grown still.

content: {你什么时候来的？我竟没察觉。}
content_en: When did you arrive? I didn't notice at all.

content: {月光升起时，我便在了。只是你太专注。}
content_en: I've been here since the moon rose. You were simply too focused.

content: {专注？或许吧。这村庄的宁静让人恍惚。}
content_en: Focused? Perhaps. The village's tranquility is disorienting.

content: {宁静？我看到的却是宁静下的暗流。你在担忧什么？}
content_en: Tranquility? What I see are undercurrents beneath the calm. What worries you?

content: {担忧？不，是反思。我们追寻和平，却可能带来新的冲突。}
content_en: Worry? No, reflection. We pursue peace, yet may bring new conflict.

content: {有趣的矛盾。就像月光，既照亮道路，也隐藏危险。}
content_en: An interesting contradiction. Like moonlight—it illuminates the path but also conceals danger.

content: {你说话的方式很特别。我不是本地人，你来自哪里？}
content_en: Your way of speaking is unusual. I am not from around here. Where are you from?

content: {来自远方，也近在眼前。名字并不重要，重要的是你的思绪。}
content_en: From afar, yet also right here. Names are not important. Your thoughts are.

content: {我的思绪？只是些琐碎的事。比如，如何让这样的夜晚不被战火打扰。}
content_en: My thoughts? Just trivial matters. Such as, how to keep nights like this undisturbed by the flames of war.

content: {宏大的愿望。但你真的相信能实现吗？}
content_en: A grand wish. But do you truly believe it can be achieved?

content: {相信？我必须相信。否则这一切努力有何意义？}
content_en: Believe? I must. Otherwise, what meaning is there in all this effort?

content: {意义？人类总爱赋予行动意义，但结果往往南辕北辙。}
content_en: Meaning? Humans always love to assign meaning to actions, yet the results often contradict.

content: {你似乎对人类很了解？可你的语气不像普通人。}
content_en: You seem to understand humans well? Yet your tone is not ordinary.

content: {普通？什么是普通？我只是个观察者。}
content_en: Ordinary? What is ordinary? I am merely an observer.

content: {观察者？那你观察到了什么？}
content_en: Observer? And what have you observed?

content: {我观察到一位城主，明明肩负重任，却在此为一个小女孩伤感。}
content_en: I observe a Lord, bearing heavy responsibilities, yet grieving here for a young girl.

content: {米娅？她......她有颗纯净的心，我不该让她卷入。}
content_en: Mia? She... has a pure heart. I should not have let her become involved.

content: {纯净的心？那是最易碎的东西。你保护她，是对的。}
content_en: A pure heart? That is the most fragile thing. Protecting her was right.

content: {谢谢你的理解。但有时我在想，是否太保守了。}
content_en: Thank you for understanding. But sometimes I wonder if I am too cautious.

content: {保守？不，是明智。冲动只会毁掉更多像她这样的灵魂。}
content_en: Cautious? No, wise. Impulsiveness only destroys more souls like hers.

content: {你好像知道很多关于我的事？}
content_en: You seem to know much about me?

content: {我知道。比如，你的小队正在筹划一次危险的谈和。}
content_en: I know. For example, your squad is planning a dangerous peace negotiation.

content: {你连这都清楚？看来你不是偶然路过。}
content_en: You are even aware of that? It seems you didn't pass by by chance.

content: {偶然？世间没有偶然，只有必然的相遇。}
content_en: Chance? There is no chance in this world, only inevitable encounters.

content: {那么，这次相遇是必然？为了什么？}
content_en: Then this meeting is inevitable? For what purpose?

content: {为了一个问题：你在想什么？更深层地说，你在恐惧什么？}
content_en: To ask a question: What are you thinking about? More deeply, what are you afraid of?

content: {恐惧？我恐惧失败。恐惧我们的努力最终徒劳无功。}
content_en: Afraid? I fear failure. I fear that all our efforts will ultimately be in vain.

content: {失败是常态，成功才是意外。你为何执着于意外？}
content_en: Failure is the norm; success is the exception. Why do you cling to the exception?

content: {因为意外代表着希望。就像这月光，虽弱，却刺破黑暗。}
content_en: Because exceptions represent hope. Like this moonlight, weak as it is, it pierces the darkness.

content: {诗意的比喻。但希望需要代价，你愿意支付吗？}
content_en: A poetic metaphor. But hope has a cost. Are you willing to pay it?

content: {代价？我已经准备好了。但我不希望牵连无辜。}
content_en: Cost? I am already prepared. But I do not wish to implicate the innocent.

content: {无辜？在战争面前，无人无辜。你太善良了。}
content_en: Innocent? In the face of war, no one is innocent. You are too kind.

content: {善良？或许吧。但这是我唯一的武器。}
content_en: Kind? Perhaps. But it is my only weapon.

content: {武器？善良是最钝的武器。你需要更实际的东西。}
content_en: Weapon? Kindness is the bluntest weapon. You need something more practical.

content: {比如？}
content_en: Such as?

content: {比如力量。但今晚不谈这个。我只想听你回答：你在想什么？}
content_en: Such as strength. But not tonight. Tonight, I only wish to hear your answer: What are you thinking about?

content: {我在想......如何让月光下的每一盏灯都长明不灭。}
content_en: I'm thinking... how to make every lamp beneath this moonlight burn forever.

content: {美丽的愿望。但愿它能实现。晚安。}
content_en: A beautiful wish. May it come true. Good night.

content: {声音消失，你回头只见空荡的月光，仿佛刚才的对话是幻觉。}
content_en: The voice fades. You look back to see only empty moonlight, as if the conversation was an illusion.

content: {是梦吗？不，太真实了......她究竟是谁？}
content_en: A dream? No, too real... Who was she?

content: {你站在原地，月光下你的影子拉长，心中对这位神秘观察者的意图充满了思索，隐约感到她可能与米娅有着某种联系。}
content_en: You stand there. Under the moonlight, your shadow stretches long. Your mind is filled with contemplation about the intentions of this mysterious observer, vaguely sensing she might have some connection to Mia.

content: {次日黄昏，你在村庄外的古树下查看地图，心中仍想着昨晚的神秘声音和米娅的安危。身后传来脚步声。}
content_en: The next evening, you are examining a map under an ancient tree outside the village, your thoughts still lingering on last night's mysterious voice and Mia's safety. Footsteps approach from behind.

content: {你警惕地回头}
content_en: You turned around warily.

content: {又是你?昨晚的声音......你是那时的人?}
content_en: "Is it you again? The voice from last night... are you that person?"

content: {是我。你可以叫我妮克丝。}
content_en: "It's me. You may call me Nyx."

content: {妮克丝?我们素未谋面，你为什么总出现在我身边?而且你提到了米娅，你认识她?}
content_en: "Nyx? We've never met. Why do you keep appearing around me? And you mentioned Mia. Do you know her?"

content: {素未谋面?不，我观察你很久了，从你踏上征途开始。米娅只是我观察的一部分。}
content_en: "Never met? No, I've been observing you for a long time, since you began your journey. Mia is just part of my observations."

content: {观察?为什么?我有什么值得观察的?米娅她怎么样了?}
content_en: "Observing? Why? What is worth observing about me? How is Mia?"

content: {因为你很特别。大多数统治者追求权力或财富，但你却追求虚无缥缈的和平。至于米娅，她自有她的道路。}
content_en: "Because you are unique. Most rulers pursue power or wealth, but you pursue something as elusive as peace. As for Mia, she has her own path."

content: {和平并不虚无缥缈，它存在于每个人的生活中。米娅的道路不该由你干涉。}
content_en: "Peace is not elusive. It exists in everyone's life. Mia's path should not be interfered with by you."

content: {理想主义。正是这份理想主义，让我忍不住留下来观察你。}
content_en: "Idealism. It is precisely this idealism that makes me stay and observe you."

content: {所以你不是村庄的人?你究竟是什么身份?}
content_en: "So you are not from the village? What exactly is your identity?"

content: {我是个商人。喜欢做交易，观察人性在交易中的变化。}
content_en: "I am a merchant. I enjoy making deals and observing how human nature changes within transactions."

content: {商人?可这里没有集市，你交易什么?}
content_en: "A merchant? But there is no marketplace here. What do you trade?"

content: {交易一切。愿望、代价、未来……只要你有需求，我就能提供。}
content_en: "Everything. Desires, costs, futures... as long as you have a need, I can provide."

content: {听起来像传说中的魔女。我不相信这种超自然的事。}
content_en: "You sound like a witch from legends. I don't believe in such supernatural things."

content: {超自然?不，我只是个现实的商人。比如，我可以让你的小队免于饥饿。}
content_en: "Supernatural? No, I am merely a practical merchant. For example, I could ensure your squad never goes hungry."

content: {免于饥饿?我们有自己的补给，不需要外力。}
content_en: "Never go hungry? We have our own supplies. We don't need external aid."

content: {但补给会耗尽。我可以提供无尽的粮食，只需一点代价。}
content_en: "But supplies can run out. I can provide endless food, for just a small price."

content: {代价是什么?金钱?还是更珍贵的东西?}
content_en: "What is the price? Money? Or something more precious?"

content: {取决于交易内容。比如，用你一天的记忆换取一周的食粮。}
content_en: "It depends on the deal. For instance, one day of your memories in exchange for a week's worth of food."

content: {记忆?那太荒唐了。记忆是无价的。}
content_en: "Memories? That's absurd. Memories are priceless."

content: {无价?那只是因为你没经历过匮乏。饥饿时，记忆不如一块面包。}
content_en: "Priceless? Only because you haven't experienced true scarcity. When starving, a memory is not worth a loaf of bread."

content: {即使如此，我也不会交易。我们靠自己的双手生存。}
content_en: "Even so, I won't make that trade. We survive by our own hands."

content: {固执。但商人有耐心。城主，有没有兴趣做一笔更大的交易?}
content_en: "Stubborn. But merchants have patience. Lord, are you interested in a larger deal?"

content: {更大的交易?比如?}
content_en: "A larger deal? Such as?"

content: {比如，我保证你的谈和成功。兽人与人类握手言和，再无战争。}
content_en: "For example, I guarantee the success of your peace talks. Orcs and humans shake hands, war ends forever."

content: {这怎么可能?和平需要双方努力，不是一蹴而就的。}
content_en: "How is that possible? Peace requires effort from both sides. It cannot be achieved instantly."

content: {我能做到。但代价会很高。比如，你余生的自由。}
content_en: "I can make it happen. But the cost would be high. For example, your freedom for the rest of your life."

content: {自由?那我成了你的奴隶?绝不!}
content_en: "Freedom? I would become your slave? Absolutely not!"

content: {奴隶?不，是合作伙伴。你可以继续领导你的城，但需听从我的建议。}
content_en: "A slave? No, a partner. You could continue to lead your city, but you would need to follow my advice."

content: {那和奴隶有何区别?我不信任这种交易。}
content_en: "How is that different from a slave? I don't trust such deals."

content: {你信任什么?信任你的同伴?但他们可能失败。}
content_en: "What do you trust? Your companions? But they might fail."

content: {即使失败，我们也努力过。交易只会玷污我们的初衷。}
content_en: "Even if we fail, we will have tried. A deal would only taint our original intent."

content: {初衷?纯洁的初衷往往导致更惨烈的结局。交易可以避免流血。}
content_en: "Original intent? Pure intentions often lead to more tragic ends. A deal can avoid bloodshed."

content: {流血有时是必要的。但我们会尽量减少。妮克丝，你为什么盯上我?还有米娅?}
content_en: "Bloodshed is sometimes necessary. But we will minimize it. Nyx, why are you fixated on me? And on Mia?"

content: {因为你是罕见的样本。我交易过无数人，他们总为私欲而来，你却为公益。米娅是另一个样本，但今天我们来谈你。}
content_en: "Because you are a rare specimen. I've dealt with countless people who come seeking personal gain, but you come for the public good. Mia is another specimen, but today we are discussing you."

content: {公益?我只是做该做的事。如果你真如所说，请离开吧，不要打扰米娅。}
content_en: "Public good? I'm just doing what I must. If you are truly as you say, please leave. Do not disturb Mia."

content: {离开?但交易还没开始。城主，再考虑一下。我可以给你力量。}
content_en: "Leave? But the deal hasn't begun. Lord, reconsider. I can give you power."

content: {力量?什么样的力量?}
content_en: "Power? What kind of power?"

content: {战无不胜的力量。你的剑所指，敌人皆溃散。}
content_en: "The power to be undefeated in battle. Where your sword points, enemies will scatter."

content: {那会让我变成暴君。不，我追求的是理解，不是征服。}
content_en: "That would turn me into a tyrant. No, I seek understanding, not conquest."

content: {理解需要时间，而时间不等人。交易可以节省时间。}
content_en: "Understanding takes time, and time waits for no one. A deal can save time."

content: {时间再紧迫，也不能走捷径。妮克丝，你的提议我很感激，但拒绝。}
content_en: "No matter how urgent, we cannot take shortcuts. Nyx, I appreciate your offer, but I refuse."

content: {感激?人类很少对商人感激。你果然有趣。我会再来的，或许下次我们会谈米娅。}
content_en: "Appreciate? Humans rarely appreciate merchants. You truly are interesting. I will return. Perhaps next time we can discuss Mia."

content: {妮克丝转身，身影渐渐淡化。}
content_en: Nyx turned, her figure gradually fading.

content: {等等!你究竟为什么对我如此执着?你和米娅是什么关系?}
content_en: "Wait! Why are you so fixated on me? What is your relationship with Mia?"

content: {因为我想看看，你的理想能坚持多久。至于米娅，她比你想象的要复杂。再见，城主。}
content_en: "Because I want to see how long your idealism will last. As for Mia, she is more complex than you imagine. Farewell, Lord."

content: {妮克丝消失，你陷入沉思，心中对妮克丝和米娅的联系更加疑惑。}
content_en: Nyx vanished, leaving you deep in thought, even more puzzled about the connection between Nyx and Mia.

content: {几天后，你在村庄井边打水，心中仍对妮克丝和米娅的关系感到疑惑。这时，妮克丝悄无声息地出现。}
content_en: A few days later, you were drawing water at the village well, still troubled by thoughts of Nyx and Mia's relationship. Then, Nyx appeared soundlessly.

content: {你皱眉}
content_en: You frowned.

content: {你又来了。这次想谈什么交易？还是关于米娅？}
content_en: "You're here again. What deal do you want to discuss this time? Or is it about Mia?"

content: {交易是主题，但米娅可以稍后谈。这次，我想先讲讲我的故事。}
content_en: "Deals are the theme, but Mia can come later. This time, I want to start by telling my story."

content: {故事？为了换取我的信任？}
content_en: "Your story? To gain my trust?"

content: {不，只是为了让你理解我。比如，我曾与一位老画师交易。}
content_en: "No, just to help you understand me. For example, I once made a deal with an old painter."

content: {老画师？他交易了什么？}
content_en: "An old painter? What did he trade?"

content: {他用视力换取了完成杰作的机会。杰作流芳百世，他却永堕黑暗。}
content_en: "He traded his eyesight for the chance to complete a masterpiece. The masterpiece lasted through the ages, but he was plunged into eternal darkness."

content: {悲惨的结局。这就是你交易的典型结果？}
content_en: "A tragic outcome. Is that the typical result of your deals?"

content: {不全是。也有商人用家族财富换取子孙平安，但家族最终没落。}
content_en: "Not always. There was also a merchant who traded his family's wealth for the safety of his descendants, but the family ultimately fell into decline."

content: {你似乎在说，交易总带来失去。}
content_en: "You seem to be saying deals always lead to loss."

content: {不，是选择。人类总在得到时忽视代价。城主，你呢？你想得到什么？}
content_en: "No, it's about choice. Humans often ignore the cost when they gain something. What about you, Lord? What do you want to gain?"

content: {我？我只想完成使命，让这片土地恢复和平。}
content_en: "Me? I just want to fulfill my mission, to restore peace to this land."

content: {和平？太模糊了。具体点，比如权力？我可以让你成为这片大陆的王者。}
content_en: "Peace? That's too vague. Be specific. Power, perhaps? I could make you the ruler of this continent."

content: {王者？那意味着战争和压迫。不，我拒绝。}
content_en: "Ruler? That means war and oppression. No, I refuse."

content: {财富？你可以用金钱收买人心，建立联盟。}
content_en: "Wealth? You could use money to win hearts and build alliances."

content: {财富会腐蚀联盟。我们靠信念团结，不是金钱。}
content_en: "Wealth corrupts alliances. We are united by conviction, not money."

content: {力量？我可以让你个人无敌，保护所有你爱的人。}
content_en: "Strength? I could make you personally invincible, able to protect everyone you love."

content: {无敌？那会让我孤独。力量不是解决问题的关键。}
content_en: "Invincible? That would leave me isolated. Strength isn't the key to solving problems."

content: {妮克丝轻笑}
content_en: Nyx chuckles lightly.

content: {你真是棘手。我交易过无数统治者，他们一听权力就眼红。}
content_en: "You really are a tough one. I've dealt with countless rulers whose eyes glazed over at the mention of power."

content: {眼红？那是因为他们忘记了初衷。我的初衷很简单。}
content_en: "Glazed over? That's because they forgot their original purpose. Mine is simple."

content: {那么简单？说出来听听。或许我能实现。}
content_en: "That simple? Say it. Perhaps I can make it happen."

content: {你目光望向远方的山脉}
content_en: You gaze toward the distant mountains.

content: {我希望世界和平。没有战争，没有仇恨，所有种族共存。}
content_en: "I wish for world peace. No war, no hatred, all races coexisting."

content: {妮克丝怔住}
content_en: Nyx is momentarily stunned.

content: {世界和平？你......你知道这个愿望有多大吗？}
content_en: "World peace? You... do you know how vast that wish is?"

content: {知道。但这是我的理想，不为交易而生。}
content_en: "I know. But it's my ideal, not something to be born from a deal."

content: {即使我，也无法实现这种规模的愿望。它涉及太多变量，太宏大。}
content_en: "Even I cannot fulfill a wish of that scale. It involves too many variables, too grand."

content: {那我就不需要交易了。我会一步一步走下去。}
content_en: "Then I don't need a deal. I will walk the path step by step."

content: {你的眼神......如此清澈，像从未被污染的水。我见过太多贪婪，但你却纯粹。}
content_en: "Your eyes... are so clear, like untarnished water. I have seen too much greed, but you are pure."

content: {纯粹？不，我只是坚持认为和平值得追求。}
content_en: "Pure? No, I simply believe peace is worth pursuing."

content: {追求？但追求可能失败。你害怕失败吗？}
content_en: "Pursuing? But pursuit may fail. Are you afraid of failure?"

content: {害怕，但不会退缩。失败也是过程的一部分。}
content_en: "Afraid, but I won't retreat. Failure is also part of the process."

content: {我明白了。城主，我不会和你交易。}
content_en: "I understand. Lord, I will not make a deal with you."

content: {为什么？因为愿望太大？}
content_en: "Why? Because the wish is too big?"

content: {不，因为这样的愿望无价。交易会玷污它的神圣。}
content_en: "No, because such a wish is priceless. A deal would taint its sanctity."

content: {神圣？我不认为神圣，只觉得是责任。}
content_en: "Sanctity? I don't see it as sacred, just a responsibility."

content: {责任？那更珍贵。我想赠予你一样东西，免费的。}
content_en: "Responsibility? That is even more precious. I want to give you something, free of charge."

content: {赠予？是什么？又是交易陷阱？}
content_en: "A gift? What is it? Another trap disguised as a deal?"

content: {不，是祝福。愿你所向披靡，战无不胜。这不是为了征服，而是为了保护你的理想。}
content_en: "No, a blessing. May you be ever-victorious and undefeated on your path. Not for conquest, but to protect your ideal."

content: {祝福？为什么免费？你从不免费交易。}
content_en: "A blessing? Why for free? You never trade for free."

content: {因为你的理想触动了我。或许人性中还有光，让我想守护。}
content_en: "Because your ideal has moved me. Perhaps there is still light within humanity, making me want to safeguard it."

content: {谢谢，但我不依赖祝福。我们靠的是团结和勇气。}
content_en: "Thank you, but I don't rely on blessings. We depend on unity and courage."

content: {祝福不会取代那些，只会增强。接受它吧，作为我的一份心意。}
content_en: "The blessing won't replace those; it will only enhance them. Accept it, as a token of my goodwill."

content: {好吧，我接受。但我会记住，和平源于内心，不是外力。}
content_en: "Very well, I accept. But I will remember: peace comes from within, not from external force."

content: {我相信你。再见，城主。我会继续观察你的旅程，期待看到奇迹。}
content_en: "I believe you. Farewell, Lord. I will continue to observe your journey, hoping to witness a miracle."

content: {妮克丝的身影消散，你感到一股暖流涌过心间。}
content_en: Nyx's form dissipates. You feel a warm current flow through your heart.

content: {祝福吗？但愿它能照亮前路……但真正的路，还得我们自己走。}
content_en: A blessing? May it truly light the path ahead... but the real road, we must walk ourselves.

content: {城主站在村庄边缘，望着远方的云海，尤蕾拉悄悄从背后靠近}
content_en: The Lord stood at the edge of the village, gazing at the distant sea of clouds. Eurella quietly crept up from behind.

content: {嘿!猜猜我是谁?}
content_en: "Hey! Guess who?"

content: {尤蕾拉，你的脚步声太明显了。}
content_en: "Eurella, your footsteps are too obvious."

content: {哼，你又拆穿我!今天要不要试试我的新恶作剧?}
content_en: "Hmph, you saw through me again! Want to try my new prank today?"

content: {尤蕾拉，别闹了!快来尝尝我刚烤好的肉串。}
content_en: "Eurella, stop messing around! Come try the meat skewers I just grilled."

content: {城主大人，您又在发呆?那些星空魔法的事可以放一放。}
content_en: "Lord, are you daydreaming again? You can set aside those starry magic thoughts for now."

content: {荣誉要求我们保持警惕，但休息也是必要的。}
content_en: "Honor demands we remain vigilant, but rest is also necessary."

content: {谢谢你们，我只是有点想念妮克丝。}
content_en: "Thank you, everyone. I was just missing Nyx a little."

content: {城主，妮克丝虽然神秘，但她的祝福或许真有用。我感觉到你身上有股温暖的能量。}
content_en: "Lord, Nyx may be mysterious, but her blessing might actually be useful. I sense a warm energy around you."

content: {那是她的好意，但和平需要我们自己争取。}
content_en: "That's her kindness, but peace is something we must earn ourselves."

content: {祝福?像星星一样闪闪发光吗?我也想要!}
content_en: "A blessing? Like twinkling stars? I want one too!"

content: {尤蕾拉，别打岔。城主，妮克丝的事先放一放，我们先处理眼前。}
content_en: "Eurella, don't interrupt. Lord, let's set aside Nyx for now and focus on the present."

content: {妮克丝?那个神秘女孩?她就像云一样消失啦!}
content_en: "Nyx? That mysterious girl? She vanished like a cloud!"

content: {是啊，我打听过，村民说她总是一个人来来去去。}
content_en: "Right. I asked around. The villagers say she always comes and goes alone."

content: {城主，你该不会对她有什么特别兴趣吧?我可没嫉妒哦。}
content_en: "Lord, you don't have some special interest in her, do you? I'm not jealous or anything!"

content: {我们该专注于物资收集。曙光骑士团的纪律不能松懈。}
content_en: "We should focus on gathering supplies. The Dawn Knight Order' discipline must not slacken."

content: {尤蕾拉，你最近和村民玩得不错?}
content_en: "Eurella, you've been getting along well with the villagers lately?"

content: {当然!我教孩子们怎么用星光变魔术，他们可喜欢了。}
content_en: "Of course! I taught the kids how to use starlight for magic tricks. They loved it!"

content: {我还和人类商人交换了食谱，兽人烤肉加人类香料，绝配!}
content_en: "I also exchanged recipes with a human merchant. Orc-style roast with human spices—a perfect match!"

content: {哼，宝石才是永恒的魅力。城主，我找到一块不错的蓝宝石，送你吧。}
content_en: "Hmph, gems are eternal charm. Lord, I found a nice sapphire. Here, for you."

content: {莉莉丝，你还是老样子。但谢谢。}
content_en: "Lilith, you're still the same. But thank you."

content: {物资已清点完毕，随时可以出发。}
content_en: "Supplies have been tallied. We can depart whenever ready."

content: {这么快?我还没玩够呢!}
content_en: "So soon? I haven't had enough fun yet!"

content: {尤蕾拉，路上还有更多美食等着我们呢。}
content_en: "Eurella, there will be more delicious food waiting for us on the road."

content: {城主，启程前要不要去遗迹看看?说不定有星空魔法的线索。}
content_en: "Lord, before we leave, do you want to check the ruins? There might be clues about stellar magic."

content: {不用了，我们直接出发吧。尤蕾拉，别撅嘴了。}
content_en: "No, let's head out directly. Eurella, stop pouting."

content: {好吧，但你要答应我，路上陪我玩!}
content_en: "Alright, but you have to promise to play with me on the way!"

content: {小队整合完成，荣誉指引我们前行。}
content_en: "The squad is assembled. Honor guides our path forward."

content: {我带了足够的干粮，保证大家不饿肚子。}
content_en: "I brought enough rations to ensure no one goes hungry."

content: {城主，我的魔法顾问职责可没忘，随时保护你。}
content_en: "Lord, I haven't forgotten my duties as Magic Advisor. I'll protect you anytime."

content: {出发吧。尤蕾拉，跟紧我。}
content_en: "Let's depart. Eurella, stay close to me."

content: {知道啦!这次我不会走丢的。}
content_en: "Got it! I won't get lost this time."

content: {小队离开村庄，尤蕾拉蹦蹦跳跳地跟在城主身边}
content_en: The squad left the village. Eurella bounced along beside the Lord.

content: {城主，讲个故事嘛!你故乡的星星是什么样的?}
content_en: "Lord, tell a story! What were the stars like in your homeland?"

content: {那里没有星星，只有一片黑暗。}
content_en: "There were no stars there, only darkness."

content: {真难以想象!没有星星的天空，就像没有肉的大餐。}
content_en: "That's hard to imagine! A sky without stars is like a feast without meat!"

content: {露卡，你满脑子都是吃的。城主，别理她，说说魔法的事。}
content_en: "Luka, your mind is always on food. Lord, ignore her. Tell us about magic."

content: {保持安静，边境地区可能有危险。}
content_en: "Maintain silence. The border area may hold dangers."

content: {贝罗娜，你太严肃啦!放松点嘛。}
content_en: "Bellona, you're too serious! Lighten up a bit!"

content: {尤蕾拉，贝罗娜说得对。但谢谢你让我分心。}
content_en: "Eurella, Bellona is right. But thank you for distracting me."

content: {城主，你最近笑容多了，是不是某人的功劳?}
content_en: "Lord, you've been smiling more lately. Is that someone's doing?"

content: {谁?我吗?嘿嘿，当然是我!}
content_en: "Who? Me? Hehe, of course it's me!"

content: {尤蕾拉，你尾巴翘上天啦!}
content_en: "Eurella, your tail is practically pointing to the sky!"

content: {前方有岔路，我建议走西边，更安全。}
content_en: "There's a fork in the road ahead. I suggest taking the western path—it's safer."

content: {听你的。尤蕾拉，别跑太远。}
content_en: "I'll follow your lead. Eurella, don't wander too far."

content: {放心，我就在你影子里躲着!}
content_en: "Don't worry, I'll hide right in your shadow!"

content: {城主，我探测到附近有能量波动，要小心。}
content_en: "Lord, I've detected energy fluctuations nearby. Be cautious."

content: {可能是野生动物?我可以打猎加餐!}
content_en: "Maybe wild animals? I could hunt for extra rations!"

content: {荣誉不允许无谓的杀戮，除非必要。}
content_en: "Honor forbids unnecessary killing, unless it's essential."

content: {大家休息一下，喝点水。}
content_en: "Everyone, take a break. Have some water."

content: {城主，给你云露!我特意藏的。}
content_en: "Lord, here's some cloud dew for you! I hid it specially."

content: {尤蕾拉，你什么时候这么体贴了?}
content_en: "Eurella, when did you become so thoughtful?"

content: {我一直都很好!只是你们没发现。}
content_en: "I've always been nice! You just didn't notice."

content: {我同意!尤蕾拉的心像她的恶作剧一样温暖。}
content_en: "I agree! Eurella's heart is as warm as her pranks are mischievous."

content: {休息结束，我们继续赶路。}
content_en: Rest break over. Let's continue on our way.

content: {尤蕾拉，拉紧我的手，别走散了。}
content_en: Eurella, hold my hand tight. Don't get separated.

content: {好呀!这次我可不会松手。}
content_en: Okay! I won't let go this time.

content: {小队在边境线上行进，遇到一个独自前行的女孩}
content_en: The squad moved along the border and encountered a girl traveling alone.

content: {你好，需要帮助吗？这里很偏僻。}
content_en: "Hello, do you need help? This place is very remote."

content: {谢谢，我不需要。只是路过。}
content_en: "Thank you, I don't. I'm just passing through."

content: {我是曙光骑士团的贝罗娜，可以保证你的安全。}
content_en: "I am Bellona of the Dawn Knight Order. I can ensure your safety."

content: {贝罗娜？听说过你。但我不需要守护。}
content_en: "Bellona? I've heard of you. But I don't need protection."

content: {你一个人在找什么？这里接近兽人领地，很危险。}
content_en: "What are you looking for out here alone? We're near Orc territory. It's dangerous."

content: {我在找一个人。不过，这不关你们的事。}
content_en: "I'm looking for someone. But that's none of your business."

content: {嘿！你看起来好酷！我是尤蕾拉，喜欢恶作剧！}
content_en: "Hey! You look really cool! I'm Eurella! I like pranks!"

content: {尤蕾拉？没听过。我叫罗兰。}
content_en: "Eurella? Never heard of you. I'm Roland."

content: {罗兰？精灵？我是莉莉丝，城主的魔法顾问。}
content_en: "Roland? An Elf? I'm Lilith, the Lord's Magic Advisor."

content: {莉莉丝……精灵之乡的？我不属于那里。}
content_en: "Lilith... from the Elf homeland? I don't belong there."

content: {罗兰，你似乎在逃避什么。我们可以聊聊。}
content_en: "Roland, you seem to be avoiding something. We could talk."

content: {城主？异世界的旅人？我听说过你。但我的事很复杂。}
content_en: "Lord? A traveler from another world? I've heard of you. But my matters are complicated."

content: {荣誉要求我们帮助旅人。如果你在寻人，我们可以提供信息。}
content_en: "Honor demands we aid travelers. If you are seeking someone, we can offer information."

content: {谢谢，但不必了。她……可能不想被找到。}
content_en: "Thank you, but no. She... probably doesn't want to be found."

content: {她？是谁呀？你的朋友吗？}
content_en: "She? Who is she? A friend?"

content: {算是吧。一个我本该守护的人。}
content_en: "You could say that. Someone I was supposed to protect."

content: {守护？像我和城主的关系？}
content_en: "Protect? Like me and the Lord?"

content: {不，不一样。我辞去了守护骑士的职责。}
content_en: "No, not the same. I... resigned from my duty as a guardian knight."

content: {为什么？守护不是荣耀吗？}
content_en: "Why? Isn't protection an honor?"

content: {曾经是。但圣女们都跑了，我累了。}
content_en: "It once was. But the Saintesses all ran away. I grew tired."

content: {圣女？人类信仰的支柱？这很严重。}
content_en: "Saintesses? The pillars of human faith? That's serious."

content: {是的，但我现在自由了。独自旅行更好。}
content_en: "Yes. But I'm free now. Traveling alone is better."

content: {自由？我也喜欢自由！但一个人多孤单啊。}
content_en: "Free? I like freedom too! But being alone sounds lonely."

content: {孤单？或许吧。但比虚伪的职责好。}
content_en: "Lonely? Perhaps. But better than hollow duty."

content: {罗兰，如果你改变主意，可以跟我们同行。}
content_en: "Roland, if you change your mind, you can travel with us."

content: {不了，我们方向不同。我继续往东。}
content_en: "No, our paths diverge. I continue east."

content: {东边是精灵地区，你要回去？}
content_en: "East is Elf territory. Are you returning?"

content: {不，只是路过。再见吧。}
content_en: "No, just passing through. Farewell."

content: {愿荣誉照亮你的路。}
content_en: "May honor light your path."

content: {谢谢。城主，小心前方的兽人部落，有动荡。}
content_en: "Thank you. Lord, be careful ahead. The Orc tribes are restless."

content: {再见罗兰！下次见面一起玩！}
content_en: "Goodbye, Roland! Let's play together next time we meet!"

content: {或许吧。保重。}
content_en: "Perhaps. Take care."

content: {尤蕾拉望着罗兰远去的背影，小声嘀咕}
content_en: Eurella watched Roland's receding back and mumbled,

content: {她好像藏着好多故事呢。}
content_en: "She seems to be hiding a lot of stories."

content: {尤蕾拉，别瞎猜了，每个人都有自己的路。}
content_en: "Eurella, don't speculate. Everyone has their own path."

content: {罗兰独自离开，小队继续前进}
content_en: Roland left alone, and the squad continued forward.

content: {罗兰的故事让我想起自己的孤独。}
content_en: "Roland's story reminds me of my own loneliness."

content: {城主，你有我们呢！我不会让你孤单的！}
content_en: "Lord, you have us! I won't let you be lonely!"

content: {城主，别多想。罗兰的选择是她的路。}
content_en: "Lord, don't dwell on it. Roland chose her path."

content: {我们该加快速度，天黑前到驿站。}
content_en: "We should pick up the pace. We need to reach the post station before dark."

content: {我饿了！希望驿站有好吃的东西。}
content_en: "I'm hungry! I hope the station has good food."

content: {尤蕾拉，谢谢你的陪伴。}
content_en: "Eurella, thank you for your company."

content: {嘿嘿，这是我该做的！恶作剧之外，我也可以很可靠！}
content_en: "Hehe, it's what I should do! Besides pranks, I can be reliable too!"

content: {尤蕾拉，你长大了。}
content_en: "Eurella, you're growing up."

content: {前方有商队，我们打听一下消息。}
content_en: "There's a merchant caravan ahead. Let's gather some news."

content: {好。尤蕾拉，别吓到他们。}
content_en: "Alright. Eurella, don't scare them."

content: {知道啦！我会乖乖的。}
content_en: "Got it! I'll behave!"

content: {小队到达驿站，看到商队和独自休息的巴斯特}
content_en: The squad reached the post station and saw the merchant caravan and Bast, resting alone.

content: {那个女孩很特别，她不是商队的人。}
content_en: "That girl is special. She's not with the caravan."

content: {是的，她像战士，但带着弓。}
content_en: "Right. She looks like a warrior, but carries a bow."

content: {城主，你要去搭话？小心点。}
content_en: "Lord, are you going to talk to her? Be careful."

content: {我去试试！嘿，你好！我是尤蕾拉！}
content_en: "I'll give it a try! Hey, hello! I'm Eurella!"

content: {尤蕾拉？没听过。我叫巴斯特。}
content_en: "Eurella? Never heard of you. I'm Bast."

content: {巴斯特，我是城主。你一个人旅行？}
content_en: "Bast, I am the Lord. Are you traveling alone?"

content: {城主？异世界的？我听说过。但我只是路过。}
content_en: "The Lord? From another world? I've heard. But I'm just passing through."

content: {是露卡，喜欢美食！你要不要尝尝我的烤肉？}
content_en: "I'm Luka! I love food! Want to try my grilled meat?"

content: {谢谢，但我不饿。我不是行商。}
content_en: "Thanks, but I'm not hungry. I'm not a merchant."

content: {你是兽人？但气质不像普通兽人。}
content_en: "You're an Orc? But your aura isn't like an ordinary Orc's."

content: {我是兽人，但在寻找本心。这弓是我父亲的遗产。}
content_en: "I am Orc, but I'm searching for my true self. This bow was my father's legacy."

content: {弓？有魔法波动。城主，它可能和星空魔法有关。}
content_en: "The bow? There's magical resonance. Lord, it might be related to stellar magic."

content: {巴斯特，你在找什么？需要帮助吗？}
content_en: "Bast, what are you looking for? Do you need help?"

content: {不需要。这是一场个人的旅途，为了理解自己。}
content_en: "No need. This is a personal journey, to understand myself."

content: {本心？像我喜欢恶作剧一样吗？}
content_en: "True self? Like how I like pranks?"

content: {不，更深刻。我曾被教会利用，现在追求真实。}
content_en: "No, deeper. I was once used by the church. Now I pursue what's real."

content: {荣誉赞赏你的决心。但独自旅行危险。}
content_en: "Honor commends your resolve. But traveling alone is dangerous."

content: {危险？我习惯了。拉法叶教过我坚强。}
content_en: "Danger? I'm used to it. Lafayette taught me to be strong."

content: {拉法叶？圣骑士团的？}
content_en: "Lafayette? Of the Holy Paladin Order?"

content: {是的，但她也是我的导师。现在我只信自己。}
content_en: "Yes. She was my mentor. Now I trust only myself."

content: {城主，别打扰她了。她似乎不想多谈。}
content_en: "Lord, let her be. She doesn't seem to want to talk more."

content: {谢谢理解。我休息完就走。}
content_en: "Thanks for understanding. I'll leave after I rest."

content: {驿站有麦酒，你要不要喝点？我请客！}
content_en: "The station has ale. Want some? My treat!"

content: {不用了。我讨厌浓烟味，这里火堆太旺。}
content_en: "No. I hate heavy smoke. The fire here is too strong."

content: {巴斯特，你好像猫啊！会喵喵叫吗？}
content_en: "Bast, you're like a cat! Do you meow?"

content: {尤蕾拉！别开玩笑。兽人血统不是玩具。}
content_en: "Eurella! Don't joke. Orc heritage isn't a toy."

content: {尤蕾拉，道歉。巴斯特，对不起。}
content_en: "Eurella, apologize. Bast, I'm sorry."

content: {没事。我该走了。城主，祝你的旅程顺利。}
content_en: "It's fine. I should go. Lord, I wish you luck on your journey."

content: {再见，巴斯特。愿你能找到答案。}
content_en: "Goodbye, Bast. May you find your answers."

content: {谢谢。或许某天我们会再相遇。}
content_en: "Thank you. Perhaps we'll meet again someday."

content: {巴斯特离开驿站，小队继续休息}
content_en: Bast left the station, and the squad continued their rest.

content: {巴斯特让我想起罗兰，都在寻找什么。}
content_en: "Bast reminds me of Roland. Both searching for something."

content: {城主，每个人都有自己的路！但你有我们呢！}
content_en: "Lord, everyone has their own path! But you have us!"

content: {城主，别感慨了。我们该计划下一步。}
content_en: "Lord, stop reflecting. We should plan our next move."

content: {我打听过了，兽人领地有美食节！我们可以去！}
content_en: "I asked around! There's a food festival in the Orc territory! We could go!"

content: {荣誉要求我们谨慎，但美食节可能提供情报。}
content_en: "Honor demands caution, but the festival might provide intelligence."

content: {好，出发吧。尤蕾拉，跟紧我。}
content_en: "Alright, let's set off. Eurella, stay close."

content: {永远跟着你！城主，下次恶作剧保证吓到你！}
content_en: "Always with you! Lord, my next prank will definitely surprise you!"

content: {尤蕾拉，你永远不会变。}
content_en: "Eurella, you'll never change."

content: {但这样就好。出发吧。}
content_en: "But that's fine as it is. Let's go."

content: {城主和小队穿过驿站，来到一个熙攘的小镇入口。街道上各族和谐共处。}
content_en: The Lord and the squad passed through the station and arrived at the bustling entrance of a small town. Various races mingled harmoniously on the streets.

content: {这里的气氛比预想中还要宁静。}
content_en: "The atmosphere here is more peaceful than expected."

content: {一个穿着朴素的女孩主动迎上来，身后跟着一个兽人女孩。}
content_en: A plainly dressed girl approached them proactively, followed by an Orc girl.

content: {远道而来的旅人？需要帮忙找落脚处吗？}
content_en: "Travelers from afar? Need help finding a place to stay?"

content: {感谢好意。我们确实需要向导。}
content_en: "Thank you for the kindness. We could indeed use a guide."

content: {跟我来吧，镇子里的酒馆老板我熟。}
content_en: "Follow me. I know the tavern owner in town well."

content: {两个女孩带路，小队跟随融入街景。}
content_en: The two girls led the way, and the squad followed, blending into the street scene.

content: {你们是本地人？}
content_en: "Are you locals?"

content: {算是吧。这里临近三族边界，但很少冲突。}
content_en: "Kind of. This area is near the border of three races, but conflicts are rare."

content: {因为大家都忙着生活，没空争斗。}
content_en: "Because everyone is busy living, with no time for fighting."

content: {途中，两个女孩低声哼起一段旋律，旋律悠扬中带着一丝哀伤。}
content_en: Along the way, the two girls softly hummed a melody—lyrical yet tinged with a hint of sorrow.

content: {这调子很特别，是什么歌？}
content_en: "That tune is quite special. What song is it?"

content: {只是随口哼的旧曲。}
content_en: "Just an old song we hum without thinking."

content: {对呀，不值一问。}
content_en: "Yeah, nothing worth asking about."

content: {听起来有故事，但我不强求。}
content_en: "It sounds like it has a story, but I won't press."

content: {旅人该休息了，前面就是酒馆。}
content_en: "Travelers need rest. The tavern is just ahead."

content: {你们帮了大忙，该如何称呼？}
content_en: "You've been a great help. What should we call you?"

content: {叫我小拉就好。}
content_en: "Just call me La."

content: {我是辛，普通的旅人。}
content_en: "I'm Shin, an ordinary traveler."

content: {我是城主。这位是莉莉丝，我的顾问。}
content_en: "I am the Lord. This is Lilith, my advisor."

content: {哼，小镇倒是意外干净。}
content_en: "Hmph, the town is surprisingly clean."

content: {女孩们交换眼神，轻笑不语。}
content_en: The girls exchanged a glance and chuckled softly without explaining.

content: {城主大人，需要打听消息的话，我可以引荐些人。}
content_en: "Lord, if you need to gather information, I can introduce you to some people."

content: {稍后再议，先安顿下来。}
content_en: "We'll discuss that later. Let's get settled first."

content: {酒馆有热汤，能解乏。}
content_en: "The tavern has hot soup. It'll help you unwind."

content: {进入酒馆，两个女孩帮忙安排房间，气氛温馨融洽。}
content_en: Entering the tavern, the two girls helped arrange rooms. The atmosphere was warm and harmonious.

content: {你们常帮助外来人？}
content_en: "Do you often help outsiders?"

content: {只是见不得人迷茫。}
content_en: "Just can't stand to see people lost."

content: {就像有人曾帮过我们一样。}
content_en: "Like someone once helped us."

content: {这旋律又哼起来了？}
content_en: "You're humming that melody again?"

content: {习惯了，不知不觉就......}
content_en: "Habit. We do it without thinking..."

content: {别在意，我们该走了。}
content_en: "Don't mind us. We should be going."

content: {不留下来吃点东西？}
content_en: "Won't you stay for some food?"

content: {还有事要忙。祝各位停留愉快。}
content_en: "We have things to attend to. Enjoy your stay."

content: {女孩们挥手告别，哼唱声渐远，空气中留下一丝神秘感。}
content_en: The girls waved goodbye. Their humming faded into the distance, leaving a trace of mystery in the air.

content: {有趣的姑娘们。莉莉丝，你怎么看？}
content_en: "Interesting girls. Lilith, what do you think?"

content: {普通？才怪。那兽人女孩收着翅膀，但气息不一般。}
content_en: "Ordinary? Hardly. The Orc girl had her wings tucked away, but her aura was unusual."

content: {或许她们有苦衷。先休息吧。}
content_en: "Perhaps they have their reasons. Let's rest for now."

content: {夜晚，小镇灯火通明，城主凭窗远眺，思考着白天的相遇。}
content_en: At night, the town was brightly lit. The Lord gazed out the window, reflecting on the day's encounters.

content: {和谐之下，总有暗流。但我感觉不到恶意。}
content_en: "Beneath the harmony, there are always undercurrents. But I don't sense any malice."

content: {城主，你太容易信人。}
content_en: "Lord, you trust people too easily."

content: {信任有时是钥匙，莉莉丝。而且，她们的哼唱让我想起一些传说。}
content_en: "Trust can sometimes be a key, Lilith. Besides, their humming reminded me of some legends."

content: {传说？城主，你总是联想丰富。}
content_en: "Legends? Lord, your imagination is always so vivid."

content: {次日清晨，两个女孩再次出现，带来自制糕点，香气扑鼻。}
content_en: The next morning, the two girls appeared again, bringing homemade pastries with a delightful aroma.

content: {尝尝吧，本地特产。}
content_en: "Try some. They're local specialties."

content: {你们太周到了。}
content_en: "You're too thoughtful."

content: {只是回馈。听说你们是旅行者？}
content_en: "Just returning the kindness. We heard you're travelers?"

content: {途径此地，稍作休整。}
content_en: "Passing through, taking a short rest."

content: {如果停留久些，能听到更多故事。}
content_en: "If you stay a bit longer, you might hear more stories."

content: {比如那首歌的来历？}
content_en: "Like the origin of that song?"

content: {城主说笑了，那真没什么。}
content_en: "You jest, Lord. It's really nothing."

content: {对了，镇东墓园最近有花开了，值得一看。}
content_en: "Oh, by the way, flowers have recently bloomed in the eastern cemetery. It's worth a visit."

content: {墓园？听起来不像景点。}
content_en: "The cemetery? Doesn't sound like a typical attraction."

content: {死亡也是生活的一部分。告辞了。}
content_en: "Death is also part of life. Farewell for now."

content: {女孩们匆匆离去，哼唱声残留空中，仿佛在暗示什么。}
content_en: The girls hurried off. Their lingering hum seemed to hint at something.

content: {她们在躲避什么？但眼神清澈，不像恶徒。}
content_en: "What are they hiding from? But their eyes were clear, not like villains."

content: {我会去查查，城主。特别是那旋律，我总觉得耳熟。}
content_en: "I'll look into it, Lord. Especially that melody. It feels familiar somehow."

content: {有劳了。先享受这片刻安宁吧，或许明天会有新发现。}
content_en: "Thank you. Let's enjoy this moment of peace for now. Perhaps tomorrow will bring new discoveries."

content: {几日后，莉莉丝在酒馆房间向你汇报。}
content_en: A few days later, Lilith reported to you in the tavern room.

content: {城主，我打听到些趣事。}
content_en: "Lord, I've heard some interesting things."

content: {关于那两个女孩？}
content_en: "About those two girls?"

content: {不全是。镇子里流传着一位歌者的传说。}
content_en: "Not exactly. There's a legend circulating in the town about a Singer."

content: {歌者？仔细说。}
content_en: "A Singer? Tell me more."

content: {她叫厄洛丝，精灵族，不久前在此演唱过。她的歌声仿佛有魔力，能让听众沉醉。}
content_en: "Her name is Eros, an Elf. Not long ago, she performed here. Her singing seems magical, capable of enchanting listeners."

content: {厄洛丝......这名字有点耳熟。}
content_en: "Eros... that name sounds familiar."

content: {她唱了首“禁歌”，揭露圣殿虚伪，村民至今念念不忘。歌词里提到了圣殿的黑暗往事。}
content_en: "She sang a 'forbidden song,' exposing the hypocrisy of the Temple. The villagers still remember it fondly. The lyrics mentioned dark past events of the Temple."

content: {禁歌？难怪那两个女孩哼的调子似曾相识。}
content_en: "A forbidden song? No wonder the tune those girls hummed seemed familiar."

content: {要深究吗？我能找到记录。}
content_en: "Should we investigate further? I can find records."

content: {不必了。当前目标是边境盟约，别节外生枝。}
content_en: "No need. Our current goal is the border alliance. Let's not complicate things."

content: {但厄洛丝回了精灵领地，或许能利用......}
content_en: "But Eros returned to the Elf territories. Perhaps we could use..."

content: {莉莉丝，我们不是来挑动纷争的。}
content_en: "Lilith, we are not here to stir up conflict."

content: {好吧。还有件事，镇民说墓园黄昏时会出现少女。}
content_en: "Fine. Another thing: the townsfolk say a young woman appears in the cemetery at dusk."

content: {少女？描述一下。}
content_en: "A young woman? Describe her."

content: {穿婚纱的精灵，忽隐忽现，叫妮娅。据说与生死之谜有关，见过她的人都说她美丽而哀伤。}
content_en: "An Elf in a wedding dress, flickering in and out, named Niya. It's said to be related to mysteries of life and death. Those who've seen her describe her as beautiful yet sorrowful."

content: {妮娅......听起来像古老传说。你有兴趣？}
content_en: "Niya... sounds like an ancient legend. Are you interested?"

content: {我对异常现象本能好奇。但城主若不许，我不去。}
content_en: "I'm instinctively curious about anomalies. But if you forbid it, Lord, I won't go."

content: {墓园之事，暂放一边。优先打探边境消息。}
