content_en: "In the border region of the Elvenwood adjacent to your city-state, anomalous tree blight has recently appeared."

content: {枯萎？具体是怎样的情形？}
content_en: "Blight? What exactly is the situation?"

content: {并非自然的衰败。树木仿佛在瞬间被抽干了生命能量，且枯萎范围正在迅速扩大。}
content_en: "It is not natural decay. The trees seem to have had their life energy drained in an instant, and the blighted area is spreading rapidly."

content: {更令人不安的是，枯萎区域弥漫着一种……不祥的气息，与我们古籍中记载的某种湮灭前兆极为相似。}
content_en: "What is more disturbing is that the blighted area is permeated with an... ominous aura, highly similar to a certain prelude to annihilation recorded in our ancient texts."

content: {湮灭？这听起来非同小可。精灵族可曾查明原因？}
content_en: "Annihilation? That sounds grave. Have the Elves determined the cause?"

content: {我们尝试了多种精灵魔法进行探测，但均告无效。那股力量似乎能规避我们的感知。}
content_en: "We have tried various Elven magics for detection, but all have failed. That power seems able to evade our perception."

content: {正因如此，我们无法独自应对。我们深知您曾成功化解多次危机，拥有非凡的智慧与力量。}
content_en: "Precisely because of this, we cannot face it alone. We are well aware that you have successfully resolved multiple crises and possess extraordinary wisdom and strength."

content: {因此，我们奉精灵王之命，诚挚邀请您亲往精灵之森，协助我们探明真相。}
content_en: "Therefore, by order of the Elven King, we sincerely invite you to personally come to the Elvenwood to assist us in uncovering the truth."

content: {邀请我？精灵之森向来鲜少有外人踏入。}
content_en: "Invite me? The Elvenwood has rarely allowed outsiders to enter."

content: {正是您为大陆和平所做出的努力，赢得了精灵王的信任。我们相信，您的视角或许能发现我们忽略的线索。}
content_en: "It is precisely your efforts for the continent's peace that have earned the Elven King's trust. We believe your perspective might discover clues we have overlooked."

content: {时间紧迫，枯萎的蔓延速度超乎想象，每延迟一刻，森林承受的伤害便加深一分。}
content_en: "Time is of the essence. The blight's spread exceeds expectations. Every moment of delay deepens the forest's wounds."

content: {我明白了。情况确实刻不容缓。请详细告诉我，枯萎还有哪些具体特征？}
content_en: "I understand. The situation is indeed urgent. Please tell me in detail, what other specific characteristics does the blight have?"

content: {除了生命力的急速流失，某些枯萎的树木上还出现了诡异的绿色斑痕，触之冰冷，且魔法无法驱散。}
content_en: "Aside from the rapid loss of life force, some blighted trees have developed eerie green blemishes. They are cold to the touch, and magic cannot disperse them."

content: {林中的动物也已纷纷逃离那片区域，这是极不寻常的征兆。}
content_en: "Animals in the forest have also fled the area, which is an extremely unusual sign."

content: {带有魔法抗性的斑痕，以及动物的本能逃离……这的确不像自然现象。我接受你们的邀请。}
content_en: "Blemishes with magic resistance, and animals fleeing by instinct... This indeed does not seem natural. I accept your invitation."

content: {感激您的迅速决断！精灵族将为您提供一切必要的协助。}
content_en: "Thank you for your swift decision! The Elves will provide you with all necessary assistance."

content: {前往精灵之森的路途需做些准备，那片区域目前可能潜藏未知的危险。}
content_en: Preparing for the journey to the Elvenwood requires some arrangements. The area may currently harbor unknown dangers.

content: {我会即刻集结一支精干的小队同行，确保行程安全。}
content_en: I will immediately assemble a capable team to accompany us, ensuring the safety of the trip.

content: {我将亲自为您引路。精灵之森的道路对于不熟悉的人来说如同迷宫。}
content_en: I will personally guide you there. The paths of the Elvenwood are like a labyrinth to those unfamiliar.

content: {我可以沿途为您介绍相关的精灵族历史与传说，或许对探寻真相有所助益。}
content_en: I can also introduce you to relevant Elven history and legends along the way, which may aid in uncovering the truth.

content: {好的。请二位先稍作休息，我会尽快安排，明日清晨出发。}
content_en: Very well. Please rest for now. I will make arrangements promptly, and we depart at dawn tomorrow.

content: {愿森林的祝福与星光指引我们此行。}
content_en: May the forest's blessing and starlight guide our journey.

content: {期待与您并肩同行，揭开谜团。}
content_en: We look forward to standing side by side with you to unravel this mystery.

content: {也请代我向精灵王转达问候与感谢。}
content_en: Please also convey my greetings and gratitude to the Elven King on my behalf.

content: {瑞亚与克罗洛丝优雅行礼，悄然退出书房。你起身走到窗前，望向精灵之森的方向，眉头微蹙，心中已然开始筹划接下来的行程与对策}
content_en: Rhea and Crolos bowed gracefully and quietly withdrew from the study. You rose and walked to the window, gazing toward the direction of the Elvenwood, a slight frown on your brow as you began planning the upcoming journey and strategy.

content: {你在庭院中整理行装，贝拉拉急匆匆地跑来，脸上带着显而易见的焦虑}
content_en: You were organizing your gear in the courtyard when Belala rushed over, her face visibly anxious.

content: {城主！我听说你要前往精灵之森？}
content_en: "Lord! I heard you are going to the Elvenwood?"

content: {贝拉拉？是的，我们收到了精灵族的邀请，去调查树木枯萎的事件。}
content_en: "Belala? Yes, we received an invitation from the Elves to investigate the tree blight."

content: {树木枯萎……这个消息让我感到非常不安。}
content_en: "Tree blight... This news makes me very uneasy."

content: {为什么如此担忧？这似乎触动了你某些回忆。}
content_en: "Why so worried? This seems to have stirred some memories for you."

content: {因为这次事件让我想起了过去那场可怕的大火，那种不祥的预感又回来了。}
content_en: "Because this incident reminds me of that terrible fire from the past. That ominous feeling has returned."

content: {是你曾经提到过的、导致你与族人失散的那场大火吗？}
content_en: "Is it the fire you once mentioned, the one that caused you to be separated from your kin?"

content: {正是。那场蹊跷的大火发生前，也有着类似的征兆。}
content_en: "Exactly. Before that strange fire broke out, there were similar signs."

content: {你示意贝拉拉坐在旁边的石凳上，专注地倾听}
content_en: You gestured for Belala to sit on a nearby stone bench, listening intently.

content: {请详细说说当时的情况。}
content_en: "Please tell me more about what happened back then."

content: {在火焰燃起之前，精灵之森突然陷入死寂，树木开始不自然地枯败，就和现在传言的状况非常相似。}
content_en: "Before the flames rose, the Elvenwood suddenly fell into dead silence. The trees began to wither unnaturally, very much like the rumors now."

content: {具体是什么样的征兆？}
content_en: "What specific signs were there?"

content: {枯萎中带着一种诡异的绿色火焰气息，冰冷而令人不适。}
content_en: "The withering carried a strange aura of green flames—cold and unsettling."

content: {绿色火焰？这听起来像是某种黑暗魔法的作用。}
content_en: "Green flames? That sounds like the work of some dark magic."

content: {大火中我确实看到了绿色火焰，还听到了刺耳的冷笑声。}
content_en: "I did see green flames in the fire, and I heard a piercing, cold laughter."

content: {冷笑声？这意味着是人为造成的吗？}
content_en: "Cold laughter? That suggests it was man-made?"

content: {我不能确定，但瓦妮莎可能知道更多内情。}
content_en: "I cannot be certain, but Vanessa might know more."

content: {瓦妮莎？你之前偶然提及的那位精灵？}
content_en: "Vanessa? That Elf you mentioned before?"

content: {是的。她向来沉默寡言，而那场大火之后，我们便走上了不同的道路。}
content_en: "Yes. She has always been taciturn. After that fire, we went our separate ways."

content: {你沉思片刻，意识到这些信息可能至关重要}
content_en: You pondered for a moment, realizing this information might be crucial.

content: {能否再回忆更多细节？这对调查或许有巨大帮助。}
content_en: "Can you recall more details? This could be of great help to the investigation."

content: {大火发生前，森林异常寂静，动物纷纷逃离，树木无缘无故地枯萎。}
content_en: "Before the fire, the forest was eerily quiet. Animals fled, and trees withered for no reason."

content: {这确实和现在边境报告的情况很吻合。}
content_en: "That does align closely with the current border reports."

content: {然后绿色火焰就燃了起来，浓烟中夹杂着冷笑声，而精灵们……似乎早已撤离了。}
content_en: "Then the green flames ignited. Harsh laughter mixed with the thick smoke, and the Elves... seemed to have evacuated long before."

content: {撤离？精灵族当时没有警告你吗？}
content_en: "Evacuated? Didn't the Elves warn you at the time?"

content: {我不知道原因。也许我被遗弃了，也许其中另有隐情。}
content_en: "I don't know why. Perhaps I was abandoned. Perhaps there were other circumstances."

content: {如此看来，当前的枯萎事件可能并非偶然。}
content_en: "It seems the current blight may not be accidental."

content: {我有一种强烈的直觉，这次事件与过去的悲剧存在着某种联系。}
content_en: "I have a strong intuition that this incident is connected to the past tragedy in some way."

content: {你注意到贝拉拉的手微微颤抖，递给她一杯水}
content_en: You noticed Belala's hands trembling slightly and offered her a cup of water.

content: {精灵族的高层，比如瑞亚和克罗洛丝，他们了解你的这些经历吗？}
content_en: "Do the higher-ups of the Elves, like Rhea and Crolos, know about these experiences of yours?"

content: {她们可能并不清楚细节。大火之后，我独自流浪了很长一段时间。}
content_en: "They might not know the details. After the fire, I wandered alone for a long time."

content: {你的直觉和记忆是非常宝贵的线索，我会格外谨慎。}
content_en: "Your intuition and memories are invaluable clues. I will proceed with extra caution."

content: {城主，请你一定要小心。那场大火让我失去了家园和太多东西。}
content_en: "Lord, please be very careful. That fire cost me my home and so much more."

content: {我明白你的恐惧。但邀请已经接受，我们无法退缩。}
content_en: "I understand your fear. But the invitation has been accepted. We cannot retreat now."

content: {我知道你决心已定……但请务必做好万全的准备。}
content_en: "I know your mind is made up... But please, prepare thoroughly."

content: {你会考虑加入调查小队吗？}
content_en: "Would you consider joining the investigation team?"

content: {我……我不确定族人的下落，恐怕帮不上大忙，但我愿意分享所有我知道的事情。}
content_en: "I... I'm unsure of my kin's whereabouts. I'm afraid I might not be of much help. But I am willing to share everything I know."

content: {你分享的故事本身就是极其关键的线索。}
content_en: "The stories you share are themselves crucial clues."

content: {那种绿色火焰，很可能是某种侵蚀生命力的黑暗魔法。}
content_en: "That green flame is likely a form of dark magic that erodes life force."

content: {精灵族魔法强大，为何当时无法阻止？}
content_en: "If Elven magic is so powerful, why couldn't they stop it back then?"

content: {也许……这次的枯萎预示着某种更古老、更黑暗的力量正在苏醒。}
content_en: "Perhaps... this current blight signals the awakening of something older and darker."

content: {像是那些被历史刻意掩盖的部分？}
content_en: "Yes. It feels like parts of history deliberately buried."

content: {克罗洛丝或许知道一些内情，瓦妮莎肯定知道得更多。}
content_en: "Crolos might know some of the inside story. Vanessa definitely knows more."

content: {你站起身，目光望向精灵之森的方向}
content_en: You stood up, your gaze turning toward the direction of the Elvenwood.

content: {我会与克罗洛丝深入谈谈，也会设法接触瓦妮莎。非常感谢你告诉我这一切。}
content_en: "I will have a deeper talk with Crolos and also try to contact Vanessa. Thank you very much for telling me all this."

content: {我只是不希望再有人经历我所承受过的痛苦。}
content_en: "I just don't want anyone else to go through the pain I endured."

content: {我向你承诺，会全力查明真相，守护这片土地的和平。}
content_en: "I promise you, I will do everything to uncover the truth and protect the peace of this land."

content: {愿你的旅程平安。我会在城里为你祈祷。}
content_en: "May your journey be safe. I will pray for you in the city."

content: {贝拉拉神情依旧忧虑，你轻轻拍了拍她的肩，试图给予一些安慰}
content_en: Belala still looked worried. You gently patted her shoulder, trying to offer some comfort.

content: {我会带着你的警示前行，一切会水落石出的。}
content_en: "I will carry your warning with me. The truth will come out."

content: {请务必平安归来。}
content_en: "Please, please return safely."

content: {你站在城墙上，远眺着远方精灵之森的方向，目光深沉。贝拉拉轻盈地走到你身边，她的目光同样投向那片森林}
content_en: You stood on the city wall, looking deeply toward the distant Elvenwood. Belala approached you lightly, her gaze also fixed on the forest.

content: {贝拉拉，我仔细思考了你之前说的话。}
content_en: "Belala, I've been thinking carefully about what you said before."

content: {所以你仍然决定要去吗？}
content_en: "So you still decided to go?"

content: {是的。森林的枯萎问题关系到所有种族的安危，我不能袖手旁观。}
content_en: "Yes. The forest blight concerns the safety of all races. I cannot stand by."

content: {但这趟旅程的风险太大了，我担心会重蹈从前的覆辙。}
content_en: "But this journey is too risky. I fear history might repeat itself."

content: {正因为存在风险，我们才更需要采取行动。}
content_en: "Precisely because there is risk, we must take action."

content: {我明白。你总是这样勇敢。}
content_en: "I understand. You are always so brave."

content: {这不是勇敢，而是责任。就像瑞亚守护她的家园一样，这是我们必须承担的责任。}
content_en: "It's not bravery; it's responsibility. Just like how Rhea protects her home, it's a duty we must bear."

content: {可是...我连自己的森林都没有守护好，至今想起来仍然感到愧疚。}
content_en: "But... I couldn't even protect my own forest. I still feel guilty when I think about it."

content: {那不是你的过错。而现在，我们有机会一起阻止悲剧重演。}
content_en: "That wasn't your fault. And now, we have a chance to prevent tragedy from happening again together."

content: {你会带上瑞亚和克罗洛丝同行吗？}
content_en: "Will you take Rhea and Crolos with you?"

content: {当然。他们作为精灵使者，会为我们提供必要的指引。}
content_en: "Of course. As Elven envoys, they will provide the necessary guidance."

content: {那么...我只能在这里为你送上祝福了。}
content_en: "Then... all I can do is offer you my blessings here."

content: {你的祝福就是我最需要的力量。贝拉拉，在我离开期间，你愿意代为管理这座城市吗？}
content_en: "Your blessings are the strength I need most. Belala, would you manage the city in my absence?"

content: {我？我可以胜任吗？我只是个喜欢恶作剧的精灵而已。}
content_en: "Me? Am I capable? I'm just an Elf who likes pranks."

content: {你曾经为城市的繁荣做出过很多贡献，你的智慧值得信赖。}
content_en: "You've contributed much to the city's prosperity. Your wisdom is trustworthy."

content: {感谢你的信任。我一定会尽力维护城市的和平。}
content_en: "Thank you for your trust. I will do my best to maintain the city's peace."

content: {请记住，要像克罗洛丝那样，细致记录日常事务，保持敏锐的观察。}
content_en: "Remember, be meticulous like Crolos in recording daily affairs. Stay observant."

content: {好的。我会特别留意任何异常情况，尤其是与森林枯萎有关的迹象。}
content_en: "Alright. I will pay special attention to any anomalies, especially signs related to the forest blight."

content: {如果发现绿色火焰的踪迹，请立即用魔法信号联系我。}
content_en: "If you find traces of green flames, contact me immediately with a magic signal."

content: {我承诺会坚守岗位，不会不告而别。}
content_en: "I promise I will stay at my post. I won't disappear without a word."

content: {这样我就放心了。我们明天一早就出发。}
content_en: "That puts my mind at ease. We depart at dawn tomorrow."

content: {请允许我为你举行精灵的古老祝福仪式。}
content_en: "Please allow me to perform an ancient Elven blessing ceremony for you."

content: {我很感激。}
content_en: "I would be grateful."

content: {愿星辰指引你的道路，愿森林回应你的呼唤。}
content_en: "May the stars guide your path. May the forest answer your call."

content: {谢谢您，贝拉拉。你的支持让我更加坚定。}
content_en: "Thank you, Belala. Your support makes me more determined."

content: {你一定要平安回来。这座城市需要你}
content_en: "You must come back safely. This city needs you."

content: {我一定会的。真相终将水落石出。}
content_en: "I will. The truth will come out."

content: {我会每天在花园记录各项事务，等待你的消息。}
content_en: "I will record all affairs daily in the garden, waiting for your news."

content: {请保持希望。这或许也是你寻找族人的一个好机会。}
content_en: "Keep hope. This might also be a good chance for you to find your kin."

content: {希望如此。再见。}
content_en: "I hope so. Goodbye."

content: {再见，贝拉拉。请守护好我们的家园。}
content_en: "Goodbye, Belala. Please guard our home."

content: {贝拉拉挥手告别，你转身准备出发。远处，精灵之森在暮色中若隐若现}
content_en: Belala waved goodbye. You turned to prepare for departure. In the distance, the Elvenwood was faintly visible in the twilight.

content: {贝拉拉望着你离去的背影，轻声吟唱起古老的精灵祷文。她的眼中闪烁着担忧与希望交织的光芒}
content_en: Belala watched your receding figure and softly chanted an ancient Elven prayer. Her eyes shimmered with a mix of worry and hope.

content: {你走下城墙，脚步坚定。明天，一段新的旅程即将开始}
content_en: You descended the city wall with firm steps. Tomorrow, a new journey would begin.

content: {贝拉拉刚离开房间，你正独自沉思，门被轻轻推开，达菲和露米一同走了进来}
content_en: Belala had just left the room. You were lost in thought when the door opened quietly, and Duffy and Lumi entered together.

content: {达菲，你来了？这位是……}
content_en: "Duffy, you're here? And this is..."

content: {城主大人，这是露米，她有事想和您谈谈。}
content_en: "Lord, this is Lumi. She has something she wishes to discuss with you."

content: {城主大人，您好。}
content_en: "Lord, hello."

content: {露米？我记得你，你是那个精灵混血的女孩。有什么事吗？}
content_en: "Lumi? I remember you. You're the half-Elf girl. What is it?"

content: {我听说您即将有一次重要的行动，请务必带上我。}
content_en: "I heard you are about to undertake an important mission. Please, you must take me with you."

content: {带上你？这次行动可能很危险，你不必勉强自己。}
content_en: "Take you? This mission may be dangerous. You don't have to push yourself."

content: {我不怕危险。我能感知魔法元素，或许能帮上忙。}
content_en: "I'm not afraid of danger. I can sense magical elements. Perhaps I can be of help."

content: {哼，别看露米平时内向，她的魔法能力可是很强的。}
content_en: "Hmph, don't let Lumi's usual shyness fool you. Her magical abilities are quite strong."

content: {谢谢你的好意，但为什么突然想加入？}
content_en: "Thank you for your kindness, but why do you suddenly want to join?"

content: {我想为这座城市做点什么。成为精灵和人类之间的桥梁，这是我的愿望。}
content_en: "I want to do something for this city. To become a bridge between Elves and humans—that is my wish."

content: {桥梁？这听起来很有意义。}
content_en: "A bridge? That sounds very meaningful."

content: {是的，我经历过孤独和挣扎，但现在我想用我的力量帮助他人。}
content_en: "Yes. I've experienced loneliness and struggle, but now I want to use my power to help others."

content: {城主大人，露米的能力确实独特，或许能弥补我们队伍的不足。}
content_en: "Lord, Lumi's abilities are indeed unique. They might compensate for what our team lacks."

content: {你说得对，我的思路似乎被打开了。这次行动需要更多助力。}
content_en: "You're right. My perspective seems to have broadened. This mission requires more support."

content: {除了露米，我还想到两个人选：帕特拉和斯莉德。}
content_en: "Besides Lumi, I can think of two other candidates: Patra and Slider."

content: {帕特拉？是那个从古老遗迹中苏醒的精灵吗？}
content_en: "Patra? The Elf who awoke from an ancient ruin?"

content: {正是她。帕特拉见识过历史兴衰，或许能提供宝贵的见解。}
content_en: "That's her. Patra has witnessed the rise and fall of history. She might provide valuable insight."

content: {那斯莉德呢？她不是那个被创造的战争精灵吗？}
content_en: "And Slider? Isn't she the created war-elf?"

content: {斯莉德战斗经验丰富，虽然孤傲，但实力不容小觑。}
content_en: "Slider has rich combat experience. Though aloof, her strength is not to be underestimated."

content: {城主大人，多一个人多一份力量，我相信她们会愿意帮忙的。}
content_en: "Lord, more people mean more strength. I believe they would be willing to help."

content: {但她们会同意加入吗？我担心这太突然了。}
content_en: "But will they agree to join? I worry it's too sudden."

content: {交给我吧，我和她们有些交情，应该能说服她们。}
content_en: "Leave it to me. I have some acquaintance with them and should be able to persuade them."

content: {达菲，你总是这么可靠。那露米，你确定要加入吗？}
content_en: "Duffy, you're always so reliable. Then, Lumi, are you sure you want to join?"

content: {我确定。这是我的选择，也是我的责任。}
content_en: "I am sure. This is my choice and my responsibility."

content: {你的勇气让我感动。露米，欢迎加入。}
content_en: "Your courage moves me. Lumi, welcome aboard."

content: {城主大人，那我现在就去邀请帕特拉和斯莉德？}
content_en: "Lord, should I go invite Patra and Slider now?"

content: {好，拜托你了。越快越好，我们时间不多了。}
content_en: "Yes, please do. The sooner, the better. We are running out of time."

content: {放心，我这就去办。}
content_en: "Don't worry. I'll handle it right away."

content: {城主大人，谢谢您给我这个机会。}
content_en: "Lord, thank you for giving me this opportunity."

content: {不，是我该谢谢你。你的加入让我看到了新的希望。}
content_en: "No, I should thank you. Your joining shows me new hope."

content: {那我先走了，露米，你陪城主大人聊聊细节吧。}
content_en: "Then I'll take my leave. Lumi, stay and discuss the details with the Lord."

content: {达菲，路上小心。}
content_en: "Duffy, be careful on your way."

content: {知道了，别啰嗦。}
content_en: "I know. Don't be so long-winded."

content: {达菲转身离开房间，你和露米继续交谈}
content_en: Duffy turned and left the room. You continued conversing with Lumi.

content: {露米，能具体说说你的魔法能力吗？}
content_en: "Lumi, can you be specific about your magical abilities?"

content: {我能感知周围的魔法流动，尤其是元素变化，这或许能帮我们避开陷阱。}
content_en: "I can sense the flow of magic around me, especially elemental changes. It might help us avoid traps."

content: {这确实很有用。你以前用过这种能力吗？}
content_en: "That is indeed very useful. Have you used this ability before?"

content: {在魔法遗迹中，我靠它化险为夷。但更重要的是，我能融合人类和精灵的魔法。}
content_en: "In magical ruins, I relied on it to navigate dangers. But more importantly, I can fuse human and Elven magic."

content: {融合魔法？这听起来很独特。}
content_en: "Fuse magic? That sounds unique."

content: {是的，虽然过程痛苦，但现在我能控制它了。}
content_en: "Yes. The process was painful, but now I can control it."

content: {痛苦？你经历了很多啊。}
content_en: "Painful? You've been through a lot."

content: {都是为了成长。城主大人，您似乎也很不容易。}
content_en: "It was all for growth. Lord, you seem to have had your share of difficulties too."

content: {我？我只是在学着当好一个城主。}
content_en: "Me? I'm just learning how to be a good Lord."

content: {达菲说过，您是个善良的人，愿意为和平努力。}
content_en: "Duffy said you are a kind person, willing to work for peace."

content: {达菲那家伙，居然会夸我？}
content_en: "That girl, she actually praised me?"

content: {她虽然傲娇，但心里很认可您。}
content_en: "She may act aloof, but she respects you deep down."

content: {哈哈，是啊。露米，这次行动要去精灵之森，你对那里熟悉吗？}
content_en: "Haha, indeed. Lumi, this mission is to the Elvenwood. Are you familiar with such places?"

content: {精灵之森？我去过类似的地方，或许能帮上忙。}
content_en: "The Elvenwood? I've been to similar places. Perhaps I can help."

content: {那太好了。我们可能需要和精灵族打交道。}
content_en: "That's great. We may need to interact with the Elves."

content: {我会尽力协助的。城主大人，您对和平的追求让我敬佩。}
content_en: "I will assist to the best of my ability. Lord, your pursuit of peace is admirable."

content: {这只是我的本心。露米，你曾说过你知道自己的死期，现在呢？}
content_en: "It's simply what my heart tells me. Lumi, you once said you knew the time of your death. What about now?"

content: {我不再被命运束缚了。生命的意义在于深度，而不是长度。}
content_en: "I am no longer bound by fate. The meaning of life lies in its depth, not its length."

content: {说得好。我们都要珍惜当下。}
content_en: "Well said. We should all cherish the present."

content: {嗯。城主大人，行动什么时候开始？}
content_en: "Mhm. Lord, when does the mission begin?"

content: {三日后出发。这期间，你可以准备一下。}
content_en: "We depart in three days. During this time, you can prepare."

content: {我会的。需要我帮忙联系其他精灵吗？}
content_en: "I will. Do you need me to contact other Elves?"

content: {暂时不用，先等达菲的消息吧。}
content_en: "Not for now. Let's wait for Duffy's news first."

content: {好。城主大人，您看起来有些疲惫，要休息一下吗？}
content_en: "Alright. Lord, you look a bit tired. Would you like to rest?"

content: {没事，我只是在思考接下来的计划。}
content_en: "It's fine. I'm just thinking about the upcoming plans."

content: {如果有需要，我随时都在。}
content_en: "If you need anything, I am always here."

content: {谢谢你，露米。你的加入让我安心不少。}
content_en: "Thank you, Lumi. Your joining puts my mind at ease."

content: {这是我应该做的。}
content_en: "It's what I should do."

content: {门外传来脚步声，达菲匆匆返回}
content_en: Footsteps sounded outside the door, and Duffy hurried back in.

content: {城主大人，我找到帕特拉和斯莉德了！}
content_en: "Lord! I found Patra and Slider!"

content: {这么快？她们怎么说？}
content_en: "So quickly? What did they say?"

content: {她们一听是您需要帮助，立刻就答应了。}
content_en: "As soon as they heard you needed help, they agreed immediately."

content: {真的吗？我太感动了。}
content_en: "Really? I'm so touched."

content: {哼，别高兴太早，我只是转达了您的请求。}
content_en: "Hmph, don't celebrate too soon. I just conveyed your request."

content: {达菲，你又帮了我大忙。}
content_en: "Duffy, you've helped me greatly again."

content: {少来这套。露米，你也准备一下，三日后集合。}
content_en: "Cut it out. Lumi, you prepare as well. We assemble in three days."

content: {好的，达菲。}
content_en: "Understood, Duffy."

content: {那我们就这么说定了。达菲，辛苦你了。}
content_en: "Then it's settled. Duffy, thank you for your hard work."

content: {没事，反正我也是城主府的管家。}
content_en: "No problem. I am the manor's steward, after all."

content: {有你在，真是我的幸运。}
content_en: "Having you here is truly my fortune."

content: {别说这种肉麻的话！我走了。}
content_en: "Stop with the mushy talk! I'm leaving."

content: {达菲红着脸离开，露米微笑看着你}
content_en: Duffy left, her face slightly flushed. Lumi smiled as she watched you.

content: {露米，我们也去准备吧。}
content_en: "Lumi, let's go prepare as well."

content: {是，城主大人。}
content_en: "Yes, Lord."

content: {三日后清晨，晨光微熹，城门口已聚集起一支整装待发的队伍。你站在队伍前方，看着达菲带着帕特拉和斯莉德从不远处走来。}
content_en: Three days later, at dawn, a fully equipped team had gathered at the city gate. You stood at the front, watching as Duffy approached with Patra and Slider from a short distance away.

content: {大家早上好。达菲，她们都到齐了吗？}
content_en: "Good morning, everyone. Duffy, are they all here?"

content: {帕特拉和斯莉德都已准时抵达。}
content_en: "Patra and Slider have arrived on time."

content: {许久不见。}
content_en: "It has been a long time."

content: {奉召前来。}
content_en: "I have come as summoned."

content: {感谢二位愿意加入此次行程。}
content_en: "Thank you both for agreeing to join this journey."

content: {恰逢其会罢了，不必多想。}
content_en: "Merely a timely coincidence. No need for excessive thought."

content: {我厌恶背信，但你的邀约值得回应。}
content_en: "I despise betrayal, but your invitation merits a response."

content: {我明白这份心意。达菲，邀请过程可还顺利？}
content_en: "I understand this sentiment. Duffy, was the invitation process smooth?"

content: {比预想中顺利。听闻你需要助力，她们当即应允同行。}
content_en: "Smoother than expected. Hearing you needed aid, they agreed to accompany us immediately."

content: {这份信任令我感动，我必不负所托。}
content_en: "This trust moves me. I will not fail it."

content: {哼，我只是想亲眼见证这个时代的变迁。}
content_en: "Hmph. I simply wish to witness the changes of this era with my own eyes."

content: {战斗是我的天性，但此次是为和平而行。}
content_en: "Combat is my nature, but this time it is for peace."

content: {追求和平正是我们共同的目标。斯莉德，你比往日似乎多了几分从容。}
content_en: "The pursuit of peace is precisely our shared goal. Slider, you seem somewhat more composed than in the past."

content: {或许。虚妄的阴影已不再纠缠于我。}
content_en: "Perhaps. Vain shadows no longer entangle me."

content: {队伍整备完毕，可以启程了。}
content_en: "The team is fully prepared. We can depart."

content: {启程前，我还有几句话想说。}
content_en: "Before we set off, I have a few words."

content: {人类总偏爱这种形式化的宣言。}
content_en: "Humans always favor such formal declarations."

content: {帕特拉，此言并非虚礼。诸位，我们此行不为征战，是为缔结和平而去。}
content_en: "Patra, these words are not empty courtesy. Everyone, we journey not for conquest, but to forge peace."

content: {和平？听来遥不可及。}
content_en: "Peace? It sounds distant."

content: {正因其艰难，更需竭力争取。我曾是异乡客，而今愿守护此城与它的未来。}
content_en: "Precisely because it is difficult, we must strive for it all the more. I was once a stranger from another land, but now I wish to protect this city and its future."

content: {我们必将全力协助。}
content_en: "We will assist with all our strength."

content: {感谢露米。帕特拉，你曾亲历信仰的虚妄，对此行有何见解？}
content_en: "Thank you, Lumi. Patra, you have personally experienced the emptiness of faith. What are your thoughts on this journey?"

content: {神祇从未存在，人才是根本。不过你的理想……倒不算令人厌烦。}
content_en: "Deities never existed. People are the foundation. However, your ideal... is not entirely disagreeable."

content: {我憎恶战争，但若为和平而战，我可倾力相助。}
content_en: "I detest war, but if it is for peace, I can devote myself to the fight."

content: {斯莉德，能得你此言，我心甚慰。达菲，可有补充？}
content_en: "Slider, I am heartened to hear you say that. Duffy, anything to add?"

content: {时辰不早，该动身了。}
content_en: The hour is growing late. We should set off.

content: {好，我便长话短说。此行前往精灵之森，旨在通商修好，而非挑起争端。}
content_en: Good, I'll keep it brief. This journey to the Elvenwood aims to foster trade and goodwill, not to provoke conflict.

content: {精灵之森？我熟悉路径，可担任向导。}
content_en: The Elvenwood? I know the paths well. I can serve as guide.

content: {那便有劳了。斯莉德，沿途安危还需仰仗你的武艺。}
content_en: Then I'll trouble you with that. Slider, we'll also rely on your martial skills for safety along the way.

content: {自当尽责。}
content_en: I will fulfill my duty.

content: {请诸位牢记，无论遭遇何种艰险，我们休戚与共。}
content_en: Everyone, please remember: no matter what hardships we face, we share a common destiny.

content: {话既已毕，该出发了。}
content_en: Since the words are finished, we should depart.

content: {嗯。有诸位同行，我信心倍增。}
content_en: Yes. With all of you alongside, my confidence has grown.

content: {别寄予厚望，我不过是个旁观者。}
content_en: Don't place too much hope. I am merely an observer.

content: {我只做分内之事。}
content_en: I only do what is my part.

content: {如此足矣。出发！}
content_en: That is enough. Move out!

content: {队伍缓缓向城外行进，你与达菲并肩走在最前。}
content_en: The team slowly proceeded out of the city. You walked at the front, side by side with Duffy.

content: {方才的动员，倒像点样子。}
content_en: "That mobilization earlier was somewhat decent."

content: {难得听你夸赞。}
content_en: "It's rare to hear you praise me."

content: {少得意！只是未失体统罢了。}
content_en: "Don't get cocky! It was merely not unbecoming of you."

content: {口是心非的兽人，着实有趣。}
content_en: "A beastkin who says one thing and means another is quite amusing."

content: {行军途中，保持静肃为佳。}
content_en: "During a march, maintaining silence is best."

content: {诸位提高警觉，但也不必过于紧绷。}
content_en: "Everyone, stay alert, but there's no need to be overly tense."

content: {前路平坦，元素流动平稳。}
content_en: "The road ahead is smooth. The elemental flow is stable."

content: {有劳探察。帕特拉，精灵之森近年可有变故？}
content_en: "Thank you for scouting. Patra, have there been changes in the Elvenwood in recent years?"

content: {那片秘境虽为精灵所据，但人族往来不绝。如今恐已物换星移。}
content_en: "Although that hidden realm is held by the Elves, humans come and go incessantly. Now, I fear things have already changed."

content: {精灵族……素来排外，尤忌混血。}
content_en: "The Elves... have always been exclusionary, especially wary of half-breeds."

content: {我会谨言慎行。}
content_en: "I will watch my words and actions."

content: {不必忧惧，我们同心协力。}
content_en: "No need for excessive worry. We face this together."

content: {你未免太过乐观。精灵之森非是游赏之地。}
content_en: "You are far too optimistic. The Elvenwood is not a place for sightseeing."

content: {我深知其中险阻，故已做万全准备。}
content_en: "I am well aware of the dangers, hence I've made thorough preparations."

content: {城主，你确比往昔沉稳许多。}
content_en: "Lord, you are indeed much steadier than before."

content: {全仗诸位扶持。}
content_en: "It is all thanks to everyone's support."

content: {成长……总是好事。}
content_en: "Growth... is always a good thing."

content: {斯莉德，近日可还安好？}
content_en: "Slider, have you been well lately?"

content: {栖身村落，渐惯平淡。}
content_en: "Residing in a village, gradually accustomed to a simple life."

content: {征战非是唯一归宿。}
content_en: "Warfare is not the only destiny."

content: {或许。然此为我选之路。}
content_en: "Perhaps. But this is the path I have chosen."

content: {人各有志，幸能同途共济。}
content_en: "Each person has their own will. I am fortunate we can share this journey."

content: {此言不虚。较之古朝帝王，你更明事理。}
content_en: "That is true. Compared to the emperors of ancient dynasties, you are more reasonable."

content: {承蒙嘉许。达菲，预计几日可抵精灵之森？}
content_en: "I am honored by your praise. Duffy, how many days do you estimate before we reach the Elvenwood?"

content: {按眼下行程，约需五日。商道畅通，无需绕行。}
content_en: "At our current pace, about five days. The trade route is clear. No need to detour."

content: {甚好。保持当前步调，今夜在驿站休整。}
content_en: "Excellent. Maintain the current pace. We'll rest at the post station tonight."

content: {驿站喧杂，令人烦厌。}
content_en: "Post stations are noisy and annoying."

content: {我可布下静音结界。}
content_en: "I can set up a sound-dampening barrier."

content: {那便拜托了。}
content_en: "I'll leave that to you, then."

content: {莫要事事倚仗他人。}
content_en: "Don't rely on others for everything."

content: {你又来训诫我了。}
content_en: "You're lecturing me again."

content: {年轻的城主，倒是朝气蓬勃。}
content_en: "Young Lord, you are indeed full of vitality."

content: {队伍沿着商道稳步前行，朝阳将众人的身影拉长。沿途可见商队往来，蹄声铃响交织成旅途的韵律。你与同伴们时而交谈，时而静默，队伍在初秋的晨光中渐行渐远。}
content_en: The team moved steadily along the trade route. The morning sun stretched their shadows long. Along the way, merchant caravans could be seen coming and going, the sounds of hooves and bells weaving into the rhythm of the journey. You and your companions conversed at times and fell silent at others, the team gradually moving further away in the early autumn morning light.

content: {晚上，队伍抵达一家喧闹的酒馆休憩，室内人声鼎沸，烛光摇曳。你注意到角落里一名少女独自坐着，她身旁的刀在昏暗光线下泛着冷光，格外显眼。}
content_en: At night, the team arrived at a noisy tavern to rest. The interior was bustling with voices, candlelight flickering. You noticed a young girl sitting alone in a corner. The blade beside her gleamed coldly in the dim light, particularly conspicuous.

content: {这里人真多，大家先找位置坐下吧。达菲，你去安排一下住宿和饮食。}
content_en: "There are so many people here. Everyone, find seats first. Duffy, please arrange accommodations and meals."

content: {知道了。城主大人，请您不要独自乱跑，注意安全。}
content_en: "Understood. Lord, please don't wander off alone. Be careful."

content: {我就在附近看看，不会走远。那位独坐少女的刀，似乎有些特别。}
content_en: "I'll just look around nearby. I won't go far. That blade of the girl sitting alone seems rather special."

content: {你缓步走向角落，巴托里立刻警觉地抬头，手按在刀柄上。}
content_en: You walked slowly toward the corner. Batory immediately looked up, alert, her hand on her sword hilt.

content: {你好，我叫城主，是途经此地的旅人。你的刀造型独特，能否冒昧问问它的来历？}
content_en: Hello. I am the Lord, a traveler passing through. Your blade has a unique design. May I ask about its origins?

content: {你是谁？不要靠近我。}
content_en: Who are you? Don't come any closer.

content: {抱歉，我并无恶意。只是觉得这把刀让我有种熟悉的错觉。}
content_en: Apologies, I mean no harm. It's just that this blade gives me a familiar feeling, perhaps an illusion.

content: {它叫风煞，不是你能随意打听的东西。}
content_en: It is called Windbane. It is not something for you to casually inquire about.

content: {风煞？好名字。它让我想起一位故人，或许是我多心了。}
content_en: Windbane? A good name. It reminds me of an old friend. Maybe I'm overthinking.

content: {故人？你认识须佐真希？}
content_en: An old friend? Do you know SusaMaki?

content: {须佐真希？我并不认识，但曾听人提起过这个名字。你能否多告诉我一些关于她的事？}
content_en: SusaMaki? I don't know her, but I've heard the name mentioned. Could you tell me more about her?

content: {你为何想知道这些？}
content_en: Why do you want to know?

content: {我对刀剑本身有些兴趣，而且……你独自坐在这里，似乎需要个说话的人。}
content_en: I have some interest in blades themselves, and... you're sitting here alone, perhaps in need of someone to talk to.

content: {朋友？我不需要。但你的眼神……不像有歹意。}
content_en: A friend? I don't need one. But your eyes... don't seem malicious.

content: {谢谢你的信任。我可以坐下聊几句吗？}
content_en: Thank you for your trust. May I sit and talk for a moment?

content: {可以，但别耽误我太久。}
content_en: You may. But don't keep me long.

content: {好。这把刀是须佐真希赠予你的吗？}
content_en: Alright. Was this blade given to you by SusaMaki?

content: {是。她救过我，并将风煞交给了我。}
content_en: Yes. She saved me and entrusted Windbane to me.

content: {她是个怎样的人？}
content_en: What kind of person was she?

content: {强大、沉默，却内心温柔。她指引我变强。}
content_en: Powerful, silent, yet gentle inside. She guided me to become stronger.

content: {变强？是为了什么？}
content_en: Stronger? For what purpose?

content: {为了复仇，也为了不辜负她的期望。}
content_en: For revenge, and to live up to her expectations.

content: {我明白。我也在努力不辜负身边人的期望。}
content_en: I understand. I, too, am striving not to let down those around me.

content: {你？你看上去像个养尊处优的贵族。}
content_en: You? You look like a pampered noble.

content: {我是城主，但曾经也迷茫过，和普通人并无不同。}
content_en: I am the Lord, but I was once lost, no different from ordinary people.

content: {城主？那个主张和平的城主？}
content_en: The Lord? The one who advocates for peace?

content: {你听说过我？}
content_en: You've heard of me?

content: {嗯。商队里有人提过你。你……和传闻中不太一样。}
content_en: Mhm. People in the caravans mention you. You... are not quite like the rumors.

content: {谢谢。巴托里，你一直独自旅行吗？}
content_en: Thank you. Batory, have you always traveled alone?

content: {是。我在修行，磨炼剑术。}
content_en: Yes. I am training, honing my swordsmanship.

content: {剑术？我能近距离看看你的刀吗？}
content_en: Swordsmanship? Could I take a closer look at your blade?

content: {不行！风煞煞气太重，会伤到你。}
content_en: No! Windbane carries too much killing intent. It could harm you.

content: {抱歉，是我冒失了。但你保持警惕是好事。}
content_en: I apologize for my presumption. But staying vigilant is wise.

content: {我讨厌被人打扰，不过你……不算讨厌。}
content_en: I hate being disturbed, but you... aren't so bothersome.

content: {那我们可以算作朋友吗？}
content_en: Then, could we consider each other friends?

content: {朋友……或许吧。城主，你要去精灵之森？}
content_en: Friends... perhaps. Lord, are you going to the Elvenwood?

content: {是，你怎么会知道？}
content_en: Yes. How did you know?

content: {我听路过的商人说的。那里近来不太平。}
content_en: I heard from passing merchants. That place has been uneasy lately.

content: {你有更具体的消息吗？}
content_en: Do you have more specific news?

content: {精灵族内部有纷争，但详情我不便多说。}
content_en: There is internal strife among the Elves, but the details are not mine to share.

content: {谢谢你的提醒。巴托里，须佐真希现在何处？}
content_en: Thank you for the warning. Batory, where is SusaMaki now?

content: {我不知道。她离开了，但我会找到她。}
content_en: I don't know. She left, but I will find her.

content: {希望你们能重逢。这把刀对你很重要吧？}
content_en: I hope you reunite. This blade must be very important to you?

content: {嗯。它是我存在的意义。}
content_en: Mhm. It is the meaning of my existence.

content: {我也有必须守护的东西。巴托里，若你将来需要帮助，可以来城主府找我。}
content_en: I too have things I must protect. Batory, if you ever need help in the future, you can come to the manor.

content: {帮助？我不需要。但……这个给你。}
content_en: Help? I don't need it. But... take this.

content: {这是什么？}
content_en: What is it?

content: {一件信物。须佐真希留下的，她说未来或有用处。}
content_en: A token. Left by SusaMaki. She said it might be useful in the future.

content: {信物？为何要交给我？}
content_en: A token? Why give it to me?

content: {你是个善良的人，或许它能帮你化解一次危机。}
content_en: You are a kind person. Perhaps it can help you avert a crisis once.

content: {谢谢，我会妥善保管。}
content_en: Thank you. I will keep it safe.

content: {别弄丢。它……能召唤一次援助。}
content_en: Don't lose it. It... can summon aid once.

content: {援助？是向须佐真希求助吗？}
content_en: Aid? To call SusaMaki for help?

content: {或许吧。我该走了。}
content_en: Perhaps. I should go now.

content: {等等，不和我们同行一段吗？}
content_en: Wait, won't you travel with us for a while?

content: {不。我的路还长。城主，保重。}
content_en: No. My path is still long. Lord, take care.

content: {你也是。愿你得偿所愿。}
content_en: You too. May you achieve what you seek.

content: {嗯。再见。}
content_en: Mhm. Goodbye.

content: {巴托里起身离去，你目送她的背影消失在门口，将信物小心收好。}
content_en: Batory stood up and left. You watched her figure disappear through the door, then carefully stored the token away.

content: {城主大人，您刚才在和谁交谈？}
content_en: "Lord, who were you speaking with just now?"

content: {达菲，我遇到一位叫巴托里的少女，她赠了我一件信物。}
content_en: "Duffy, I met a girl named Batory. She gave me a token."

content: {信物？您又随意收下陌生人的东西了！}
content_en: "A token? You're casually accepting things from strangers again!"

content: {这次不同，这信物或许关键时刻能派上用场。}
content_en: "This time is different. This token might come in handy at a critical moment."

content: {哼，随您吧。队伍已休整完毕，该继续赶路了。}
content_en: "Hmph, as you wish. The team has finished resting. It's time to continue."

content: {好，我们出发。}
content_en: "Alright. Let's move out."

content: {你收好信物，心中升起一丝希望，带领队伍走出酒馆，踏入夜色。}
content_en: You stored the token away, a glimmer of hope rising in your heart. You led the team out of the tavern and into the night.

content: {巴托里将信物交给你后，转身离去。你望着手中的信物，若有所思，指尖轻轻摩挲着那冰凉的材质，心中泛起一丝异样的预感。}
content_en: After Batory handed you the token and turned to leave, you gazed thoughtfully at the object in your hand, your fingers gently tracing its cold texture, a peculiar premonition stirring within.

content: {莉莉丝、阿古丽娅和露米一同走近你。}
content_en: Lilith, Aguria, and Lumi approached you together.

content: {看来巴托里已经走了，城主大人，您还在发呆吗？}
content_en: "It seems Batory has left, Lord. Are you still lost in thought?"

content: {刚刚收到这信物，我在想它或许会派上用场。不过现在，我们得先解决路线问题。}
content_en: "Just received this token. I was thinking it might prove useful. But for now, we need to address our route."

content: {是的，城主！我刚刚去探查过，主路被山洪冲毁了，工人们说至少要十天才能疏通。}
content_en: "Yes, Lord! I just scouted ahead. The main road was washed out by a mountain flood. The workers said it would take at least ten days to clear."

content: {十天太久了……我们等不了那么长时间。}
content_en: "Ten days is too long... We can't wait that long."

content: {没错，精灵之森的事情不能拖延。你们有什么建议吗？}
content_en: "Right, the Elvenwood matter cannot be delayed. Do any of you have suggestions?"

content: {哼，难道要我们飞过去吗？我的翅膀可带不动这么多人。}
content_en: "Hmph, are we supposed to fly over? My wings can't carry this many people."

content: {莉莉丝，别开玩笑。城主，我记得东边有一条旧道，但多年未用，可能已经荒废。}
content_en: "Lilith, don't joke. Lord, I recall an old path to the east, but it hasn't been used for years and may be overgrown."

content: {我听说过另一个方向。在北边，有一片森林，里面似乎有小路可以穿行。}
content_en: "I've heard of another direction. To the north, there's a forest. There seems to be a path through it."

content: {北边森林？露米，你确定吗？}
content_en: "The northern forest? Lumi, are you sure?"

content: {我不确定，只是从古籍上看到过。那里地形很复杂，没有向导的话，很容易迷路。}
content_en: "I'm not certain. I only read about it in ancient texts. The terrain there is very complex. Without a guide, it's easy to get lost."

content: {哦？小露米居然知道这种秘密小路？该不会是你编出来的吧？}
content_en: "Oh? Little Lumi knows such secret paths? You're not making this up, are you?"

content: {不，不是的！我真的在精灵的记载中读到过，那片森林连接着古老遗迹。}
content_en: "No, I'm not! I truly read about it in Elven records. That forest connects to ancient ruins."

content: {如果露米这么说，我相信她。但我们需要谨慎，森林里可能有危险。}
content_en: "If Lumi says so, I believe her. But we must be cautious. There may be dangers in the forest."

content: {危险总比耽误时间好。露米，你能详细说说那条小路吗？}
content_en: "Danger is better than delay. Lumi, can you describe the path in detail?"

content: {小路蜿蜒穿过森林，据说有魔法痕迹指引，但普通人难以察觉。我可以试试用我的感知能力。}
content_en: "The path winds through the forest. It's said to have magical traces as guides, but ordinary people can't detect them. I can try using my sensing ability."

content: {感知能力？别忘了你上次在遗迹里差点被困住，小露米。}
content_en: "Sensing ability? Don't forget you nearly got trapped in those ruins last time, little Lumi."

content: {那次是意外！这次我会小心的。}
content_en: "That was an accident! I'll be careful this time."

content: {城主，我觉得可以一试。我愿意带头探查，确保大家的安全。}
content_en: "Lord, I think we can give it a try. I'm willing to take the lead in scouting to ensure everyone's safety."

content: {好，那就这么定。莉莉丝，你负责警戒；阿古丽娅，你规划行进顺序；露米，你带路。}
content_en: "Good, it's decided then. Lilith, you're on alert duty. Aguria, you plan the marching order. Lumi, you lead the way."

content: {遵命，城主大人。不过，如果迷路了，可别怪我没提醒你。}
content_en: "As you command, Lord. But if we get lost, don't blame me for not warning you."

content: {我会尽力的……但我们需要尽快出发，天色不早了。}
content_en: "I'll do my best... But we need to set off soon. It's getting late."

content: {嗯，大家先去准备，明日一早就动身。}
content_en: "Mhm. Everyone, prepare. We depart at first light tomorrow."

content: {放心吧，城主！有我在，路上会种些向日葵做标记，不会迷失方向。}
content_en: "Don't worry, Lord! With me here, I'll plant sunflowers along the way as markers. We won't get lost."

content: {向日葵？阿古丽娅，你真是老样子。好吧，我也去检查一下宝石储备，或许能用来照明。}
content_en: "Sunflowers? Aguria, you're the same as always. Fine, I'll go check my gem reserves. They might be useful for lighting."

content: {谢谢你们信任我……我会努力不辜负大家的期望。}
content_en: "Thank you for trusting me... I'll strive not to let everyone down."

content: {露米，别紧张。我们是一个团队，互相照应。}
content_en: "Lumi, don't be nervous. We are a team. We'll watch out for each other."

content: {莉莉丝轻笑一声，转身离开。阿古丽娅拍拍露米的肩，露米点头微笑。}
content_en: Lilith chuckled lightly and turned to leave. Aguria patted Lumi's shoulder, and Lumi nodded with a smile.

content: {好了，各自去准备吧，我们明天见。}
content_en: "Alright, everyone, go prepare. We'll see each other tomorrow."

content: {次日清晨，你们一行人在露米的带领下抵达森林边缘。阳光透过繁茂的树叶洒下斑驳的光点，四周弥漫着泥土与草木的清新气息，气氛宁静而神秘。}
content_en: The next morning, under Lumi's guidance, your group arrived at the edge of the forest. Sunlight filtered through the dense leaves, casting dappled spots of light. The air was filled with the fresh scent of earth and vegetation, the atmosphere tranquil yet mysterious.

content: {森林边缘矗立着一座简陋的小屋，屋门突然吱呀一声打开，一个身影带着警惕走了出来。}
content_en: At the forest's edge stood a simple hut. Its door creaked open, and a figure emerged with caution.

content: {站住！你们是什么人？带这么多人来这里想做什么？}
content_en: "Halt! Who are you? What do you want, bringing so many people here?"

content: {请别误会！我们是过路的旅人，只是想借道穿过这片森林。}
content_en: "Please, don't misunderstand! We are travelers passing through. We only wish to cross this forest by way of a path."

content: {是的，我们没有任何恶意。我是露米，这位是城主大人。}
content_en: "Yes, we mean no harm. I am Lumi. This is the Lord."

content: {城主？哼，我从未听说过什么城主。你们带着武器，看起来像入侵者。}
content_en: "The Lord? Hmph, I've never heard of any Lord. You carry weapons. You look like intruders."

content: {我们是为了前往精灵之森，有紧急事务。主路被毁，只能从这里找小路。}
content_en: "We are on urgent business to the Elvenwood. The main road is destroyed. We can only seek a path through here."

content: {小路？这里没有路给外人走。立刻离开，否则我不客气了。}
content_en: "A path? There are no paths here for outsiders. Leave immediately, or I won't be polite."

content: {等等……我看您似乎很熟悉这片森林。我们能谈谈吗？}
content_en: Wait... You seem very familiar with this forest. Can we talk?

content: {谈什么？我独居在此，不欢迎外人。你们再靠近，我就拔刀了。}
content_en: Talk about what? I live here alone and do not welcome outsiders. Come any closer, and I'll draw my blade.

content: {你察觉到她的戒备，想起巴托里赠予的信物，立刻伸手入怀取出。}
content_en: You sense her wariness and remember the token Batory gave you. Immediately reaching into your robe, you take it out.

content: {请听我解释！我们收到一个信物，或许您认识。}
content_en: Please, hear me out! We received this token. Perhaps you recognize it.

content: {你拿出那块刻有彼岸花纹的玉珏。}
content_en: You present the jade pendant carved with a spider lily pattern.

content: {那是……玉珏？你怎么会有这个？}
content_en: That is... the jade pendant? How do you have this?

content: {昨天一位叫巴托里的人交给我的，说可能有用。您知道它？}
content_en: "A person named Batory gave it to me yesterday, saying it might be useful. Do you know it?"

content: {玉珏是须佐家的信物……我是须佐真希，在这里守候多年。}
content_en: "The jade pendant is the token of the Susa clan... I am SusaMaki. I have been guarding this place for many years."

content: {须佐真希？我听说过您！您是在等待姐姐佐伊苏醒，对吗？}
content_en: SusaMaki? I've heard of you! You are waiting for your sister Zoe to awaken, right?

content: {你竟然知道佐伊……看来这信物不假。但你们为何来此？}
content_en: "You actually know about Zoe... It seems this token is genuine. But why are you here?"

content: {我们想找一条穿过森林的小路，去精灵之森。您能帮我们吗？}
content_en: "We are looking for a path through the forest to reach the Elvenwood. Can you help us?"

content: {小路确实有，但危险重重。佐伊沉睡在附近，我不能让外人打扰她。}
content_en: "There is indeed a path, but it is fraught with danger. Zoe slumbers nearby. I cannot let outsiders disturb her."

content: {我们保证不会打扰。只是借道，事后必有重谢。}
content_en: "We promise not to disturb. We merely seek passage. We will repay you handsomely afterward."

content: {重谢？我不需要。但既然你有须佐家的信物，或许这是缘分。佐伊……她曾提起过精灵之森。}
content_en: "Repayment? I don't need it. But since you possess the Susa clan token, perhaps this is fate. Zoe... she once mentioned the Elvenwood."

content: {佐伊小姐和精灵之森有关联？}
content_en: "Miss Zoe is connected to the Elvenwood?"

content: {佐伊是妖刀之魂，她的过去与精灵有牵连。但那是往事不提也罢。}
content_en: "Zoe is the soul of a cursed blade. Her past is intertwined with the Elves. But that is old history, best left unspoken."

content: {如果您指点小路，我们速速通过，绝不久留。}
content_en: "If you could point out the path, we will pass through swiftly and not linger."

content: {好吧。小路在屋后，沿着溪流逆流而上，但有魔法屏障。露米，你是混血精灵，应该能感知到路径。}
content_en: "Very well. The path is behind the hut. Follow the stream upstream. But there is a magical barrier. Lumi, you are a half-Elf. You should be able to sense the trail."

content: {谢谢您！我会试着引导大家。}
content_en: "Thank you! I will try to guide everyone."

content: {记住，别偏离方向。森林里有残留的怨魂，是佐伊当年留下的。}
content_en: "Remember, do not stray from the direction. The forest holds lingering vengeful spirits, remnants from Zoe's past."

content: {怨魂？我们会小心的。须佐真希，您独自守候在这里，不孤单吗？}
content_en: "Vengeful spirits? We will be careful. SusaMaki, waiting here alone... aren't you lonely?"

content: {孤单？我有双刀为伴。永夜和彼岸，承载着我和姐姐的誓言。}
content_en: Lonely? I have twin blades as my companions. Eternal Night and Other Shore carry the vows between my sister and me.

content: {您和佐伊的故事……我很感动。希望她能早日苏醒。}
content_en: "Your story with Zoe... it moves me. I hope she awakens soon."

content: {但愿如此。你们快走吧，天色不早了。}
content_en: "I hope so too. Now hurry. It's getting late."

content: {再次感谢。等我们从精灵之森返回，再来拜访。}
content_en: "Thank you again. When we return from the Elvenwood, we will visit."

content: {不必了。有缘自会相见。}
content_en: "No need. If fate wills it, we will meet again."

content: {须佐真希说完便转身回到小屋，关上了门。你们一行人按照指引，向着屋后的小路出发。}
content_en: SusaMaki finished speaking, turned, and returned to the hut, closing the door. Your group, following her directions, set off towards the path behind the hut.

content: {你们一行人告别须佐真希后，继续向森林深处进发。越往深处走，光线越发昏暗，周围的树木逐渐显现出不自然的枯萎迹象，空气中弥漫着淡淡的腐朽气息。}
content_en: After bidding farewell to SusaMaki, your group continued deeper into the forest. The further you went, the dimmer the light became. The surrounding trees gradually showed signs of unnatural blight, and a faint scent of decay hung in the air.

content: {这里的植物枯萎得很不寻常。}
content_en: "The plants here are withering unusually."

content: {确实，和瑞亚他们描述的情况完全吻合。帕特拉，你从漫长的沉睡中苏醒，在过去的时代里可曾见过类似的景象？}
content_en: "Indeed, it matches exactly what Rhea and the others described. Patra, you awoke from a long slumber. In past eras, have you ever witnessed similar scenes?"

content: {在我的记忆里，这种大范围的枯萎往往源于魔物的侵染。植物像是被某种黑暗力量强行抽走了生命力。}
content_en: "In my memory, widespread blight of this scale often stems from the corruption of monsters. The plants seem to have had their life force forcibly drained by some dark power."

content: {魔物？难道这片森林里潜伏着我们所不知道的威胁？}
content_en: "Monsters? Could there be unknown threats lurking in this forest?"

content: {现在下结论还为时过早。我需要更仔细地观察。不过这些枯萎的痕迹很新鲜，恐怕是近期才发生的。}
content_en: "It is too early to conclude. I need to observe more carefully. However, these blight marks are fresh. I fear they occurred recently."

content: {帕特拉小姐，请允许我尝试用魔法感知一下。我的微光魔法对生命力量的流动比较敏感。}
content_en: "Miss Patra, please allow me to try sensing with magic. My Glimmer magic is somewhat sensitive to the flow of life force."

content: {可以一试。但务必小心，如果真是魔物作祟，其黑暗力量可能会对探测魔法产生反噬。}
content_en: "You may try. But be very careful. If it truly is the work of monsters, their dark power might backlash against the detection magic."

content: {露米小心翼翼地施展魔法，指尖泛起柔和的光晕。}
content_en: Lumi carefully cast her magic, a soft glow emanating from her fingertips.

content: {嗯……我确实感受到一股阴暗的气息在萦绕，但目前还很微弱。}
content_en: "Hmm... I do sense a dark, lingering aura, but it's still very faint for now."

content: {阴暗的气息？阿古丽娅，你对这种情况有什么看法？}
content_en: "A dark aura? Aguria, what is your take on this situation?"

content: {如果确认是魔物，我们必须高度警惕。但请别放弃希望——正如向日葵即便在阴影中也能追寻阳光，我会沿途种下一些种子作为净化的标记。}
content_en: "If monsters are confirmed, we must be highly vigilant. But please do not lose hope—just as sunflowers seek the sun even in shadow, I will plant some seeds along the way as purification markers."

content: {阿古丽娅，你的乐观精神值得赞赏，但魔物的侵染并非单靠阳光就能驱散。这不禁让我想起古代高塔的悲剧，那时的人们过于依赖单一的信仰，最终导致了类似的枯萎蔓延。}
content_en: "Aguria, your optimism is commendable, but monster corruption cannot be dispelled by sunlight alone. This reminds me of the tragedy of the ancient tower. The people back then relied too heavily on a single faith, which ultimately led to similar blight spreading."

content: {帕特拉，你的意思是，眼前的灾难可能并非自然形成，而是人为导致的？}
content_en: "Patra, are you suggesting this disaster before us might not be natural, but man-made?"

content: {存在这种可能性。魔物往往伴随着强烈的邪恶意念而生。精灵之森周边本该是元素平衡之地，出现如此异常的枯萎，背后必定有原因。}
content_en: "That possibility exists. Monsters are often born from intense malevolent intent. The area around the Elvenwood should be a place of elemental balance. Such abnormal blight appearing must have a reason behind it."

content: {我曾听闻精灵之森被古老的结界所保护。如果枯萎现象持续扩散，很可能意味着结界已经出现了破损。}
content_en: "I have heard the Elvenwood is protected by an ancient barrier. If the blight continues to spread, it likely means the barrier has been damaged."

content: {情况看来比预想的更紧迫。我们必须加快脚步，尽早抵达精灵之森。帕特拉，你能继续分析这些枯萎的分布规律吗？}
content_en: "The situation appears more urgent than anticipated. We must quicken our pace and reach the Elvenwood as soon as possible. Patra, can you continue analyzing the distribution pattern of this blight?"

content: {我会记录下枯萎的范围和形态特征。请看这片区域，所有植物都呈现出统一的焦黑色，仿佛在瞬间被抽干了全部生命。}
content_en: "I will record the scope and characteristics of the blight. Look at this area. All plants show a uniform charred black color, as if their life was drained in an instant."

content: {真是触目惊心……你，我建议我们一边前进一边设下简易防护，避免队伍受到侵染的影响。}
content_en: "It's truly horrifying... You, I suggest we set up simple protective measures as we advance, to avoid the team being affected by the corruption."

content: {这个提议很及时。帕特拉，请你负责前方侦查；露米，你用魔法持续探测路径安全；阿古丽娅，你来布置向日葵记号。}
content_en: "That proposal is timely. Patra, please take charge of scouting ahead. Lumi, use your magic to continuously monitor the path's safety. Aguria, you arrange the sunflower markers."

content: {请放心。但请别忘了我的本质——我对邪恶的存在有着本能的厌恶。一旦发现魔物的踪迹，我会立即出手。}
content_en: "Rest assured. But please do not forget my nature—I have an instinctive aversion to evil beings. Once I detect traces of monsters, I will act immediately."

content: {感谢你的决心，帕特拉。但请大家务必以安全为重，不要贸然行动。}
content_en: "Thank you for your resolve, Patra. But everyone, please prioritize safety. Do not act rashly."

content: {你，前方的道路变得更加狭窄了，而且枯萎现象也愈发严重。我们需要稍作休整吗？}
content_en: "You, the path ahead has grown narrower, and the blight has worsened. Should we take a short rest?"

content: {不，继续前进。此刻停留只会增加未知的风险。我隐约感知到一种熟悉的能量波动……很像是古代魔法的残留痕迹。}
content_en: No, we press on. Stopping now would only increase unknown risks. I faintly sense a familiar energy fluctuation... it closely resembles traces of ancient magic.

content: {古代魔法？帕特拉，这和你苏醒的那处遗迹有关联吗？}
content_en: Ancient magic? Patra, could this be related to the ruins from which you awakened?

content: {有可能。在我沉睡的时代，魔物常常利用古老的魔法作为伪装。不过要确认这一点，还需要找到更多证据。}
content_en: It's possible. In the era of my slumber, monsters often used ancient magic as camouflage. However, confirming this requires more evidence.

content: {快看！那边竟然有一株向日葵在枯萎的包围中绽放——这一定是希望的征兆！}
content_en: Look! Over there, a sunflower is actually blooming amidst all this blight—it must be a sign of hope!

content: {阿古丽娅，请不要掉以轻心。那也可能只是生命消逝前的回光返照。你，我建议采集一些枯萎的样本，带到精灵之森进行详细分析。}
content_en: Aguria, please don't let your guard down. That could also be a final flicker of life before extinction. You, I suggest collecting some samples of the blight to bring to the Elvenwood for detailed analysis.

content: {就按你说的做。全体保持警惕，我们距离目的地应该不远了。}
content_en: We'll do as you say. Everyone, remain vigilant. We should be close to our destination.

content: {帕特拉俯身小心翼翼地采集植物样本，你警惕地环顾四周阴森的森林，带领队伍在渐浓的暮色中继续前行。}
content_en: Patra crouched down to carefully collect plant samples. You warily scanned the eerie surrounding forest, leading the team forward as twilight deepened.

content: {你和小队终于接近精灵之森边缘，刚松一口气，突然被森林护卫队包围。吉蒙里带队，薇薇安和阿斯莫德紧随其后，她们的目光锐利而警惕。}
content_en: Your squad finally neared the edge of the Elvenwood. Just as you breathed a sigh of relief, you were suddenly surrounded by a forest patrol. Gremory led the group, with Vivian and Asmodeus close behind. Their gazes were sharp and wary.

content: {站住！你们是什么人？竟敢从这种偏僻的地方进入精灵之森！}
content_en: "Halt! Who are you? How dare you enter the Elvenwood from such a remote path!"

content: {姐姐，看他们的装束，像是人类城邦的人。}
content_en: "Sister, look at their attire. They seem to be from the human city-state."

content: {确实很可疑。请说明你们的身份和来意。}
content_en: "Highly suspicious indeed. State your identities and purpose."

content: {我是来自附近城邦的城主，这些是我的小队成员。我们前来寻求精灵族的帮助。}
content_en: "I am the Lord from the nearby city-state. These are my squad members. We come seeking the Elves' assistance."

content: {城主？我听说过你。但为什么选择这么不寻常的路径？}
content_en: "The Lord? I've heard of you. But why choose such an unusual route?"

content: {我们遇到了麻烦，主路被封锁，只能绕道而行。}
content_en: "We encountered trouble. The main road was blocked, forcing us to take a detour."

content: {有什么证据证明你的身份？}
content_en: "What proof do you have of your identity?"

content: {我带有城邦的印章和信件。}
content_en: "I carry the city-state's seal and letters."

content: {吉蒙里，让我们检查一下他们的物品。}
content_en: "Gremory, let us inspect their belongings."

content: {好。薇薇安，你去搜一下。}
content_en: "Good. Vivian, search them."

content: {是，姐姐。}
content_en: "Yes, Sister."

content: {薇薇安上前仔细检查你携带的物品，她的动作轻柔但专业，确保不遗漏任何细节。}
content_en: Vivian stepped forward and meticulously examined the items you carried. Her movements were gentle yet professional, ensuring no detail was overlooked.

content: {确实有城邦的印记。但你们来此的目的究竟是什么？}
content_en: "The city-state's insignia is indeed present. But what is your exact purpose here?"

content: {我们城邦周围的草木正在枯萎，我们怀疑是某种黑暗力量所致。想来请教精灵族的智慧。}
content_en: "The flora around our city-state is withering. We suspect it's caused by some dark force and wish to consult the wisdom of the Elves."

content: {草木枯萎？这听起来很严重。}
content_en: "Flora withering? That sounds severe."

content: {嗯，最近森林边缘也有些不寻常。但你们不能随便进入。我们需要进一步盘问。}
content_en: "Mhm. Recently, the forest's edge has also shown unusual signs. But you cannot enter freely. We need to question you further."

content: {我们绝无恶意，只是急需帮助。}
content_en: "We mean no harm. We are simply in urgent need of help."

content: {姐姐，他们似乎没有携带武器，但还是要小心。}
content_en: "Sister, they don't seem to be carrying weapons, but we must still be cautious."

content: {我知道。阿斯莫德，你怎么看？}
content_en: "I know. Asmodeus, what do you think?"

content: {他们的故事吻合已知情报，但我们需要确保安全。}
content_en: "Their story aligns with known intelligence, but we must ensure security."

content: {我可以发誓，我们只为和平而来。}
content_en: "I swear we come only for peace."

content: {好吧，既然你们有正当理由，我们带你们去见长老。但别耍花招。}
content_en: "Alright. Since you have a legitimate reason, we will take you to see the elders. But don't try any tricks."

content: {希望你们说的是实话，否则后果严重。}
content_en: "Let's hope you speak the truth, or the consequences will be severe."

content: {请跟我们来，我们会安置你们在森林内部。}
content_en: "Follow us. We will accommodate you within the forest."

content: {感谢你们的理解。}
content_en: "Thank you for your understanding."

content: {薇薇安，你带路。阿斯莫德，你断后，注意周围。}
content_en: "Vivian, lead the way. Asmodeus, take the rear. Stay alert to the surroundings."

content: {是，姐姐。}
content_en: "Yes, Sister."

content: {我会保持警惕。}
content_en: "I will maintain vigilance."

content: {我们的小队会配合你们。}
content_en: "Our squad will cooperate with you."

content: {最好如此。精灵之森不是随便进出的地方。}
content_en: "Best that you do. The Elvenwood is not a place to enter and exit casually."

content: {这条路很隐蔽，你们怎么找到的？}
content_en: "This path is very hidden. How did you find it?"

content: {我们依靠一张古老地图，但可能已经过时。}
content_en: "We relied on an old map, but it may be outdated."

content: {古老地图？那可能指向了废弃入口。}
content_en: "An old map? That likely points to an abandoned entrance."

content: {难怪你们从这里出现。以后别这么做了。}
content_en: "No wonder you emerged from here. Don't do this again in the future."

content: {我们明白了，下次会走正规通道。}
content_en: "We understand. We will use the proper channels next time."

content: {希望还有下次。现在保持安静，森林里可能有危险。}
content_en: "Let's hope there is a next time. Now remain quiet. There may be dangers in the forest."

content: {吉蒙里，通过地脉感知，附近没有异常。}
content_en: "Gremory, leyline perception shows no abnormalities nearby."

content: {好。继续前进。}
content_en: "Good. Continue."

content: {小队成员们紧张地跟随，你注意到森林中的光线逐渐变得柔和，空气中弥漫着魔法的气息。}
content_en: The squad members followed tensely. You noticed the light within the forest gradually softened, and the air was filled with a magical aura.

content: {你们的护卫队很专业。}
content_en: "Your patrol is very professional."

content: {这是我们的职责。大地告诉我们一切。}
content_en: "It is our duty. The earth tells us everything."

content: {姐姐，别炫耀了。快走吧。}
content_en: "Sister, stop showing off. Let's keep moving."

content: {嘻嘻，薇薇安，你总是这么严肃。}
content_en: Heehee, Vivian, you're always so serious.

content: {吉蒙里，专注任务。}
content_en: Gremory, focus on the mission.

content: {我们听说精灵族三姐妹很厉害，今天见到了。}
content_en: We've heard the three Elven sisters are formidable. Seeing you today confirms it.

content: {哦？你听说过我们？}
content_en: Oh? You've heard of us?

content: {是的，吉蒙里操控大地，薇薇安月光之力，阿斯莫德光影魔法。}
content_en: Yes. Gremory commands the earth, Vivian wields moonlight power, and Asmodeus masters light-shadow magic.

content: {消息传得真远。但请别分散注意力。}
content_en: Word travels far. But please don't get distracted.

content: {阿斯莫德，你太小心了。城主，说说你们城邦的事。}
content_en: Asmodeus, you're too cautious. Lord, tell us about your city-state.

content: {我们城邦如今三族和谐，但草木枯萎让我们担忧。}
content_en: Our city-state now enjoys harmony among the three races, but the flora withering worries us.

content: {三族和谐？人类、精灵和兽人？}
content_en: Harmony among three races? Humans, Elves, and Orcs?

content: {对，就像你们森林里一样。}
content_en: Yes, much like in your forest here.

content: {有趣。但森林最近也不太平。}
content_en: Interesting. But the forest hasn't been peaceful lately either.

content: {吉蒙里，别多说。先到营地再说。}
content_en: Gremory, no need to say more. Let's reach the camp first.

content: {快到了，前面就是警戒线。}
content_en: We're almost there. That's the sentry line ahead.

content: {好了，通过这里就安全了。但盘问还没结束。}
content_en: Alright. Passing here means safety, but the questioning isn't over.

content: {我们愿意接受任何检查。}
content_en: We are willing to accept any inspection.

content: {长老会决定下一步。}
content_en: The elders will decide the next steps.

content: {薇薇安，去通知长老我们来了。}
content_en: Vivian, inform the elders of our arrival.

content: {是，我马上用月光信号。}
content_en: Yes. I'll use the moonlight signal immediately.

content: {薇薇安双手轻抬，一道柔和的月光从她手中升起，迅速消失在森林深处，这是精灵族特有的传信方式。}
content_en: Vivian gently raised her hands. A soft beam of moonlight rose from her palms and swiftly vanished deep into the forest—a unique Elven method of communication.

content: {城主，跟紧我。别掉队。}
content_en: "Lord, stay close to me. Don't fall behind."

content: {我们会的。}
content_en: "We will."

content: {希望你们的到来能带来好消息。}
content_en: "We hope your arrival brings good news."

content: {但愿如此。大地似乎对你们没有恶意。}
content_en: "We hope so too. The earth seems to bear you no ill will."

content: {感谢信任}
content_en: "Thank you for the trust."

content: {信号已发送，长老会回应了。}
content_en: "The signal has been sent. The elder council has responded."

content: {好。我们直接去集会厅}
content_en: "Good. We'll go directly to the assembly hall."

content: {我会安排小队休息。}
content_en: "I will arrange for the squad to rest."

content: {谢谢你们。}
content_en: "Thank you all."

content: {别谢太早，长老可能还有问题。}
content_en: "Don't thank us too soon. The elders may have more questions."

content: {姐姐，别吓唬他们了。}
content_en: "Sister, stop frightening them."

content: {哈哈，开个玩笑。走吧。}
content_en: "Haha, just joking. Let's go."

content: {你和你的小队被引导至精灵之森中心区域稍作休整，一位名为普奥娜的精灵女子前来接待你们，她身旁跟着一位充满活力的精灵骑士}
content_en: You and your squad were guided to a rest area in the heart of the Elvenwood. An Elven woman named Puona came to receive you, accompanied by a lively Elven knight.

content: {欢迎来到精灵之森的中心区域，我是普奥娜，负责安排各位在此处的起居。}
content_en: "Welcome to the heart of the Elvenwood. I am Puona, responsible for arranging your accommodations here."

content: {我是克图格亚，森林护卫队的骑士！接下来由我带领各位参观这片圣地！}
content_en: "And I am Cthugha, a knight of the Forest Guard! I will be your guide through this sacred land!"

content: {感谢二位的盛情。这里的景象令人惊叹，精灵与兽人竟能如此和谐地共处。}
content_en: "Thank you both for your warm welcome. The sight here is breathtaking. Elves and Orcs coexist in such harmony."

content: {是的，近年来我们逐步开放森林的居住权，许多兽人同胞选择在此定居，大家相处得颇为融洽。}
content_en: "Yes. In recent years, we have gradually opened the forest's residency rights. Many of our Orc brethren have chosen to settle here. Everyone gets along quite well."

content: {请看那边！那棵参天巨木便是我们的世界树，是森林的生命之源。它周围环绕的是混合林带与魔法林地。}
content_en: "Look over there! That towering giant tree is our World Tree, the source of the forest's life. Surrounding it are the mixed woodland and magical groves."

content: {我注意到许多精灵与兽人都在忙碌，这片森林充满了生机与繁荣的气息。}
content_en: "I notice many Elves and Orcs are busy. This forest is full of vitality and prosperity."

content: {没错！我们精灵一族天性热爱和平，但与兽人同胞通力合作之后，森林的防御与生机都变得更加强大了！}
content_en: "Exactly! We Elves have a nature-loving and peace-loving spirit. But after working together with our Orc brethren, the forest's defenses and vitality have grown even stronger!"

content: {克图格亚，注意你的仪态，不要过于激动。城主，请您放心，此地十分安全。}
content_en: "Cthugha, mind your decorum. Don't get too excited. Lord, please rest assured. This place is very safe."

content: {哦，抱歉。我有些过于兴奋了。请随我来，我为各位介绍几处值得一看的景致。}
content_en: "Oh, apologies. I got a bit too excited. Please follow me. I'll show you some sights worth seeing."

content: {我很乐意了解。久闻精灵之森蕴藏着古老的魔法。}
content_en: "I would be delighted to learn more. I've long heard the Elvenwood holds ancient magic."

content: {的确如此！例如那片光影泉，能在月夜下倒映出奇异的光芒。不过有一次我误将其光芒当作了黑暗生物的气息，差点就发动了净化术式！}
content_en: "Indeed! For example, that Lightshadow Spring over there can reflect strange lights on moonlit nights. Though once, I mistook its glow for the aura of a dark creature and nearly activated a purification spell!"

content: {克图格亚，那是一次小小的误会，不必再次提及了。城主，请您见谅，她只是责任心格外强烈。}
content_en: "Cthugha, that was a minor misunderstanding. No need to bring it up again. Lord, please excuse her. She just has an exceptionally strong sense of duty."

content: {我能理解。在我的城邦中，也不乏如此热心尽责的伙伴。}
content_en: "I understand. In my city-state, there are also many equally enthusiastic and responsible companions."

content: {真的吗？那太好了！我相信守护森林是生活在此的每一位成员的责任。}
content_en: "Really? That's wonderful! I believe protecting the forest is the responsibility of every member living here."

content: {克图格亚，不如带城主去参观一下精灵集市吧。}
content_en: "Cthugha, why not take the Lord to visit the Elven marketplace?"

content: {好主意！集市上有很多兽人同胞出售他们亲手制作的工艺品，非常精美。}
content_en: "Excellent idea! At the marketplace, many of our Orc brethren sell exquisite handmade crafts."

content: {兽人族群也在此地安居？这真是令人欣慰的景象。}
content_en: "The Orc communities have settled here too? That is truly a heartwarming sight."

content: {是的！他们非常擅长培育植物，就像贝缇缇娜那样，她可是照看花草的能手。}
content_en: "Yes! They are very skilled at cultivating plants. Like Bettina, for instance—she's a master at caring for flowers and herbs."

content: {贝缇缇娜虽为兽人，但性情十分温柔，极其爱护草木。}
content_en: "Although Bettina is an Orc, her nature is very gentle, and she cares deeply for plants."

content: {我似乎听说过她的名字。或许眼前遇到的草木枯萎问题，也能得到她的帮助。}
content_en: "I believe I've heard her name before. Perhaps she could also help with the current issue of flora withering."

content: {对！贝缇缇娜肯定能帮上忙！……不过在那之前，请允许我再次确认各位周围绝对安全。}
content_en: "Right! Bettina would definitely be able to help! ...But before that, please allow me to confirm once more that your surroundings are absolutely safe."

content: {克图格亚，城主是我们的贵客，并非需要盘查的对象。}
content_en: "Cthugha, the Lord is our honored guest, not someone to be interrogated."

content: {哦，您说得对。这只是我的职业习惯，总是忍不住提高警惕。上次我就误判了黑棺事件，差点伤及无辜的影精灵同胞。自那以后，我还特意去进修了种族识别课程。}
content_en: "Oh, you're right. It's just my professional habit—I can't help but stay alert. Last time, I misjudged the Black Coffin incident and nearly harmed innocent Shadow Elves. Since then, I've even taken specialized courses in racial identification."

content: {黑棺事件？}
content_en: "The Black Coffin incident?"

content: {是的，当时我将一位影精灵误认成了吸血鬼，闹出了不小的乱子。这教训让我明白，审慎观察比盲目出手更重要。}
content_en: "Yes. At the time, I mistook a Shadow Elf for a vampire, causing quite a commotion. That lesson taught me that careful observation is more important than rash action."

content: {那已是过往之事了。城主，请看那边，一些精灵正在林间空地上练习魔法。}
content_en: "That is all in the past. Lord, look over there. Some Elves are practicing magic in the forest clearing."

content: {他们的施法如此娴熟优雅。我们城邦亦有法师，但其技艺远不及精灵魔法的古老精深。}
content_en: "Their spellcasting is so skilled and graceful. Our city-state has mages too, but their arts are far from the ancient depth of Elven magic."

content: {精灵魔法源于自然！例如吉蒙里能操控大地之力，而薇薇安则精于月光下的潜行。}
content_en: "Elven magic comes from nature! For example, Gremory can control earth power, and Vivian excels at stealth under moonlight."

content: {克图格亚，你的介绍很详尽，但别忘了提及阿斯莫德。}
content_en: "Cthugha, your introduction is detailed, but don't forget to mention Asmodeus."

content: {阿斯莫德的光影魔法确实高超！而且她性情温和，不像我这样总是冒冒失失的。}
content_en: "Asmodeus's light-shadow magic is truly masterful! And she has a gentle temperament, unlike me, always a bit clumsy."

content: {你们几位的大名我早有耳闻。期待能有机会与她们会面。}
content_en: "I have long heard of your esteemed names. I look forward to meeting them."

content: {她们目前正执行护卫队的任务。但在接下来的集会上，您应该能见到她们。}
content_en: "They are currently on patrol duty. But you should be able to see them at the upcoming assembly."

content: {城主，为各位准备的休息处已经安排妥当。诸位可以稍事休整。}
content_en: "Lord, the resting quarters prepared for you are all arranged. You may take some time to rest."

content: {非常感谢。但我更想趁此机会多领略一下森林的奇景。}
content_en: "Thank you very much. But I'd rather take this chance to appreciate more of the forest's wonders."

content: {那请允许我带领您沿巡逻路线参观一番！不过请稍等，我需要先探查一下周边环境。}
content_en: "Then please allow me to guide you along a patrol route! But please wait a moment. I need to first survey the surrounding environment."

content: {克图格亚神情专注地环视四周，仔细感知着空气中的魔力流动}
content_en: Cthugha focused intently, scanning the surroundings, carefully sensing the flow of magic in the air.

content: {确认安全！没有异常气息。好的，我们可以出发了。}
content_en: "Area secure! No abnormal auras. Good, we can proceed."

content: {克图格亚，务必谨慎行事，切勿再发生误判。}
content_en: "Cthugha, proceed with caution. Ensure there are no misjudgments again."

content: {请您放心，我现在一定会先仔细观察再行动的。}
content_en: "Please rest assured. I will definitely observe carefully before acting now."

content: {你们之间的情谊令人羡慕。}
content_en: "The bond between you all is admirable."

content: {精灵一族向来亲如家人。如今兽人同胞们也很好地融入了我们。}
content_en: "Elves have always been as close as family. Now our Orc brethren have also integrated well with us."

content: {说到这个，城主，听闻您的城邦实现了三族和谐共处，请问是如何做到的呢？}
content_en: "Speaking of which, Lord, I've heard your city-state has achieved harmony among three races. How did you manage that?"

content: {依靠持续的对话与相互合作，正如你们在这里所做的一样。}
content_en: "Through continuous dialogue and mutual cooperation, much like what you are doing here."

content: {这太了不起了！我真希望整个大陆都能如此和平。但总有一些黑暗势力在暗中破坏。}
content_en: "That is remarkable! I wish the entire continent could be so peaceful. But there are always dark forces working to undermine it."

content: {正因如此，我们才需要时刻保持警惕。城主，近日出现的草木枯萎现象，或许正是某种黑暗力量的征兆。}
content_en: "That is precisely why we must remain vigilant at all times. Lord, the recent flora withering might be a sign of some dark power."

content: {我亦有同感。担忧这与古代战争中那股毁灭性的力量复苏有关。}
content_en: "I share your concern. I fear it may be related to the resurgence of that destructive force from the ancient wars."

content: {古代战争？我在圣殿的典籍中读到过！可惜具体的细节我已经记不太清了。}
content_en: "Ancient wars? I read about them in the Temple's archives! Unfortunately, I can't recall the specific details now."

content: {克图格亚，话题有些偏离了。城主，长老会的召见即将开始，请您做好准备}
content_en: "Cthugha, the topic has strayed. Lord, the Elder Council's summons is about to begin. Please prepare yourself."

content: {我已准备就绪。再次感谢二位的引导与介绍。}
content_en: "I am ready. Thank you both once again for your guidance and introduction."

content: {这是我的荣幸！保护客人本就是我的职责所在。}
content_en: "It is my honor! Protecting guests is my duty."

content: {时间差不多了，我们该动身了。}
content_en: "The time is almost upon us. We should set off."

content: {是！我将继续履行护卫职责。}
content_en: "Yes! I will continue to fulfill my guard duties."

content: {精灵之森的所见所闻，确实令我印象深刻。}
content_en: "The sights and sounds of the Elvenwood have truly left a deep impression on me."

content: {祝愿您的此次访问一切顺利。}
content_en: "I wish your visit every success."

content: {若有任何危险迹象，我定会第一时间保护大家！}
content_en: "If there are any signs of danger, I will be the first to protect everyone!"

content: {克图格亚，保持冷静。城主是我们的朋友。}
content_en: "Cthugha, stay calm. The Lord is our friend."

content: {哦，您说得对。我好像又过于投入了。万分抱歉。}
content_en: "Oh, you're right. I seem to have gotten overly involved again. My deepest apologies."

content: {无需道歉，你的这份热忱十分可贵。我的城邦正需要这样的精神。}
content_en: "No need to apologize. Your passion is truly valuable. My city-state needs such spirit."

content: {谢谢您的理解！我相信我们齐心协力，定能解决草木枯萎的危机。}
content_en: "Thank you for understanding! I believe if we work together, we can definitely solve the flora withering crisis."

content: {我们到了，前方便是集会厅的入口。我们将在此与各位别过。}
content_en: "We have arrived. The entrance to the assembly hall is just ahead. We will bid you farewell here."

content: {非常感谢你们，普奥娜，克图格亚。}
content_en: "Thank you both very much, Puona, Cthugha."

content: {随时欢迎您来找我！我很喜欢结交新朋友！}
content_en: "You are welcome to find me anytime! I love making new friends!"

content: {再会，城主。愿自然之力护佑您前行。}
content_en: "Farewell, Lord. May the power of nature guard your path."

content: {普奥娜与克图格亚向你行礼作别，你转身，带着新的见闻与思考，走向那扇通往精灵长老会的巨门}
content_en: Puona and Cthugha bowed in farewell. You turned and, carrying new observations and reflections, walked toward the massive door leading to the Elven Elder Council.

content: {城主和精灵众人集会，包括费伊、安琪、贝缇娜等，商讨草木枯萎问题。}
content_en: The Lord met with various Elves, including Faye, Angie, Bettina, and others, to discuss the flora withering issue.

content: {感谢各位会见我们。关于草木枯萎，我认为可能是古代黑暗力量的复苏，类似于帕特拉先前提到的可能性。}
content_en: "Thank you all for meeting with us. Regarding the flora withering, I suspect it may be the resurgence of an ancient dark power, similar to the possibility Patra mentioned earlier."

content: {嗯，这个想法有道理。我在图书馆的古老记载中看到过类似现象。}
content_en: "Hmm, that idea has merit. I've seen similar phenomena recorded in the ancient texts of the library."

content: {是的！我也记得一些魔法实验提到过，当黑暗侵蚀时，植物会首先枯萎。}
content_en: "Yes! I also recall some magic experiments mentioning that plants wither first when darkness encroaches."

content: {哦，请一定要找到解决办法。我每天照顾植物，看到它们枯萎，我的心都碎了。}
content_en: "Oh, we must find a solution. I care for plants every day. Seeing them wither breaks my heart."

content: {安琪，去把相关典籍拿来。我们需要仔细研究。}
content_en: "Angie, go fetch the relevant texts. We need to study them carefully."

content: {好的，费伊老师。我马上就去。}
content_en: "Yes, Teacher Faye. I'll go right away."

content: {安琪快步离开会议室，前往图书馆。}
content_en: Angie quickly left the meeting room for the library.

content: {帕特拉是位博学的学者，她推测黑暗力量可能通过地脉传播。}
content_en: "Patra is a knowledgeable scholar. She speculates the dark power might spread through leylines."

content: {地脉？吉蒙里能感知地脉，但最近地脉有异常吗？}
content_en: "Leylines? Gremory can sense leylines. But have there been anomalies recently?"

content: {我照顾的植物中，有些根部发黑，像是被腐蚀了。这让我非常担心。}
content_en: "Among the plants I care for, some have blackened roots, as if corroded. It worries me greatly."

content: {安琪带着几本厚重的书籍返回。}
content_en: Angie returned with several heavy books.

content: {费伊老师，我找到了！这本《古代黑暗侵蚀录》记载了类似情况。}
content_en: "Teacher Faye, I found them! This 'Record of Ancient Dark Corruption' documents similar situations."

content: {让我看看。这里说，黑暗力量能扭曲自然，导致草木枯萎。}
content_en: "Let me see. It says here dark power can distort nature, causing plants to wither."

content: {对！我们城邦的迹象也类似：植物快速凋零，土壤失去活力。我还注意到，枯萎区域有微弱的魔法波动。}
content_en: "Right! The signs in our city-state are similar: plants rapidly wither, soil loses vitality. I've also noticed faint magical fluctuations in the withered areas."

content: {太可怕了。我们必须阻止它蔓延到森林。如果森林受损，整个生态都会失衡。}
content_en: "How terrible. We must stop it from spreading to the forest. If the forest is harmed, the entire ecosystem will be thrown off balance."

content: {精灵之森有古代石阵，上次事件后我们加强了监控。但这次可能不同，黑暗力量更隐蔽。}
content_en: "The Elvenwood has ancient stone circles. We strengthened monitoring after the last incident. But this time might be different. The dark power could be more concealed."

content: {费伊老师，我们可以用星辰魔法检测地脉异常。今晚是满月，魔法效果会更强。}
content_en: "Teacher Faye, we could use stellar magic to detect leyline anomalies. Tonight is a full moon. The magical effects will be stronger."

content: {好主意。安琪，你协助我布置魔法阵。}
content_en: "Good idea. Angie, assist me in setting up the magic circle."

content: {我能做什么？我想帮忙保护植物。我可以提供植物样本和生长记录。}
content_en: "What can I do? I want to help protect the plants. I can provide plant samples and growth records."

content: {贝缇娜，你的植物知识可能关键。收集健康和不健康的样本如何？这能帮助我们对比分析。}
content_en: "Bettina, your botanical knowledge could be key. How about collecting healthy and unhealthy samples? This could help us compare and analyze."

content: {当然！我还可以记录枯萎的速度和模式。}
content_en: "Of course! I can also record the speed and pattern of the withering."

content: {嗯，结合样本和记载，我们能更准确判断。安琪，去准备魔法材料。}
content_en: "Mhm. Combining samples with records will allow more accurate judgment. Angie, go prepare the magical materials."

content: {城主，你们城邦有类似记载吗？帕特拉还提供了其他线索吗？}
content_en: "Lord, does your city-state have similar records? Has Patra provided any other clues?"

content: {我们的图书馆不如精灵族丰富，但帕特拉回忆了一些片段。她提到古代战争时，黑暗力量曾通过地脉蔓延。}
content_en: "Our library is not as rich as the Elves', but Patra recalled some fragments. She mentioned that during the ancient wars, dark power once spread through leylines."

content: {帕特拉？她是人类学者吗？我听说过她。如果她能来精灵之森，或许能提供更多帮助。}
content_en: "Patra? Is she a human scholar? I've heard of her. If she could come to the Elvenwood, she might provide more assistance."

content: {希望她安好。植物枯萎让我想起蒂尔的事件，那时黑暗也曾侵蚀过森林。}
content_en: "I hope she is well. The plant withering reminds me of the incident with Thiel, when darkness once corroded the forest."

content: {蒂尔？那个被黑暗侵蚀的精灵？但后来我们和解了。这证明黑暗与光明可以共存。}
content_en: "Thiel? The Elf who was corrupted by darkness? But we reconciled later. It proves darkness and light can coexist."

content: {贝缇娜，你的经验宝贵。温柔力量有时比武力有效。我们需要谨慎处理。}
content_en: "Bettina, your experience is valuable. Gentle power is sometimes more effective than force. We need to handle this carefully."

content: {我同意。我们城邦通过合作解决过冲突。或许可以联合其他种族一起调查。}
content_en: "I agree. Our city-state has resolved conflicts through cooperation. Perhaps we could unite other races in the investigation."

content: {费伊老师，魔法阵准备好了。今晚就可以观测星辰。我可以邀请瑞亚吗？她擅长星辰魔法。}
content_en: "Teacher Faye, the magic circle is prepared. We can observe the stars tonight. May I invite Rhea? She excels at stellar magic."

content: {可以。但专注任务，别分心。城主，请留下协助我们。}
content_en: "You may. But stay focused on the task. Don't get distracted. Lord, please stay and assist us."

content: {荣幸之至。我们需要尽快行动，枯萎范围在扩大。}
content_en: "It would be my honor. We need to act quickly. The withering range is expanding."

content: {我会去温室收集样本。安琪，需要我带些魔法植物吗？比如月光藤蔓。}
content_en: "I will go to the greenhouse to collect samples. Angie, do you need me to bring some magical plants? Like Moonlight Vines."

content: {要！特别是月光藤蔓，它们对黑暗敏感。这能增强魔法阵的灵敏度。}
content_en: Yes! Especially Moonlight Vines. They are sensitive to darkness. It can enhance the magic circle's sensitivity.

content: {安琪，别太兴奋。魔法实验要谨慎，避免意外。}
content_en: Angie, don't get too excited. Magical experiments require caution to avoid accidents.

content: {我知道，老师。我会小心的。}
content_en: I know, Teacher. I'll be careful.

content: {我这就去准备。城主，感谢你带来警告。你的及时行动可能拯救森林。}
content_en: I'll go prepare them now. Lord, thank you for bringing the warning. Your timely action might save the forest.

content: {这是应该的。大陆的和平需要我们共同维护。我建议我们也调查枯萎区域的土壤样本。}
content_en: It's the right thing to do. The continent's peace requires our joint maintenance. I also suggest we investigate soil samples from the withered areas.

content: {集会结束后，我们去图书馆详细研究。安琪，带城主看看魔法阵。}
content_en: After the assembly, let's study in detail at the library. Angie, show the Lord the magic circle.

content: {城主，跟我来，我带你看看布置。魔法阵在庭院中央。}
content_en: Lord, follow me. I'll show you the setup. The magic circle is in the center of the courtyard.

content: {好的。费伊，感谢你的指导。贝缇娜，期待你的样本。}
content_en: Alright. Faye, thank you for your guidance. Bettina, I look forward to your samples.

content: {再见各位。我很快回来。愿植物保佑我们。}
content_en: Goodbye, everyone. I'll be back soon. May the plants bless us.

content: {行动吧。时间不等人。我们必须在天亮前完成初步分析。}
content_en: Take action. Time waits for no one. We must complete the preliminary analysis before dawn.

content: {贝缇娜离开会议室，安琪带你前往庭院。费伊整理书籍，准备前往图书馆。}
content_en: Bettina left the meeting room. Angie took you to the courtyard. Faye organized the books and prepared to head to the library.

content: {你和小队抵达枯萎的森林区域，四周植物凋零，地面覆盖着诡异的藤蔓，空气中弥漫着衰败的气息。}
content_en: You and the squad arrived at the blighted forest area. The surrounding plants were withered, the ground covered in eerie vines, and the air was filled with an aura of decay.

content: {这里的枯萎程度比想象的更严重，生命能量几乎被抽干。}
content_en: "The level of blight here is worse than imagined. The life energy is almost completely drained."

content: {谁在那里？不要靠近那些藤蔓！}
content_en: "Who goes there? Do not approach those vines!"

content: {我们是来调查的旅人，你是？}
content_en: "We are travelers here to investigate. And you are?"

content: {我是多莉，这片森林的守护者。你们身上有陌生的气息。}
content_en: "I am Dolly, guardian of this forest. You carry an unfamiliar aura."

content: {我是城主，负责调查魔物侵染事件。这些藤蔓是魔物吗？}
content_en: "I am the Lord, investigating the monster corruption incident. Are these vines monsters?"

content: {魔物？不，它们更像是某种工具，被刻意培育出来的。}
content_en: "Monsters? No. They are more like... tools, deliberately cultivated."

content: {工具？你能确定吗？}
content_en: "Tools? Can you be sure?"

content: {我和植物交流多年，从未见过自然形成的魔物会如此精准地汲取生命。}
content_en: "I have communicated with plants for many years. I have never seen naturally formed monsters that drain life with such precision."

content: {但藤蔓的攻击性很强，我们之前遭遇过袭击。}
content_en: "But the vines are highly aggressive. We were attacked by them before."

content: {那是因为它们被操控了，就像提线木偶一样。}
