content_en: "That's because they are being controlled, like puppets on strings."

content: {操控？谁会做这种事？}
content_en: "Controlled? Who would do such a thing?"

content: {我不知道，但藤蔓的根源带有一种不自然的魔法波动。}
content_en: "I don't know. But the root of the vines carries an unnatural magical fluctuation."

content: {你能带我们去看根源吗？}
content_en: "Can you take us to the root?"

content: {可以，但请小心，藤蔓会主动防御入侵者。}
content_en: "I can, but please be careful. The vines actively defend against intruders."

content: {多谢你的帮助。我们之前以为这是魔物潮的一部分。}
content_en: "Thank you for your help. We previously thought this was part of a monster tide."

content: {魔物潮是混乱的，而这些藤蔓有秩序，就像军队。}
content_en: "Monster tides are chaotic. These vines have order, like an army."

content: {军队？这听起来更危险了。}
content_en: "An army? That sounds even more dangerous."

content: {是的，它们的目标似乎是彻底吸干这片土地的生命力。}
content_en: "Yes. Their goal seems to be to completely drain the life force of this land."

content: {我们必须阻止它，否则整个森林都会遭殃。}
content_en: "We must stop it, or the entire forest will be devastated."

content: {跟我来，根源在核心区域，但我每次尝试复苏植物都被藤蔓干扰。}
content_en: "Follow me. The root is in the core area. But every time I try to revive the plants, the vines interfere."

content: {你一直在努力复苏这里？}
content_en: "You've been trying to revive this place?"

content: {每个生命都有生长的权利，我不能放弃它们。}
content_en: "Every life has the right to grow. I cannot give up on them."

content: {但藤蔓似乎在与你的力量对抗。}
content_en: "But the vines seem to resist your power."

content: {没错，它们能感知我的治愈之力，并主动抑制它。}
content_en: "Correct. They can sense my healing power and actively suppress it."

content: {这进一步证明是人为的。自然魔物不会有针对性的行为。}
content_en: "That further proves it's man-made. Natural monsters wouldn't exhibit targeted behavior."

content: {正是如此。藤蔓的魔法纹路像是一种契约印记。}
content_en: "Exactly. The magical patterns on the vines resemble some kind of contract seal."

content: {契约？类似黑暗魔法吗？}
content_en: "A contract? Like dark magic?"

content: {我不熟悉黑暗魔法，但这种魔法充满贪婪和控制欲。}
content_en: "I'm not familiar with dark magic, but this magic is full of greed and desire for control."

content: {我们需要更多信息来找出幕后黑手。}
content_en: "We need more information to find the mastermind behind this."

content: {或许精灵族的长老知道些什么，但我很少与他们交流。}
content_en: "Perhaps the Elven elders know something, but I rarely communicate with them."

content: {为什么？你不属于精灵族群吗？}
content_en: "Why? Don't you belong to the Elven community?"

content: {我属于，但我的理念与他们不同。他们追求秩序，而我崇尚自由。}
content_en: "I do, but my philosophy differs from theirs. They seek order, while I revere freedom."

content: {自由？就像你复苏所有植物，不管有用与否？}
content_en: "Freedom? Like reviving all plants, regardless of usefulness?"

content: {是的，生命不应被功利地评判。但族人们认为我扰乱了平衡。}
content_en: "Yes. Life should not be judged by utility. But my kin believe I disturb the balance."

content: {平衡？在这种危机面前，你的做法可能是对的。}
content_en: "Balance? In the face of such a crisis, your approach might be right."

content: {谢谢你的理解。但眼下，藤蔓才是真正的威胁。}
content_en: "Thank you for understanding. But right now, the vines are the real threat."

content: {你能感应到操控者的位置吗？}
content_en: "Can you sense the location of the controller?"

content: {不能，藤蔓的魔法很隐蔽，只能感知到大致方向。}
content_en: "No. The vines' magic is very concealed. I can only sense a general direction."

content: {方向指向哪里？}
content_en: "What direction does it point to?"

content: {森林的古老圣地，那里魔法元素异常混乱。}
content_en: "Towards the ancient sacred grounds of the forest. The magical elements there are abnormally chaotic."

content: {古老圣地？我们下一步就去那里调查。}
content_en: "Ancient sacred grounds? Our next step is to investigate there."

content: {我可以带路，但圣地很危险，魔法波动会干扰感知。}
content_en: "I can guide you, but the sacred grounds are dangerous. Magical fluctuations will interfere with perception."

content: {无妨，我们有自己的魔法专家。你愿意加入我们吗？}
content_en: "That's fine. We have our own magical experts. Would you be willing to join us?"

content: {当然，保护森林是我的使命。但我讨厌火焰，请别用火攻。}
content_en: "Of course. Protecting the forest is my mission. But I despise fire. Please don't use fire attacks."

content: {放心，我们会用其他方法。这些藤蔓怕什么？}
content_en: "Rest assured, we'll use other methods. What are these vines afraid of?"

content: {它们怕纯净的生命能量，但我的力量不足够净化根源。}
content_en: "They fear pure life energy. But my power is insufficient to purify the root."

content: {纯净的生命能量？或许我们需要联合其他力量。}
content_en: "Pure life energy? Perhaps we need to combine other forces."

content: {是的，比如精灵的古老魔法或人类的圣光。}
content_en: "Yes. Like ancient Elven magic or human holy light."

content: {好，我们先处理这里，然后去圣地。}
content_en: "Good. Let's deal with this area first, then head to the sacred grounds."

content: {跟我来，根源就在前面那棵古树下面。}
content_en: "Follow me. The root is beneath that ancient tree ahead."

content: {古树？它看起来完全被藤蔓包裹了。}
content_en: "The ancient tree? It looks completely wrapped in vines."

content: {是的，古树还在挣扎，但生命力越来越弱。}
content_en: "Yes. The tree is still struggling, but its life force grows weaker."

content: {我们能做什么？}
content_en: "What can we do?"

content: {我可以暂时安抚藤蔓，但需要你们保护我不受干扰。}
content_en: "I can temporarily soothe the vines, but I need you to protect me from interference."

content: {我们会守住周围。开始吧。}
content_en: "We'll guard the perimeter. Begin when you're ready."

content: {请安静，我要和植物沟通了。}
content_en: "Please be quiet. I need to communicate with the plants now."

content: {明白。队员们，保持警戒！}
content_en: "Understood. Team, stay alert!"

content: {多莉闭上眼睛，双手轻触地面，周身泛起微弱的绿光，藤蔓似乎有所反应，微微颤动。}
content_en: Dolly closed her eyes, gently touching the ground with her hands. A faint green light shimmered around her. The vines seemed to react, trembling slightly.

content: {你示意小队成员分散站位，形成防御圈，警惕地观察四周。}
content_en: You signaled the squad members to spread out, forming a defensive perimeter as they warily observed their surroundings.

content: {你与奥兰多、吉蒙里终于抵达古老圣地边缘，四周弥漫着狂暴不安的魔法元素，空气中仿佛凝结着无形的压力}
content_en: You, Orlando, and Gremory finally reached the edge of the ancient sacred grounds. The surrounding air was thick with volatile, restless magical elements, as if an invisible pressure had solidified.

content: {此地的能量流动极为混乱，我的灵眼几乎无法聚焦辨识}
content_en: "The energy flow here is extremely chaotic; my Spirit Eyes can hardly focus and discern anything."

content: {奥兰多，以你的灵眼能否看出任何异常迹象？}
content_en: "Orlando, with your Spirit Eyes, can you detect any abnormal signs?"

content: {能量仿佛被强行扭曲，中心区域存在一个异常强大的魔法源}
content_en: "The energy seems forcibly distorted. There is an abnormally powerful magical source in the central area."

content: {让我来感知地脉波动！地下似乎有某种存在正在剧烈搅动}
content_en: "Let me sense the leyline fluctuations! Something seems to be violently stirring underground."

content: {吉蒙里，务必小心行事，切勿贸然深入}
content_en: "Gremory, be very careful. Do not venture recklessly deep in."

content: {城主放心！作为森林护卫队成员，我最熟悉这类地形}
content_en: "Don't worry, Lord! As a member of the Forest Guard, I'm most familiar with this type of terrain."

content: {我看到了！中心区域有一个复杂法阵，纹路中散发着黑暗气息}
content_en: "I see it! There's a complex magical circle in the central area. Dark energy emanates from its patterns."

content: {这个法阵就是控制藤蔓的源头吗？}
content_en: "Is this circle the source controlling the vines?"

content: {正是，法阵能量与藤蔓如同锁链般紧密相连}
content_en: "Precisely. The circle's energy is tightly linked to the vines like chains."

content: {我能感受到法阵在持续吸收地脉能量，难怪森林会出现枯萎现象}
content_en: "I can feel the circle continuously absorbing leyline energy. No wonder the forest is showing blight."

content: {我们是否有办法破坏这个法阵？}
content_en: "Do we have a way to destroy this circle?"

content: {直接攻击可能收效甚微，法阵似乎设有自我保护机制}
content_en: "Direct attacks may be ineffective. The circle seems to have a self-protection mechanism."

content: {让我尝试用大地之力进行干扰！}
content_en: "Let me try to disrupt it with earth power!"

content: {吉蒙里，切勿冲动，我们需要先进行周密分析}
content_en: "Gremory, do not act impulsively. We need a thorough analysis first."

content: {法阵纹路类似某种契约魔法，可能需要特定条件才能破解}
content_en: "The circle's patterns resemble a kind of contract magic. Specific conditions might be required to break it."

content: {特定条件？比如哪些必要条件？}
content_en: "Specific conditions? Like what essential requirements?"

content: {很可能需要纯净的能量或特定血脉来进行中和}
content_en: "Likely requiring pure energy or a specific bloodline to neutralize it."

content: {纯净血脉？我们精灵族的血脉是否符合要求？我是纯血精灵}
content_en: "Pure bloodline? Would our Elven bloodline qualify? I am a pure-blooded Elf."

content: {这个方案或许可行，但法阵似乎需要多种力量协同}
content_en: "That plan might work. But the circle seems to require multiple powers to cooperate."

content: {我感应到法阵需要人类、精灵和兽人三种能量的平衡才能破解}
content_en: "I sense the circle requires a balance of three types of energy—human, Elf, and Orc—to be broken."

content: {人类和精灵我们已有配备，但兽人代表目前不在现场}
content_en: "We have humans and Elves present, but an Orc representative is not here at the moment."

content: {兽人族可以邀请缪西卡姐姐！可惜她还在部落未能同行}
content_en: "We could invite Sister Mousika from the Orcs! Unfortunately, she's still in the tribe and not with us."

content: {当前首要任务是稳定法阵，阻止其能量进一步扩散}
content_en: "Our primary task now is to stabilize the circle and prevent its energy from spreading further."

content: {奥兰多，你的灵眼能否持续监控能量变化？}
content_en: "Orlando,, can your Spirit Eyes continuously monitor the energy changes?"

content: {可以尝试，但能量过于混乱，需要高度集中精神}
content_en: "I can try, but the energy is too chaotic. It requires intense concentration."

content: {我来协助你！大地之力能够提供稳定的能量基点}
content_en: "I'll assist you! Earth power can provide a stable energy anchor."

content: {吉蒙里将双手按在地面，淡金色的光芒从掌心缓缓渗入大地}
content_en: Gremory placed her hands on the ground. A pale golden light slowly seeped from her palms into the earth.

content: {我们分工合作。吉蒙里，你负责构建地面防御体系}
content_en: "We'll work in coordination. Gremory, you are responsible for constructing a ground defense system."

content: {明白！我会升起土墙屏障保护施法区域}
content_en: "Understood! I will raise earthen barriers to protect the spellcasting area."

content: {法阵能量正在增强，藤蔓开始向周边区域蔓延}
content_en: "The circle's energy is intensifying. The vines are starting to spread to surrounding areas."

content: {必须立即采取行动。是否有暂时封印法阵的方法？}
content_en: "We must act immediately. Is there a way to temporarily seal the circle?"

content: {或许可以尝试，但需要持续输入能量进行抑制}
content_en: "Perhaps we can try, but it requires continuous energy input to suppress it."

content: {城主，请允许我与奥兰多联手施法！}
content_en: "Lord, please allow Orlando and me to cast a joint spell!"

content: {奥兰多展开灵眼，圣洁的光芒在周身流转}
content_en: Orlandoactivates Spirit Eyes, holy light circulating around her.

content: {务必谨慎，注意法阵可能产生的反噬作用}
content_en: "Proceed with extreme caution. Be aware of possible backlash from the circle."

content: {我来引导圣光之力，吉蒙里你负责引导地脉能量，我们同时发力}
content_en: "I will guide the Holy Light power. Gremory, you guide the leyline energy. We'll act simultaneously."

content: {大地母亲，请回应我的呼唤！}
content_en: "Mother Earth, answer my call!"

content: {圣光啊，请净化这片被污染的土地！}
content_en: "Holy Light, purify this tainted land!"

content: {有效果！法阵的能量波动明显减弱了}
content_en: "It's effective! The circle's energy fluctuations have noticeably weakened."

content: {但这只是暂时效果，根源未除，法阵很快会恢复}
content_en: "But this is only temporary. The root cause remains. The circle will quickly recover."

content: {我的力量消耗严重，这个法阵比想象中更加顽固}
content_en: "My strength is severely depleted. This circle is more stubborn than imagined."

content: {需要找到彻底破坏法阵的关键。奥兰多，法阵是否存在弱点？}
content_en: "We need to find the key to completely destroy the circle. Orlando, does the circle have a weak point?"

content: {灵眼显示中心有一个核心节点，但被层层能量保护着}
content_en: "My Spirit's Eye shows a core node at the center, but it's protected by layers of energy."

content: {核心节点？我们能否直接攻击这个节点？}
content_en: "A core node? Can we attack this node directly?"

content: {不行，节点需要纯净血脉才能接触破解}
content_en: "No. The node requires contact and breaking by a pure bloodline."

content: {又是纯净血脉的要求！看来必须寻求兽人族的协助了}
content_en: "Another pure bloodline requirement! It seems we must seek the Orcs' assistance after all."

content: {当前首要任务是维持局势稳定。奥兰多，你能坚持多久？}
content_en: "Our primary task now is to maintain stability. Orlando, how long can you hold?"

content: {最多坚持数小时，之后法阵会产生强烈反弹}
content_en: "At most a few hours. After that, the circle will produce a strong backlash."

content: {我通知森林护卫队前来支援，可以轮流值守维持封印}
content_en: I will notify the Forest Guard to come reinforce us. We can take turns maintaining the seal.

content: {吉蒙里取出通讯水晶，快速发出求援信息}
content_en: Gremory took out a communication crystal and swiftly sent a distress signal.

content: {很好的方案。同时需要派人联系兽人族请求援助}
content_en: A sound plan. Simultaneously, we need someone to contact the Orcs to request aid.

content: {城主小心！法阵能量又开始躁动了！}
content_en: Lord, be careful! The circle's energy is growing restless again!

content: {土墙屏障，升起！}
content_en: "Earthen Barrier, rise!"

content: {一道厚重的土墙应声而起，挡住四散的能量波动}
content_en: A thick earthen wall rose in response, blocking the scattering energy fluctuations.

content: {多亏你们协助。若我独自应对，恐怕难以支撑}
content_en: "Thanks to your assistance. If I were facing this alone, I doubt I could have held."

content: {守护元素平衡是曙光骑士团的使命所在}
content_en: "Maintaining elemental balance is the Dawn Knight Order' sworn mission!"

content: {也是森林护卫队的职责！不过城主下次行动请务必带上援军}
content_en: "And the Forest Guard's duty as well! But Lord, for your next operation, please be sure to bring reinforcements."

content: {我明白了。接下来我们轮流值守，等待援军到来}
content_en: "I understand. Next, we'll take turns on watch, waiting for the reinforcements to arrive."

content: {我会持续监控能量变化，及时通报异常情况}
content_en: "I will continuously monitor energy changes and report any anomalies promptly."

content: {我去周边布置警戒陷阱，防止魔物靠近干扰}
content_en: "I'll go set up perimeter alert traps to prevent monsters from approaching and causing interference."

content: {保持联络。我们定要彻底破解这个法阵}
content_en: "Stay in contact. We must completely break this circle."

content: {三人相视点头，在狂暴的魔法能量中建立起临时的防御阵线}
content_en: The three exchanged nods, establishing a temporary defensive line amidst the raging magical energy.

content: {你和觉、德琳在法阵前奋力尝试破坏，但法阵纹丝不动，最终以失败告终}
content_en: You, Satoru, and Madeline struggled before the magical circle, trying to destroy it, but the circle remained unmoved, their efforts ending in failure.

content: {还是不行，法阵完全不受影响。觉，你能用灵视看出什么吗？}
content_en: "It's still not working. The circle is completely unaffected. Satoru, can your spirit sight see anything?"

content: {法阵的灵魂纹路需要三种纯净血脉共鸣，人类、精灵和兽人。}
content_en: "The circle's spiritual patterns require resonance from three pure bloodlines: human, Elf, and Orc."

content: {人类和精灵我们都有，但兽人血脉哪里找？}
content_en: "We have humans and Elves, but where do we find Orc blood?"

content: {我想到了一个人——缪西卡，她是兽人圣女，血脉纯净。}
content_en: "I've thought of someone—Mousika. She is the Orc Saintess. Her bloodline is pure."

content: {缪西卡？那个兽人部落的圣女？我去请她！}
content_en: "Mousika? The Saintess of the Orc tribes? I'll go invite her!"

content: {德琳，行动要快。法阵的能量在侵蚀周边生命，藤蔓正在扩散。}
content_en: "Madeline, be quick. The circle's energy is eroding the surrounding life. The vines are spreading."

content: {交给我！我跑腿最拿手，保证迅速带回消息。}
content_en: "Leave it to me! I'm best at running errands. I promise to bring back news swiftly."

content: {德琳，路上小心。兽人领土可能还有敌意，不要硬闯。}
content_en: "Madeline, be careful on the road. Orc territory might still be hostile. Don't force your way through."

content: {放心，我熟悉那条路。而且，我现在是“黑夜守护人”，没人敢拦我。}
content_en: "Don't worry. I know that route well. Besides, I'm the 'Guardian of the Night' now. No one dares to stop me."

content: {我能感知到法阵的焦虑，它似乎在抵抗我们的探查，能量波动越来越强。}
content_en: "I can sense the circle's anxiety. It seems to be resisting our investigation. The energy fluctuations grow stronger."

content: {觉，你的灵视能暂时安抚法阵吗？我们需要时间。}
content_en: "Satoru, can your spirit sight temporarily soothe the circle? We need time."

content: {可以尝试，但需要专注。请保持安静，不要打扰我。}
content_en: "I can try, but it requires focus. Please remain quiet. Do not disturb me."

content: {那我出发了。你，等我好消息！}
content_en: "Then I'll set off. You, wait for good news!"

content: {德琳，把这个信物交给缪西卡，证明是我的请求，她会明白的。}
content_en: "Madeline, take this token to Mousika. It proves it's my request. She will understand."

content: {明白！我会说服她来的，毕竟她曾是你的故人。}
content_en: "Understood! I'll persuade her to come. After all, she was once your acquaintance."

content: {德琳走了。你，我们继续尝试压制法阵，不能让它失控。}
content_en: Madeline left."You, we must continue trying to suppress the circle. We cannot let it go out of control."

content: {好。觉，你能描述法阵的灵魂形态吗？我想多了解一些。}
content_en: "Alright. Satoru, can you describe the circle's spiritual form? I'd like to understand more."

content: {它像一只贪婪的野兽，被锁链束缚，但锁链正是血脉之力。}
content_en: "It's like a greedy beast, bound by chains. But the chains are the power of the bloodlines."

content: {所以我们需要用血脉钥匙解锁？就像打开一扇门？}
content_en: "So we need to use a bloodline key to unlock it? Like opening a door?"

content: {是的。但必须同时进行，否则法阵会反扑，后果不堪设想。}
content_en: "Yes. But it must be done simultaneously. Otherwise, the circle will retaliate, with unthinkable consequences."

content: {同时进行？意味着我们需要协调三方力量，人类、精灵、兽人必须同心协力。}
content_en: "Simultaneously? That means we need to coordinate three forces. Humans, Elves, and Orcs must work together with one heart."

content: {没错。任何一方缺失，都会导致失败。}
content_en: "Correct. The absence of any one side will lead to failure."

content: {这不容易，但为了和平，必须尝试。我相信德琳能带来转机。}
content_en: "It's not easy, but for peace, we must try. I believe Madeline will bring a turning point."

content: {我听到法阵的低语，它在嘲笑我们的分裂，但你的信念很坚定，这能安抚法阵的躁动。}
content_en: "I hear the circle's whispers. It mocks our divisions. But your conviction is firm. This can soothe the circle's restlessness."

content: {分裂？不，我们正在团结。奥兰多和吉蒙里在值守，我们能撑住。}
content_en: "Divisions? No, we are uniting. Orlando and Gremory are on watch. We can hold on."

content: {希望如此。我的灵视看到藤蔓在扩张，时间不多了，必须尽快行动。}
content_en: "I hope so. My spirit sight sees the vines expanding. Time is running short. We must act quickly."

content: {谢谢。觉，你厌恶噪音，但这里很嘈杂吧？辛苦你了。}
content_en: "Thank you. Satoru, you detest noise, but it's quite loud here, isn't it? You're working hard."

content: {是的，但我会忍耐。守护生命更重要，这是我的职责。}
content_en: "Yes. But I will endure. Protecting life is more important. That is my duty."

content: {你总是这么淡漠又敏锐，让人安心。}
content_en: "You are always so aloof yet perceptive, which is reassuring."

content: {这是我的天性。德琳应该快到兽人领土了，以她的速度，很快会有消息。}
content_en: "It is my nature. Madeline should be nearing Orc territory soon. At her speed, we'll have news before long."

content: {我们准备好迎接缪西卡。她曾教会我爱的含义，现在需要她的帮助。}
content_en: "We should prepare to welcome Mousika. She once taught me the meaning of love. Now we need her help."

content: {爱？那是一种我难以理解的情感，但或许能共鸣法阵，因为纯净血脉往往与心灵纯净相关。}
content_en: "Love? That is an emotion I struggle to comprehend. But perhaps it can resonate with the circle, as pure bloodlines are often linked to purity of heart."

content: {缪西卡的心灵无疑是最纯净的，成功的机会很大。}
content_en: "Mousika's heart is undoubtedly the purest. The chance of success is high."

content: {那么，我静候佳音。我们也别闲着，继续研究法阵的纹路。}
content_en: "Then I shall await good news. Let's not be idle either. Continue studying the circle's patterns."

content: {纹路中有古老的契约文字，我无法解读，或许尤缇缇迦能帮忙，她精通历史。}
content_en: "The patterns contain ancient contract script. I cannot decipher it. Perhaps Utija could help. She is well-versed in history."

content: {尤缇缇迦？时间之神的人间体？她神秘莫测，但眼下先专注于此。}
content_en: Utija? The mortal vessel of the God of Time? She is inscrutable, but for now, let's focus on the matter at hand.

content: {正当你们讨论时，远处传来急促的脚步声，德琳气喘吁吁地跑回来}
content_en: While you were discussing, hurried footsteps approached from a distance. Madeline ran back, panting heavily.

content: {你！消息带到了！缪西卡答应前来，她很快就到！}
content_en: "You! The message has been delivered! Mousika agreed to come! She'll be here soon!"

content: {太好了！德琳，你效率真高，辛苦你了。}
content_en: "Excellent! Madeline, you're so efficient. Thank you for your hard work."

content: {小菜一碟。不过兽人部落有点紧张，我费了些口舌才说服他们。}
content_en: "Piece of cake. But the Orc tribes were a bit tense. It took some talking to persuade them."

content: {辛苦你了。法阵似乎感应到了希望，能量波动平缓了些，这是个好兆头。}
content_en: "You worked hard. The circle seems to have sensed hope. Its energy fluctuations have calmed somewhat. That's a good sign."

content: {那就好。接下来我们等缪西卡？我需要做点什么吗？对。德琳，你休息一下，奔波这么久肯定累了。觉，我们开始准备仪式。}
content_en: "That's good. So now we wait for Mousika? Is there anything I need to do?"

content: {对。德琳，你休息一下，奔波这么久肯定累了。觉，我们开始准备仪式。}
content_en: "Yes. Madeline, rest a bit. You must be tired after such a journey. Satoru, let's start preparing the ritual."

content: {仪式需要谨慎，我会用灵视引导，确保万无一失。}
content_en: "The ritual requires caution. I will use my spirit sight to guide, ensuring nothing goes wrong."

content: {我负责警戒，确保无人干扰，你们放心。}
content_en: "I'll take charge of vigilance, ensuring no one interferes. You all focus with peace of mind."

content: {好团队。和平就在眼前，只要我们齐心协力。}
content_en: "Good team. Peace is within sight, as long as we unite."

content: {你独自守在古老的法阵前，四周符文的光芒忽明忽暗，空气中弥漫着不安的魔力波动。突然，法阵中心迸发出刺目的强光，能量如决堤洪水般汹涌而出}
content_en: You stood alone before the ancient magical circle. The runic lights around flickered. The air was thick with restless magical fluctuations. Suddenly, blinding light erupted from the circle's center, and energy surged forth like a bursting dam.

content: {不好！法阵失控了！能量正在疯狂外泄！}
content_en: "This is bad! The circle is out of control! Energy is wildly leaking!"

content: {保持镇定。时间的流动会抚平一切动荡。}
content_en: "Remain calm. The flow of time will soothe all turmoil."

content: {谁在说话？}
content_en: "Who is speaking?"

content: {我是尤缇迦，一名时空过客。此刻用我的力量为你提供支援。}
content_en: "I am Utija, a traveler of spacetime. I use my power to aid you now."

content: {尤缇迦？传说中执掌时间之流的存在？你为何会现身于此？}
content_en: "Utija? The being said to govern the flow of time? Why have you appeared here?"

content: {时空的涟漪将我引向此地。此地即将显现重要的答案。}
content_en: "The ripples of spacetime led me here. An important answer is about to manifest at this place."

content: {答案？是关于这座法阵的真相吗？}
content_en: "An answer? Regarding the truth of this circle?"

content: {关乎所有谜题。但此刻，你需全心引导暴走的能量。}
content_en: "It concerns all mysteries. But for now, you must focus on guiding the rampaging energy."

content: {感谢你的援助。若非你及时出手，我恐怕已被这股能量吞噬。}
content_en: "Thank you for your aid. If not for your timely intervention, I might have been consumed by this energy."

content: {无需致谢。我的出现本是时间必然的一环。}
content_en: "No need for thanks. My appearance is a necessary part of the timeline."

content: {你能解读这座法阵的起源吗？它散发出的气息极为古老。}
content_en: "Can you interpret the origin of this circle? The aura it emits is extremely ancient."

content: {古老，却非无解。真相近在眼前。}
content_en: "Ancient, yet not unsolvable. The truth is close at hand."

content: {近在眼前？你是指缪西卡他们正在赶来的事？}
content_en: "Close at hand? Do you mean Mousika and the others are on their way?"

content: {不止于此。真正的关键，在于你们即将作出的抉择。}
content_en: "More than that. The true key lies in the choice you are about to make."

content: {抉择？我们选择团结而非分裂，这难道不是正确答案？}
content_en: "A choice? We choose unity over division. Isn't that the right answer?"

content: {正是。时间记录每一次选择，而最简单的真相往往最易被忽视。}
content_en: "Precisely. Time records every choice. And the simplest truths are often the easiest to overlook."

content: {真相？我们一直在追查侵蚀世界的幕后黑手。}
content_en: "Truth? We've been pursuing the mastermind eroding the world."

content: {黑手或许只是表象，贪婪与恐惧才是侵蚀的根源。}
content_en: "The mastermind might just be a facade. Greed and fear are the roots of the erosion."

content: {贪婪？就像这座法阵强行汲取生命能量的行为？}
content_en: "Greed? Like this circle forcibly draining life energy?"

content: {是的。但时间将证明，恐惧终将被勇气净化。}
content_en: "Yes. But time will prove that fear is ultimately purified by courage."

content: {勇气……我们确实需要无比的勇气来面对未来的挑战。}
content_en: "Courage... We truly need immense courage to face future challenges."

content: {勇气已在你们心中。看，能量的狂潮正在平息。}
content_en: "Courage already resides in your hearts. Look, the tide of energy is subsiding."

content: {真的！法阵的波动稳定下来了！你是如何办到的？}
content_en: "Truly! The circle's fluctuations are stabilizing! How did you achieve this?"

content: {我只是加快了局部时间的流速，让过剩的能量自然耗散。}
content_en: "I merely accelerated the local flow of time, allowing the excess energy to dissipate naturally."

content: {难以置信……你能继续协助我们吗？}
content_en: "Unbelievable... Can you continue to assist us?"

content: {不，我的职责是观察与记录，而非直接干预。答案即将自行显现。}
content_en: "No. My duty is to observe and record, not to intervene directly. The answer will manifest on its own soon."

content: {答案究竟是什么？请你明示！}
content_en: "What exactly is the answer? Please, tell me clearly!"

content: {当人类、精灵与兽人的血脉之力在此汇聚，法阵将被破除，但真正的试炼随之开始。}
content_en: "When the bloodline powers of humans, Elves, and Orcs converge here, the circle will be broken. But the true trial begins thereafter."

content: {试炼？之后还会发生什么？}
content_en: "A trial? What will happen after?"

content: {寄生藤蔓仅是开端，幕后操纵者终将现身。但时间站在希望一方。}
content_en: "The parasitic vines are only the beginning. The mastermind behind the scenes will eventually appear. But time is on the side of hope."

content: {我们该如何应对？}
content_en: "How should we respond?"

content: {坚守信念，如同生命祭司守护生机，如同洞察者揭示真实，如同大地守护者屹立不倒。}
content_en: "Hold fast to your convictions, just as the Life Priestess guards vitality, as the Seer reveals truth, and as the Earth Guardian stands unyielding."

content: {你似乎对我们每一个人都了如指掌。}
content_en: "You seem to know each one of us intimately."

content: {时光让我知晓诸多故事，但未来的篇章需由你们亲手书写。}
content_en: "Time has allowed me to learn many stories. But the chapters of the future must be written by your own hands."

content: {尤缇迦，你会离开吗？}
content_en: "Utija, will you leave?"

content: {是的。时空的牵引在召唤我。记住，答案存在于追寻的过程之中。}
content_en: "Yes. The pull of spacetime calls me. Remember, the answer exists in the process of seeking."

content: {等等！至少告诉我，你为何要帮助我们？}
content_en: "Wait! At least tell me, why are you helping us?"

content: {我的目的是见证历史。或许在未来的某一天，你会将我的故事传颂。}
content_en: "My purpose is to witness history. Perhaps one day in the future, you will recount my story."

content: {我会的。感谢你今日的援手。}
content_en: I will. Thank you for your aid today.

content: {再会了。时间的长河将为你揭示答案。}
content_en: Farewell. The long river of time will reveal the answer to you.

content: {尤缇迦的身影如烟尘般消散，仿佛从未存在过。法阵的光芒已彻底恢复平稳，只有空气中残留的微弱能量波动证明着方才的惊险}
content_en: Utija's figure dissipated like smoke and dust, as if she had never existed. The circle's light had completely stabilized, only a faint residual energy fluctuation in the air proving the earlier peril.

content: {她消失了……但危机确实解除了。我必须立刻通知缪西卡和其他人，为最终的决战做好准备。}
content_en: "She's gone... but the crisis is indeed averted. I must inform Mousika and the others immediately to prepare for the final confrontation."

content: {时间的答案……我期待着它的揭晓。}
content_en: "The answer of time... I look forward to its revelation."

content: {德琳和缪西卡匆匆穿过精灵之森的迷雾，浓密的雾气仿佛有生命般缠绕着她们的脚踝。她们来到一片被古老树木环抱的空地，你和莉莉丝已在此等候多时。}
content_en: Madeline and Mousika hurried through the mist of the Elvenwood. The dense fog seemed alive, coiling around their ankles. They arrived at a clearing embraced by ancient trees, where you and Lilith had been waiting for some time.

content: {德琳，你们终于到了。路上没出意外吧？}
content_en: "Madeline, you're finally here. Any incidents on the way?"

content: {一点小插曲而已，不影响正事。缪西卡状态很好。}
content_en: "Just a minor hiccup, nothing affecting the main task. Mousika is in good condition."

content: {这里的森林让我安心，就像兽人部落的圣地。空气中弥漫着古老的气息。}
content_en: "This forest puts me at ease, like the sacred grounds of the Orc tribes. The air is filled with an ancient scent."

content: {哼，精灵之森可比兽人地方精致多了。不过，时间紧迫，别闲聊了。法阵的能量正在不稳定地波动。}
content_en: "Hmph, the Elvenwood is far more refined than Orc lands. But time is pressing. No small talk. The circle's energy is fluctuating erratically."

content: {法阵就在前方，我们必须尽快破坏它，阻止邪恶力量蔓延。每一秒都至关重要。}
content_en: "The circle is just ahead. We must destroy it quickly to stop the evil power's spread. Every second counts."

content: {带路吧，我负责警戒周围。这片空地让我感觉不安。}
content_en: "Lead the way. I'll be on alert around us. This clearing makes me uneasy."

content: {城主大人，您确定法阵的抗力不会伤及无辜吗？我担心会波及森林中的生灵。}
content_en: "Lord, are you certain the circle's resistance won't harm the innocent? I fear it might affect the lives in the forest."

content: {我已经计算过风险，但需要大家合力。莉莉丝，你准备好稳定魔法了吗？}
content_en: "I've calculated the risks, but we need everyone's combined strength. Lilith, is your stabilizing magic ready?"

content: {当然，我的宝石能量充足，可别小看我。精灵的魔法可不是摆设。}
content_en: "Of course. My gem energy is sufficient. Don't underestimate me. Elven magic isn't for show."

content: {众人快步走向法阵中心，地面上的发光光圈旋转着，散发出不祥的光芒。能量波动让空气扭曲。}
content_en: The group quickly moved toward the circle's center. The glowing rings on the ground rotated, emitting ominous light. Energy fluctuations distorted the air.

content: {这法阵的能量波动很诡异，我感觉到了恶意。仿佛有无数眼睛在暗处窥视。}
content_en: "The circle's energy fluctuations are bizarre. I sense malice. It's as if countless eyes are watching from the shadows."

content: {是的，仿佛有低语在风中回荡，让我想起神罚之战的不安。那是我们兽人一族的噩梦。}
content_en: "Yes. It's as if whispers echo in the wind, reminding me of the unease of the Divine Punishment War—a nightmare for our Orc kin."

content: {安静！仪式要开始了。城主，请站到中心点。我们必须同步我们的力量。}
content_en: "Quiet! The ritual is about to begin. Lord, please stand at the center point. We must synchronize our power."

content: {好。大家各就各位，一旦我开始引导，你们就注入力量抵抗抗力。记住，保持心神集中。}
content_en: "Alright. Everyone, take your positions. Once I begin guiding, you must channel your strength to resist the resistance. Remember, maintain mental focus."

content: {明白，我会用刀刃斩断任何异常波动。我的刀锋将撕裂邪恶。}
content_en: "Understood. I will use my blade to sever any anomalous fluctuations. My blade will tear through evil."

content: {我会用圣女的力量守护大家的心灵。愿先祖之灵庇佑我们。}
content_en: "I will use the Saintess's power to guard everyone's hearts. May the spirits of our ancestors protect us."

content: {启动！}
content_en: "Begin!"

content: {你双手举起，法阵光芒大盛，刺眼的光线将众人笼罩。强大的能量场形成，空气中响起嗡鸣声。}
content_en: You raised your hands. The circle's light flared brilliantly, blinding rays enveloping everyone. A powerful energy field formed, and a humming sound filled the air.

content: {抗力比预期强，大家坚持住！我感觉能量在冲击我的意志。}
content_en: "The resistance is stronger than expected. Everyone, hold on! I feel the energy impacting my will."

content: {这点压力算什么，我经历过的任务比这残酷多了。暗影中的刺客都比这温柔。}
content_en: "What's this little pressure? I've been through missions far more brutal than this. Assassins in the shadows were gentler."

content: {城主，您的脸色发白，要不要放缓？您的身体在颤抖。}
content_en: "Lord, your face is pale. Do you need to slow down? Your body is trembling."

content: {不行！现在停下会反噬。城主，集中精神！想象你在控制能量流。}
content_en: "No! Stopping now will cause a backlash. Lord, focus! Imagine you are controlling the energy flow."

content: {我......我好像听到了什么声音......像是有人在呼唤我......}
content_en: "I... I think I hear something... like a voice calling me..."

content: {声音？是法阵的幻觉吗？还是森林的恶作剧？}
content_en: "A voice? An illusion from the circle? Or a forest prank?"

content: {不，我也隐约听到了，像是远古的回响。它充满了悲伤和愤怒。}
content_en: "No, I vaguely hear it too. Like an ancient echo. It's full of sorrow and anger."

content: {专注！别分心！法阵在吸收我们的能量，任何疏忽都可能导致崩溃。}
content_en: "Focus! Don't get distracted! The circle is absorbing our energy. Any lapse could lead to collapse."

content: {谁......谁在说话？为什么我能听到这个声音？}
content_en: "Who... who is speaking? Why can I hear this voice?"

content: {你恍惚中，一个低沉的声音直接传入你脑海，它仿佛来自深渊，带着冰冷的触感。}
content_en: In your daze, a low voice spoke directly into your mind, as if from an abyss, carrying a cold touch.

content: {完美的容器......你终于来了...我等了太久太久......}
content_en: "The perfect vessel... you've finally come... I've waited so long..."

content: {你是谁？为什么称我为容器？我不是任何人的容器！}
content_en: "Who are you? Why call me a vessel? I am no one's vessel!"

content: {历任城主都心性坚定，但你不同......你是最合适的......你的灵魂充满了可塑性.....}
content_en: "All previous Lords had firm hearts, but you are different... you are the most suitable... your soul is full of malleability..."

content: {城主！快醒醒，法阵在扭曲！能量场变得不稳定了！}
content_en: "Lord! Wake up! The circle is distorting! The energy field is becoming unstable!"

content: {有邪恶力量在渗透，必须打断它！我感到一股寒意袭来。}
content_en: "An evil power is seeping in. We must interrupt it! I feel a chill approaching."

content: {坚持住，我在加强封印！精灵的符文将束缚这股力量！}
content_en: "Hold on! I'm strengthening the seal! Elven runes will bind this power!"

content: {这声音.......它知道我的过去......它提到了我的起源......}
content_en: "This voice... it knows my past... it mentions my origin..."

content: {你逃不掉的，容器......你的命运早已注定......}
content_en: "You cannot escape, vessel... your fate is already sealed..."

content: {你浑身颤抖，法阵的能量剧烈波动，光芒忽明忽暗，仿佛随时会爆炸。周围的地面开始裂开，树木发出哀鸣。}
content_en: Your entire body trembled. The circle's energy violently fluctuated, its light flickering as if about to explode. The surrounding ground began to crack, and trees groaned.

content: {声音更清晰了……它说它一直在等待我…}
content_en: "The voice is clearer now... it says it's been waiting for me..."

content: {我也听到了，它在低语关于容器的阴谋。}
content_en: "I hear it too. It's whispering about a vessel conspiracy."

content: {装神弄鬼！有本事现身一战！}
content_en: "Playing ghostly tricks! Show yourself and fight!"

content: {愚蠢！这是灵魂层面的攻击，别激怒它！}
content_en: "Foolish! This is a soul-level attack! Don't provoke it!"

content: {呵呵……你们这些蝼蚁，怎懂我的计划？城主，你并非第一个被我选中的人。}
content_en: "Hehe... you insignificant ants, how could you understand my plan? Lord, you are not the first I have chosen."

content: {你到底想做什么？为什么针对城主一族？}
content_en: "What do you actually want? Why target the line of Lords?"

content: {历任城主都拥有纯净的灵魂，是承载邪恶力量的完美容器。可惜，他们太固执，总拒绝我的诱惑。}
content_en: "All previous Lords possessed pure souls—perfect vessels to bear dark power. Unfortunately, they were too stubborn, always rejecting my temptations."

content: {所以你想控制城主，实现什么邪恶目的？}
content_en: So you want to control the Lord to achieve some evil purpose?

content: {聪明。但这次我学乖了，趁你年轻就下手，避免你又像前辈一样挣脱。}
content_en: Clever. But this time I've learned. I'll strike while you're young, avoiding the chance for you to break free like your predecessors.

content: {爱和和平会战胜你！城主，别听它的蛊惑！}
content_en: Love and peace will defeat you! Lord, don't listen to its seduction!

content: {声音在利用法阵放大它的影响，必须尽快破坏法阵！}
content_en: The voice is using the circle to amplify its influence. We must destroy the circle quickly!

content: {它说……它早就潜伏在历史中，通过战争和混乱培养我的“适合性”。}
content_en: It says... it has been lurking in history, cultivating my 'suitability' through war and chaos.

content: {没错，从你出生起，我就引导你的经历，让你接近兽人、精灵，这一切都是为了软化你的意志。}
content_en: Correct. Since your birth, I have guided your experiences, bringing you close to Orcs and Elves. All to soften your will.

content: {混蛋！所以你连我的刺杀任务都是棋子？}
content_en: You bastard! So even my assassination mission was a pawn?

content: {当然，德琳。你那次袭击让城主尝到背叛，从而更易接受黑暗。}
content_en: Of course, Madeline. Your attack made the Lord taste betrayal, making them more receptive to darkness.

content: {太残忍了……城主，这不是你的错。}
content_en: That's so cruel... Lord, this is not your fault.

content: {城主，稳住心神！它在玩心理游戏！}
content_en: Lord, steady your mind! It's playing psychological games!

content: {我……我感觉记忆在模糊，它想覆盖我的意识……}
content_en: I... I feel my memories blurring. It wants to overwrite my consciousness...

content: {放弃抵抗吧。成为我的容器，你能获得无尽力量，实现所谓和平——用邪恶的方式。}
content_en: Give up resistance. Become my vessel. You can gain limitless power, achieve so-called peace—through evil means.

content: {休想！城主，你答应过要为理想而战！}
content_en: Never! Lord, you promised to fight for your ideals!

content: {想想我们经历的生死时刻，那才是真实的你。}
content_en: Think of the life-and-death moments we've shared. That is the real you.

content: {声音在减弱？不，它在集中攻击城主！}
content_en: Is the voice weakening? No, it's focusing its attack on the Lord!

content: {它说……如果我不服从，它会摧毁所有人……}
content_en: It says... if I don't submit, it will destroy everyone...

content: {选择吧，容器：自愿屈服，或我强行夺取。}
content_en: Choose, vessel: yield voluntarily, or I take by force.

content: {莉莉丝率先察觉意图，高声呼喊同伴}
content_en: Lilith was the first to perceive its intent, shouting to her companions.

content: {大家合力！用正能量反击声音的渗透！}
content_en: "Everyone, unite! Counter the voice's infiltration with positive energy!"

content: {众人将意志与能量汇聚成一道屏障，与法阵中涌出的黑暗激烈碰撞，整个空间回荡着神秘声音的狞笑}
content_en: The group concentrated their will and energy into a barrier, fiercely clashing with the darkness surging from the circle. The entire space echoed with the mysterious voice's malicious laughter.

content: {风暴逐渐平息，你单膝跪地急促喘息，众人迅速围拢过来}
content_en: The storm gradually subsided. You knelt on one knee, breathing heavily. The others quickly gathered around.

content: {看着我！别让那个声音控制你的心智！}
content_en: "Look at me! Don't let that voice control your mind!"

content: {莉莉丝……那个声音说我的存在只是个陷阱，我算什么和平使者？}
content_en: "Lilith... that voice said my existence is just a trap. What kind of peacemaker am I?"

content: {那是谎言！你从深渊中拯救了我，让我获得新生。}
content_en: "That's a lie! You saved me from the abyss, giving me new life."

content: {是你教会我爱的真谛，不要否定自己的价值。}
content_en: "You taught me the true meaning of love. Don't deny your own worth."

content: {记住！你的身份由选择决定而非出身。我身负特殊血脉曾被视作异类，但你的信任让我重获新生。}
content_en: "Remember! Your identity is defined by choice, not origin. I bear a special bloodline and was once seen as an outcast, but your trust gave me new life."

content: {选择……我真的能挣脱这命运枷锁吗？}
content_en: "Choice... can I truly break free from this fate?"

content: {当然！我曾是冷酷无情的佣兵，如今选择守护黑夜。你同样可以选择反抗！}
content_en: "Of course! I was once a cold, ruthless mercenary. Now I choose to guard the night. You too can choose to resist!"

content: {是爱给予我们勇气。请为我们而战。}
content_en: "It is love that gives us courage. Please fight for us."

content: {回想古遗迹之战！你为我阻挡炎魔的烈焰。此刻，我们与你并肩作战！}
content_en: "Recall the battle in the ancient ruins! You shielded me from the Balrog's flames. Now, we fight alongside you!"

content: {森林深处的法阵开始剧烈波动，暗影如同活物般蠕动}
content_en: The circle deep in the forest began to fluctuate violently. Shadows writhed as if alive.

content: {我感受到黑暗在侵蚀我的意志……}
content_en: "I feel the darkness eroding my will..."

content: {快集中精神！法阵的能量正在失控！}
content_en: "Hurry, focus! The circle's energy is going out of control!"

content: {用爱的力量构筑屏障，我能暂时净化这片区域！}
content_en: "Use the power of love to construct a barrier! I can temporarily purify this area!"

content: {我的宝石正在超载！快引导我们联手反击！}
content_en: "My gems are overloading! Quickly, guide us in a combined counterattack!"

content: {无数记忆碎片如潮水般涌现在脑海}
content_en: Countless memory fragments flooded your mind.

content: {那些与你们共度的时光……集市庆典的欢笑，边境线上的并肩作战，星空下的誓言……这些才是真实！}
content_en: "Those times spent with you all... the laughter at the market festival, fighting side by side on the border, vows under the starlight... These are real!"

content: {没错！那些共同创造的回忆就是你存在的证明！}
content_en: "Yes! The memories we created together are proof of your existence!"

content: {想起你在训练场指导我剑术的模样！}
content_en: "Remember you instructing me in swordsmanship on the training grounds!"

content: {想起你为孤儿院孩子们讲故事时的笑容！}
content_en: "Remember the smiles you had while telling stories to the orphanage children!"

content: {你眼中重新凝聚起光芒，颤抖的双手逐渐稳定}
content_en: Light re-gathered in your eyes. Your trembling hands gradually steadied.

content: {声音在消退……是你们的温暖驱散了寒冷！}
content_en: "The voice is fading... your warmth has dispelled the cold!"

content: {就是现在！趁法阵最脆弱的时刻！}
content_en: "Now is the time! Strike while the circle is at its weakest!"

content: {将我的圣光之力注入你的武器！}
content_en: "Channel my holy light power into your weapon!"

content: {接住我的宝石能量，完成最后一击！}
content_en: "Take my gem energy and deliver the final blow!"

content: {三股力量汇成璀璨光流涌入你的体内}
content_en: Three streams of power converged into a brilliant light, surging into your being.

content: {以我们共同守护的誓言——破！}
content_en: "By the oath we guard together—shatter!"

content: {暗影枷锁粉碎吧！}
content_en: "Be gone, shadow chains!"

content: {愿光明永驻世间！}
content_en: "May light forever dwell in this world!"

content: {让邪恶见识真正的力量！}
content_en: "Let evil witness true power!"

content: {法阵在强光中崩解，黑雾发出刺耳的尖啸后消散}
content_en: The magical circle disintegrated in the blinding light. The black mist let out a piercing shriek before dissipating.

content: {成功了！你战胜了它！}
content_en: "We succeeded! You defeated it!"

content: {看呐，黎明穿透了永夜！}
content_en: "Look, dawn pierces the eternal night!"

content: {你的选择证明了爱的力量胜过一切黑暗！}
content_en: "Your choice proves the power of love surpasses all darkness!"

content: {是你们让我明白，真正的力量源于想要守护他人的心。}
content_en: "It was you who made me understand that true strength comes from the desire to protect others."

content: {初升的阳光透过枯枝洒落，森林重现生机}
content_en: The rising sun filtered through withered branches, the forest reclaiming its vitality.

content: {下次再被低语困扰，记得先来找我们！}
content_en: "Next time you're troubled by whispers, remember to come find us first!"

content: {该回城了，庆功宴的烤肉都要凉了！}
content_en: "Time to return to the city. The roasted meat at the victory banquet will get cold!"

content: {看，星空为我们指明了归途。}
content_en: "Look, the starlight shows us the way back."

content: {无论未来还有多少挑战，只要我们同心协力……}
content_en: "No matter how many challenges the future holds, as long as we work together..."

content: {先说好，这次我要双倍宝石奖励！}
content_en: "First things first, I want double the gem reward this time!"

content: {当然，你早已是我最重要的伙伴。}
content_en: "Of course. You've long been my most important companion."

content: {星光下，四个身影沿着林间小道走向远方灯火}
content_en: Under the starlight, four figures walked along the forest path toward distant lights.

content: {缪西卡的气息平稳了许多，但还没有醒来的迹象。}
content_en: Mousika's breathing has stabilized somewhat, but she hasn't awakened yet.

content: {夜晚的宁静有助于她的恢复，我会用暗影魔法隔绝阳光的干扰。}
content_en: The tranquility of night aids her recovery. I will use shadow magic to block sunlight interference.

content: {我查阅了古籍，这种能量反扑可能源自古老契约，需要时间自然消散。}
content_en: I consulted ancient texts. This kind of energy backlash likely originates from an ancient contract. It needs time to dissipate naturally.

content: {谢谢你们及时清理了藤蔓，精灵之森终于恢复了平和。}
content_en: Thank you for clearing away the vines promptly. The Elvenwood has finally regained its peace.

content: {这是夜影精灵的职责，森林的黑暗面本就是我们守护的领域。}
content_en: It is the duty of the Shadow Elves. The dark side of the forest is our domain to guard.

content: {藤蔓的残余魔力已被净化，但我们需要警惕类似的威胁再次出现。}
content_en: The residual magic of the vines has been purified, but we must be vigilant against similar threats reappearing.

content: {缪西卡为我挡下那一击时，我甚至来不及反应。}
content_en: When Mousika took that blow for me, I didn't even have time to react.

content: {她拥有圣女的力量，生命力远比我们想象的要坚韧。}
content_en: She possesses the power of a Saintess. Her vitality is far more resilient than we imagine.

content: {你也需要休息。连续守候只会消耗你的精力。}
content_en: You also need rest. Keeping vigil continuously will only drain your energy.

content: {我无法安心离开，万一她醒来时我不在呢？}
content_en: I can't leave with peace of mind. What if she wakes up and I'm not here?

content: {我会让夜影精灵轮流看守，确保有人随时照应。}
content_en: I'll have Shadow Elves take turns on watch, ensuring someone is always tending to her.

content: {古籍中提到，自然能量汇聚之地能加速愈合，我们可以将缪西卡移至森林之心。}
content_en: The ancient texts mention that places where natural energy converges can accelerate healing. We could move Mousika to the Heart of the Forest.

content: {森林之心？那里安全吗？}
content_en: The Heart of the Forest? Is it safe there?

content: {终年迷雾笼罩，适合夜影精灵，也对缪西卡有益。}
content_en: Perpetually shrouded in mist, suitable for Shadow Elves, and beneficial for Mousika too.

content: {是的，那里是精灵之森的能量源泉，我曾在那里研究过治愈法阵。}
content_en: Yes. It's the energy source of the Elvenwood. I once researched healing circles there.

content: {那就按你们说的做吧。伊丽丝，你的棺材修复了吗？}
content_en: Then let's proceed as you suggest. Iris, has your coffin been repaired?

content: {用月光丝线重新绑定了符文，现在更稳固了。}
content_en: I rebound the runes with moonlight thread. It's more stable now.

content: {你看起来疲惫不堪，我去准备一些安神的药草茶。}
content_en: You look exhausted. I'll prepare some calming herbal tea.

content: {有劳了。伊丽丝，你讨厌阳光，白天巡逻时务必小心。}
content_en: Thank you for the trouble. Iris, you despise sunlight. Be careful during daytime patrols.

content: {我已习惯在阴影中行动，不必担心。}
content_en: I'm accustomed to moving in shadows. No need to worry.

content: {药草茶能缓解焦虑，请务必服用。}
content_en: Herbal tea can ease anxiety. Please be sure to drink it.

content: {莉薇娅，你总是这么细心。以前在耀石城时，你也这样帮助他人吗？}
content_en: Livia, you're always so attentive. Back in Shimmerstone City, did you also help others like this?

content: {力量的真谛是责任，我只是在履行顾问的职责。}
content_en: The true meaning of power is responsibility. I'm merely fulfilling my duties as an advisor.

content: {莉薇娅，你的魔导书能探测能量波动吗？我想检查森林的残留黑暗}
content_en: Livia, can your grimoire detect energy fluctuations? I wish to check for residual darkness in the forest.

content: {可以，但需要集中精力。魔导书的力量应谨慎使用}
content_en: It can, but it requires concentration. The grimoire's power should be used cautiously.

content: {你们配合得如此默契，精灵之森有你们是幸运的。}
content_en: You all coordinate so seamlessly. The Elvenwood is fortunate to have you.

content: {只是各尽所能。克图格亚曾教我，秩序源于合作。}
content_en: We each just do our part. Cthugha once taught me that order stems from cooperation.

content: {说到克图格亚，她最近有消息吗？}
content_en: Speaking of Cthugha, any news from her recently?

content: {她还在圣殿任职，但答应会来访。}
content_en: She is still serving at the Temple but promised to visit.

content: {等缪西卡醒来，我们得好好感谢所有帮助过我们的人。}
content_en: When Mousika wakes, we must properly thank everyone who helped.

content: {你先休息吧，我会守在这里。}
content_en: You should rest now. I will keep watch here.

content: {我去森林之心布置法阵，傍晚前完成转移。}
content_en: I'll go to the Heart of the Forest to set up the circle. We'll complete the transfer by evening.

content: {好。伊丽丝，如果有异常，立刻通知我。}
content_en: Alright. Iris, if anything abnormal occurs, notify me immediately.

content: {放心，黑夜是我的领域。}
content_en: Rest assured. The night is my domain.

content: {莉薇娅离开疗愈室，伊丽丝静坐在角落阴影中}
content_en: Livia left the healing chamber. Iris sat quietly in the corner shadows.

content: {伊丽丝，你曾说过想成为骑士，现在还有这个愿望吗？}
content_en: "Iris, you once said you wished to become a knight. Do you still have that aspiration?"

content: {克图格亚的榜样让我动摇，但夜影精灵更适合独行。}
content_en: "Cthugha's example makes me waver, but Shadow Elves are better suited to solitude."

content: {独行未必是唯一的路。缪西卡教会我，爱需要共同面对。}
content_en: "Solitude may not be the only path. Mousika taught me that love requires facing things together."

content: {爱？我不太理解这种情感，但或许有一天会明白。}
content_en: "Love? I don't fully comprehend that emotion, but perhaps one day I will."

content: {等你遇到重要的人时，自然会懂。}
content_en: "You'll understand naturally when you meet someone important."

content: {就像你和缪西卡那样？}
content_en: "Like you and Mousika?"

content: {是的，就像她为我挺身而出那样。}
content_en: "Yes, just like how she stood up for me."

content: {我会记住这句话。你先睡一会儿吧。}
content_en: "I will remember these words. Now, you should sleep for a while."

content: {嗯，拜托你了。}
content_en: "Mhm. I leave it to you."

content: {你缓缓闭眼，伊丽丝轻声吟唱安眠曲}
content_en: You slowly closed your eyes. Iris softly hummed a lullaby.

content: {愿黑夜庇护你的梦境。}
content_en: "May the night guard your dreams."

content: {莉薇娅返回，法阵已准备就绪}
content_en: Livia returned.

content: {法阵已准备就绪，我们可以转移缪西卡了。}
content_en: "The circle is prepared. We can transfer Mousika now."

content: {这么快？我陪你们一起去。}
content_en: "So quickly? I'll accompany you."

content: {森林之心的路陡峭，我来用暗影魔法铺平路径。}
content_en: "The path to the Heart of the Forest is steep. I'll use shadow magic to smooth the way."

content: {抓住我的手，法阵会保护我们不受能量侵蚀。}
content_en: "Hold my hand. The circle will protect us from energy erosion."

content: {缪西卡，我们带你去个更安全的地方。}
content_en: "Mousika, we're taking you to a safer place."

content: {这些藤蔓的消失让森林恢复了生机，我能感受到风的轻语。}
content_en: "The disappearance of these vines has restored the forest's vitality. I can feel the whispers of the wind."

content: {古籍记载，森林之心是精灵的摇篮，缪西卡在那里会更快苏醒。}
content_en: "Ancient texts record the Heart of the Forest as the cradle of Elves. Mousika will awaken faster there."

content: {希望如此。伊丽丝，你讨厌阳光，森林之心有遮蔽吗？}
content_en: "I hope so. Iris, you hate sunlight. Is there shelter at the Heart of the Forest?"

content: {终年迷雾，正是我喜欢的环境。}
content_en: "Perpetual mist—an environment I prefer."

content: {到了。看，这里的能量如溪流般纯净。}
content_en: "We're here. Look, the energy here is as pure as a flowing stream."

content: {真美。缪西卡，你能感觉到吗？}
content_en: "Beautiful. Mousika, can you feel it?"

content: {我会在四周布下防护，防止黑暗残留靠近。}
content_en: "I'll set up protective barriers around to prevent any residual darkness from approaching."

content: {你可以在这里休息，我会定期检查能量流动。}
content_en: "You can rest here. I will periodically check the energy flow."

content: {谢谢你们，没有你们，我真不知该如何是好。}
content_en: "Thank you all. I truly don't know what I would have done without you."

content: {这是盟友应做的。就像克图格亚曾帮助我那样。}
content_en: "It's what allies do. Like how Cthugha once helped me."

content: {力量用于守护，便是它的意义。}
content_en: "When power is used for protection, that is its meaning."

content: {我学会了这一点。}
content_en: "I have learned that."

content: {缪西卡在能量中微微动了一下手指，你紧紧握住她的手}
content_en: Mousika's finger twitched slightly in the energy. You held her hand tightly.

content: {缪西卡？你醒了吗？}
content_en: "Mousika? Are you awake?"

content: {别急，让她自然苏醒。}
content_en: "Don't rush. Let her awaken naturally."

content: {能量在汇聚，这是好迹象。}
content_en: "Energy is converging. That's a good sign."

content: {我会一直等到她醒来。}
content_en: "I will wait until she awakens."

content: {黑夜降临了，我去巡视周边。}
content_en: "Night has fallen. I'll patrol the perimeter."

content: {我继续研究古籍，寻找加速愈合的方法。}
content_en: "I'll continue studying the ancient texts, searching for ways to accelerate healing."

content: {好，我们各自努力。}
content_en: "Good. We'll each do our part."

content: {你在精灵之森边缘漫步，阳光透过树叶洒落，乌蒂亚静立在风中}
content_en: You strolled along the edge of the Elvenwood. Sunlight filtered through the leaves. Utia stood quietly in the wind.

content: {风吹来了熟悉的气息。是你，城主。}
content_en: "The wind carries a familiar scent. It's you, Lord."

content: {乌蒂亚？没想到会在这里遇见你。}
content_en: "Utia? I didn't expect to meet you here."

content: {我一直在这片山林中倾听风的声音。你变了许多。}
content_en: "I've been listening to the wind's voice in these mountains. You have changed much."

content: {经历了许多事，我确实不再是那个为情所困的城主了。}
content_en: "After many experiences, I'm indeed no longer the Lord troubled by love."

content: {上次你问我爱情的事，现在，你眼中有了答案。}
content_en: "Last time you asked me about love. Now, your eyes hold the answer."

content: {缪西卡教会了我什么是爱，但她也因我受伤昏迷。}
content_en: "Mousika taught me what love is. But she also lies injured and unconscious because of me."

content: {生命总有枯败与新生。你的变化，风早已告诉我。}
content_en: "Life always has withering and rebirth. The wind has long told me of your change."

content: {乌蒂亚，你还在播撒瘟疫吗？还是像以前一样帮助他人？}
content_en: "Utia, do you still spread plagues? Or do you help others like before?"

content: {瘟疫？偶尔。但更多时候，我在种植，看着生命成长。}
content_en: "Plagues? Occasionally. But more often, I plant, watching life grow."

content: {你望向远处新生的树苗，想起精灵之森刚刚经历的灾难}
content_en: You looked toward the newly sprouted saplings in the distance, recalling the recent disaster the Elvenwood had endured.

content: {精灵之森刚经历灾难，现在重归平和，这让我欣慰。}
content_en: "The Elvenwood just endured a disaster, now returning to peace. That comforts me."

content: {平和总是短暂。人类和精灵一样，渴望安宁却带来纷争。}
content_en: "Peace is always fleeting. Humans and Elves alike crave tranquility yet bring strife."

content: {但我相信，只要有心，就能创造和谐。我的城市就是例子。}
content_en: "But I believe, with intention, harmony can be created. My city is an example."

content: {你的城市？我听说那里三族共处。真是这样吗？}
content_en: "Your city? I've heard three races coexist there. Is it truly so?"

content: {是的，兽人、精灵和人类一起生活。缪西卡是其中的关键。}
content_en: Yes. Orcs, Elves, and humans live together. Mousika was key to that.

content: {兽人圣女……爱情让你变得坚强了。}
content_en: The Orc Saintess... Love has made you strong.

content: {你注意到乌蒂亚眼中闪过一丝复杂的情绪}
content_en: You noticed a complex emotion flicker in Utia's eyes.

content: {乌蒂亚，你曾是人类，转生后还恨人类吗？}
content_en: "Utia, you were once human. After reincarnation, do you still resent humans?"

content: {恨意如风，会消散。现在，我更多是好奇。}
content_en: "Resentment is like the wind—it dissipates. Now, I am more curious."

content: {好奇什么？}
content_en: "Curious about what?"

content: {好奇为什么爱情能让人不顾生死。就像那个男医师为女医师付出一切。}
content_en: "Curious why love can make people disregard life and death. Like how that male physician gave everything for the female physician."

content: {爱是无私的。乌蒂亚，如果你遇到过重要的人，或许会懂。}
content_en: "Love is selfless. Utia, if you had met someone important, perhaps you would understand."

content: {重要的人？我曾有母亲，但火刑带走了一切。}
content_en: "Someone important? I once had a mother, but the pyre took everything."

content: {对不起，让你想起悲伤的事。}
content_en: "I'm sorry to remind you of such a sad memory."

content: {无需道歉。枯败中也有新生，就像我重获精灵之身。}
content_en: "No need for apology. Even in decay, there is rebirth, just as I regained this Elven form."

content: {一阵微风吹过，带来远处花园的香气}
content_en: A gentle breeze blew through, carrying the scent of distant gardens.

content: {缪西卡的情况在好转，我希望她能尽快醒来。}
content_en: "Mousika's condition is improving. I hope she awakens soon."

content: {风带来消息，她的灵魂正在回归。你可以安心。}
content_en: "The wind brings news. Her soul is returning. You can be at ease."

content: {真的吗？乌蒂亚，你能预知这些？}
content_en: "Truly? Utia, can you foresee these things?"

content: {不能预知，但能倾听。风中有生命的低语。}
content_en: "Cannot foresee, but I can listen. There are whispers of life in the wind."

content: {谢谢你告诉我这些。你以后会来我的城市看看吗？}
content_en: "Thank you for telling me this. Will you come visit my city someday?"

content: {或许。如果风指引我去的话。}
content_en: "Perhaps. If the wind guides me there."

content: {城市欢迎所有善意的人，包括你。}
content_en: "The city welcomes all who come with goodwill, including you."

content: {善意？城主，你太天真了。但正是这天真，让你与众不同。}
content_en: "Goodwill? Lord, you are too naive. But it is precisely this naivety that makes you different."

content: {经历这么多，我已学会谨慎，但不会放弃希望。}
content_en: "After so many experiences, I've learned caution, but I won't abandon hope."

content: {希望如种子，需要耐心培育。你做得不错。}
content_en: "Hope is like a seed. It needs patient nurturing. You are doing well."

content: {乌蒂亚，你独自在这山林中，不孤单吗？}
content_en: "Utia, alone in these mountains, aren't you lonely?"

content: {有风为伴，有植物为友。孤单是一种选择。}
content_en: "With the wind as a companion, plants as friends. Loneliness is a choice."

content: {我明白了。就像伊丽丝选择独行，但最终找到了盟友。}
content_en: "I understand. Like how Iris chose solitude but ultimately found allies."

content: {伊丽丝？那个夜影精灵？我听说过她。}
content_en: "Iris? The Shadow Elf? I've heard of her."

content: {是的，她现在帮助守护精灵之森。}
content_en: "Yes. She now helps guard the Elvenwood."

content: {精灵总是各有所长。城主，你的路还长，珍惜眼前人。}
content_en: "Elves always have their own strengths. Lord, your path is still long. Cherish those before you."

content: {我会的。乌蒂亚，你要保重。}
content_en: "I will. Utia, take care of yourself."

content: {风起了，我该走了。记住，答案在内心。}
content_en: "The wind rises. I must go. Remember, the answer lies within."

content: {就像你上次告诉我那样？}
content_en: "Like you told me last time?"

content: {是的。再见，城主。}
content_en: "Yes. Farewell, Lord."

content: {乌蒂亚化作清风消散，你继续漫步，心中平静许多}
content_en: Utia dissipated into a gentle breeze. You continued your stroll, feeling much calmer.

content: {乌蒂亚，愿你找到自己的安宁。}
content_en: "Utia, may you find your own peace."

content: {城邦广场人声鼎沸，居民们挥舞着鲜花，欢呼声此起彼伏。你和缪西卡并肩站在高台上，望着下面欢庆的人群。达菲和莉莉丝穿过人群，快步冲上前来。}
content_en: The city-state square was bustling with voices. Residents waved flowers, cheers rising and falling. You and Mousika stood side by side on the high platform, looking down at the celebrating crowd. Duffy and Lilith pushed through the crowd, rushing forward.

content: {你们终于回来了！}
content_en: "You're finally back!"

content: {还算你们命大。不过，欢迎回家，盟友。}
content_en: "You're still in one piece, thankfully. But welcome home, ally."

content: {这里好热闹！这就是你常对我说的那座城市吗？}
content_en: "It's so lively here! Is this the city you always told me about?"

content: {是的，缪西卡。欢迎回家，这里是我们共同的家园。}
content_en: "Yes, Mousika. Welcome home. This is our shared home."

content: {缪西卡小姐，你醒了真好！这些天可是愁坏了不少人。}
content_en: "Miss Mousika, it's wonderful that you're awake! You had quite a few people worried these days."

content: {达菲，别嚷嚷了。盟友，我帮你稳住了城防，这份人情你打算怎么还？}
content_en: "Duffy, stop shouting. Ally, I held the city's defenses for you. How do you plan to repay this favor?"

content: {莉莉丝，谢谢你。库房里的宝石，随你挑选。}
content_en: "Lilith, thank you. Pick any gems from the vault."

content: {这还差不多。不过，我现在更想听达菲学猫叫。}
content_en: "That's more like it. But for now, I'd rather hear Duffy meow like a cat."

content: {莉莉丝！现在可是重要场合！你快看看，城市比以前更加繁荣了！}
content_en: "Lilith! This is an important occasion! Look, the city is more prosperous than before!"

content: {我太喜欢这座城市了！看，居民们脸上都洋溢着幸福。}
content_en: "I love this city so much! Look, the residents' faces are filled with happiness."

content: {缪西卡，如果没有你，我可能无法坚持到今天。}
content_en: "Mousika, without you, I might not have persevered until today."

content: {爱让我们彼此变得坚强。我承诺过，我们会共同面对一切。}
content_en: "Love made us both stronger. I promised we would face everything together."

content: {哎呀，你们别在这里说这么肉麻的话啦！快听，大家都在为你们欢呼呢！}
content_en: "Ugh, don't say such mushy things here! Listen, everyone is cheering for you!"

content: {达菲，你的耳朵都红透了。是不是被感动得快要哭了？}
content_en: "Duffy, your ears are all red. Are you so moved you're about to cry?"

content: {才没有！你快看看城市的新规划！}
content_en: "I am not! Look at the city's new plans instead!"

content: {好的。达菲，这些日子辛苦你了。老城主若是知道，一定会为你感到骄傲。}
content_en: Alright. Duffy, thank you for your hard work these days. The old Lord would be proud of you.

content: {哼，我可是最可靠的管家！不过，新城主你表现得也还算不错啦。}
content_en: Hmph, I'm the most reliable steward! But... you performed reasonably well too, new Lord.

content: {达菲，非常感谢你一直照顾着他。}
content_en: Duffy, thank you so much for always taking care of him.

content: {缪西卡小姐，你太客气了！这只是我分内的事。}
content_en: Miss Mousika, you're too kind! It was just my duty.

content: {盟友，你身上的伤都痊愈了吗？需不需要我用魔法再仔细检查一遍？}
content_en: Ally, are all your injuries healed? Do you need me to examine you more carefully with magic?

content: {已经没事了。莉莉丝，你的翅膀完全恢复了吗？}
content_en: I'm fine now. Lilith, have your wings fully recovered?

content: {早就好了。但下次可别再让我去挡那种威力的爆炸了。}
content_en: Long ago. But next time, don't make me block an explosion of that magnitude again.

content: {莉莉丝，我听说你为了保护他而受伤，真的非常感谢你}
content_en: Lilith, I heard you were injured protecting him. Thank you so much.

content: {小事一桩。毕竟，我可是他最重要的盟友。}
content_en: It was nothing. After all, I am his most important ally.

content: {最重要的？莉莉丝，你也太自大了吧！明明还有我呢！}
content_en: Most important? Lilith, you're so arrogant! Obviously, I'm here too!

content: {你们每一位都是我不可或缺的伙伴。达菲，莉莉丝，谢谢你们。}
content_en: Each of you is my indispensable companion. Duffy, Lilith, thank you.

content: {我感到无比温暖。这里就像星辉之森一样，让人安心。}
content_en: I feel incredibly warm. This place feels as comforting as Starlight Forest.

content: {因为这里有爱，也有大家。缪西卡，你愿意永远留在这里吗？}
content_en: Because there is love here, and everyone. Mousika, would you be willing to stay here forever?

content: {我当然愿意。你就是我的归宿。}
content_en: Of course I would. You are my home.

content: {哇！这算是当众告白吗？我一定要记下来！}
content_en: Wow! Is this a public confession? I must record this!

content: {达菲，别打岔。盟友，居民们准备了盛大的庆典，正等着我们呢。}
content_en: Duffy, don't interrupt. Ally, the residents have prepared a grand celebration. They're waiting for us.

content: {好。缪西卡，我们一起去。}
content_en: Good. Mousika, let's go together.

content: {英雄万岁！三族和平万岁！}
content_en: Long live the heroes! Long live peace among the three races!

content: {缪西卡圣女，感谢您守护了我们！}
content_en: Saintess Mousika, thank you for protecting us!

content: {谢谢大家！我会继续用生命守护这座城市。}
content_en: Thank you, everyone! I will continue to protect this city with my life.

content: {看，达菲，兽人和精灵们正在一起跳舞。}
content_en: Look, Duffy. Orcs and Elves are dancing together.

content: {是啊！看那边，梦可可和斯莉德玩得多开心，她们已经成为好朋友了！}
content_en: Yes! Look over there. Monccoco and Slider are having so much fun! They've become good friends!

content: {盟友，这次经历让整座城市更加团结。你应当感到自豪。}
content_en: Ally, this experience has made the entire city more united. You should be proud.

content: {自豪之余，我心中更多的是感激。莉莉丝，回头我亲自为你挑一颗最大的宝石。}
content_en: Beyond pride, my heart is filled with more gratitude. Lilith, I'll personally pick the largest gem for you later.

content: {这还差不多。不过，盟友之间不必言谢。}
content_en: That's more like it. But between allies, thanks are unnecessary.

content: {老城主留下的笔记我都妥善保管着，你要现在看看吗？}
content_en: I've kept all the old Lord's notes safe. Do you want to look at them now?

content: {晚些时候吧。达菲，你已经能够独当一面了。}
content_en: Later. Duffy, you are now fully capable of managing things on your own.

content: {那是当然！不过，你以后可不能再这样突然失踪了！}
content_en: Of course! But you mustn't suddenly disappear like that again in the future!

content: {达菲，放心吧。我们会一起守护这里，不会再分开了。}
content_en: Duffy, rest assured. We will protect this place together. We won't be separated again.

content: {说起来，有乌蒂亚的消息吗？她上次帮了我们不少忙。}
content_en: Speaking of which, any news from Utia? She helped us a lot last time.

content: {她正在山林中静修。但她说过，风会指引她再次来访。}
content_en: She is meditating in the mountains. But she said the wind would guide her to visit again.

content: {那我要提前准备好礼物！乌蒂亚是不是很喜欢奇特的植物？}
content_en: Then I should prepare a gift in advance! Does Utia like unusual plants?

content: {没错。达菲，你总是这么周到细心。}
content_en: Correct. Duffy, you're always so thoughtful and attentive.

content: {我感到好幸福。爱真是世间最奇妙的力量。}
content_en: I feel so happy. Love truly is the most wonderful force in the world.

content: {是你让我真正理解了爱的意义。}
content_en: You are the one who truly helped me understand the meaning of love.

content: {如果你们再继续这样说情话，我就要放出魔法蝴蝶来捣乱了。}
content_en: If you keep exchanging sweet talk like this, I'll release my magic butterflies to cause mischief!

content: {莉莉丝，别闹了！庆典就要开始了，我们该过去了。}
content_en: Lilith, don't! The celebration is about to start. We should go over there.

content: {好。缪西卡，我们走吧。}
content_en: Alright. Mousika, let's go.

content: {欢迎我们的英雄归来！}
content_en: "Welcome our heroes back!"

content: {欢呼声如潮水般涌来，你和你的伙伴们走向广场中央，阳光洒落在每个人身上，整座城市沐浴在祥和与希望之中。}
content_en: Cheers surged like a tide. You and your companions walked toward the center of the square. Sunlight fell on everyone, the entire city bathed in peace and hope.

content: {这里就是家。}
content_en: "This is home."

content: {永远的家。}
content_en: "Forever home."

content: {庆典的欢笑声如同阳光般洒满广场，你望着眼前其乐融融的景象，心中涌起难以言表的感动}
content_en: The joyous laughter of the celebration spread across the square like sunlight. You looked at the harmonious scene before you, feeling an inexpressible surge of emotion.

content: {看啊，每个人脸上都洋溢着笑容，这就是我们奋斗的意义。}
content_en: "Look, smiles are on everyone's faces. This is the meaning of our struggle."

content: {阳光正好，向日葵盛开，愿这份和平如同这日光，长久温暖大地。城主，为您干杯！}
content_en: "The sunlight is perfect, sunflowers are blooming. May this peace be like this sunlight, warming the earth long and well. Lord, a toast to you!"

content: {你举起酒杯与她相碰，杯中蜜酒荡漾着金色光芒}
content_en: You raised your glass and clinked it with hers. The honeyed wine within shimmered with a golden light.

content: {荣誉并非独享，而是与所有为和平付出的人共有。今天的庆典，属于每一位坚守岗位的战士和每一位辛勤的市民。}
content_en: "Honor is not to be enjoyed alone but shared with all who worked for peace. Today's celebration belongs to every warrior who held their post and every citizen who toiled."

content: {从银辉到曙光，我从未如此确信，我们走在正确的道路上。这片景象，胜过任何一场战争的胜利。}
content_en: "From Silverglow to Dawnlight, I have never been so sure we are on the right path. This sight surpasses victory in any war."

content: {诗嘉古尔推着餐车穿过人群，新鲜烘焙的香气随风飘散}
content_en: Skagull pushed a food cart through the crowd, the aroma of fresh baking carried on the wind.

content: {刚出炉的面包和糕点，请大家尽情享用。甜食总能让人心情更好，不是吗？}
content_en: "Freshly baked bread and pastries, everyone, please enjoy. Sweets always make people happier, don't they?"

content: {尝尝这款特调"庆典之光"，为了今天的欢乐，也为了明天的希望，干杯！}
content_en: "Try this special blend, 'Celebration's Light'! For today's joy and tomorrow's hope, cheers!"

content: {德莉法将一个花环戴在你头上，花瓣上的露珠晶莹剔透}
content_en: Derifa placed a floral wreath on your head, the petals sparkling with dewdrops.

content: {今天的花环用了最新鲜的花材，看，和德古娜画上的一样鲜艳。}
content_en: "Today's wreath uses the freshest blooms. See, it's as vibrant as Degunnr's painting."

content: {姐姐……我的画，真的可以挂在店里吗？}
content_en: "Sister... my painting... can it really be hung in the shop?"

content: {当然，你画得比任何鲜花都美。}
content_en: "Of course. You paint more beautifully than any flower."

content: {波蒙巡视完广场外围，快步走来向你汇报}
content_en: Pomon, having finished patrolling the square's perimeter, quickly approached to report.

content: {守卫工作已部署完毕，外围有骑士团巡逻，可以确保庆典安全无虞。}
content_en: "Security deployment is complete. Knights are patrolling the outer areas. The celebration's safety is ensured."

content: {水是相连的，喜悦也是。看，孩子们玩得多开心，这片水域也感受到了和平的欢愉。}
content_en: "Water connects all things, and so does joy. Look how happy the children are. This body of water feels the peace's delight too."

content: {大海今天也格外平静呢，风声里都是快乐的味道。}
content_en: "The sea is especially calm today. Even the wind carries the scent of happiness."

content: {克丽奥娜的水晶球在阳光下闪烁着绚丽光彩}
content_en: Cliodna's crystal ball shimmered with dazzling light under the sun.

content: {占卜显示，今日运势大吉。不过，就算不占卜，看着大家的脸也能知道啦。}
content_en: "Divination shows great fortune today. But even without divination, looking at everyone's faces tells the same."

content: {薇薇安！别用阴影魔法偷拿我的蛋糕！}
content_en: "Vivian! Don't use shadow magic to sneak my cake!"

content: {嘻嘻，姐姐，你的反应总是这么有趣。阳光下的恶作剧也别有一番风味呢。}
content_en: "Giggle, Sister, your reactions are always so amusing. Mischief under the sun has its own flavor too."

content: {好了，你们两个，今天可是庆典，要玩也注意点分寸。}
content_en: "Alright, you two. It's a celebration today. If you want to play, mind the limits."

content: {斯莉德独自站在喷泉边，嘴角带着若有若无的笑意}
content_en: Slider stood alone by the fountain, a faint smile on her lips.
"This liveliness... isn't bad."

content: {时间在此刻流淌得格外缓慢而温暖，城主。这份"此刻"的延续，正是你所期望的吧。}
content_en: "Time flows especially slowly and warmly at this moment, Lord. The continuation of this 'present' is what you hoped for, yes?"

content: {铸刀为犁，化剑为犁。若姐姐能看到今日光景，想必也会欣慰。}
content_en: "Beat swords into ploughshares, turn blades into ploughs. If my sister could see this sight today, she would surely be comforted."

content: {嗯……这样的和平，确实……不赖。}
content_en: "Mhm... Such peace... is indeed... not bad."

content: {珀瑞斯将一枚徽章别在你胸前，那是用战场碎片重塑的和平象征}
content_en: Perris pinned a medal on your chest—a symbol of peace remade from battlefield fragments.

content: {依靠自己双手争取来的和平，才真正坚实可靠。敬你，城主。}
content_en: "Peace earned by one's own hands is truly solid. To you, Lord."

content: {听，这欢呼声和歌声，比任何圣殿的颂歌都动听。这才是真正的"神谕"。}
content_en: "Listen, these cheers and songs are more beautiful than any Temple hymn. This is the true 'divine oracle.'"

content: {没有歧视和战争的喧嚣，只有歌声和欢笑......真好。}
content_en: "No clamor of discrimination or war, only songs and laughter... It's good."

content: {哼，算你做了件不错的事，城主。不过，可别松懈，守护和平比赢得战争更难。}
content_en: "Hmph, you did a decent job, Lord. But don't relax. Guarding peace is harder than winning a war."

content: {光芒照亮每一个角落，温暖每一颗心......这就是我们追寻的光。}
content_en: "Light illuminating every corner, warming every heart... This is the light we pursue."

content: {风煞也很安静......它似乎也不讨厌这种气氛。}
content_en: "Windbane is quiet too... It doesn't seem to dislike this atmosphere."

content: {你抬头望向城堡阳台，罗蕾莱正倚着栏杆举杯致意}
content_en: You looked up toward the castle balcony. Lorelei leaned against the railing, raising her glass in salute.

content: {在阳台上就能感受到这份喜悦，阳光下的海洋和城市，都很美。}
content_en: "Even from the balcony, one can feel this joy. The ocean and city under the sun are beautiful."

content: {阳光......还是有些刺眼。但这份温暖，我并不讨厌。}
content_en: "The sun... is still a bit harsh. But this warmth... I don't dislike it."

content: {星辰指引的方向，终将通往光明。今夜星空，也定会为这份和平而闪耀。}
content_en: "The direction guided by the stars will eventually lead to light. Tonight's starlight will surely shine for this peace too."

content: {记录下此刻吧，这些平凡的欢笑，才是历史中最珍贵的篇章。}
content_en: "Record this moment. These ordinary joys are the most precious chapters in history."

content: {历史的真相或许沉重，但眼前的幸福真实不虚。今天，就好好享受当下吧。}
content_en: "Historical truth may be heavy, but the happiness before us is real and true. Today, let's properly enjoy the present."

content: {父亲的太阳……若能照耀所有人，那才是真正的光辉。}
content_en: "Father's sun... if it could shine on everyone, that would be true radiance."

content: {梦可可拉着斯莉德跑过广场，裙摆飞扬}
content_en: Monccoco pulled Slider across the square, skirts flying.

content: {斯莉德，你看那边有杂耍！我们过去看看吧！}
content_en: "Slider, look over there! Juggling! Let's go see!"

content: {......好，跟紧我，别走散了。}
content_en: "...Alright. Stay close. Don't get lost."

content: {美食是连接种族最好的桥梁！来，尝尝这个，人类和兽人的配方结合，味道棒极了！}
content_en: "Food is the best bridge between races! Here, try this! A combination of human and Orc recipes—delicious!"

content: {秩序下的和平，方能持久。城主，接下来的治理至关重要。}
content_en: "Peace under order can endure. Lord, the governance from now on is crucial."

content: {突然有人从背后轻拍你的肩膀}
content_en: Suddenly, someone tapped your shoulder lightly from behind.

content: {喂，笨蛋城主，给你这个！可不是特意为你准备的！}
content_en: "Hey, dumb Lord, here! This! Not that I prepared it especially for you or anything!"

content: {这是……宝石？}
content_en: "This is... a gem?"

content: {是庆典的礼物啦！拿着！还有……今天……做得不错。}
content_en: "It's a celebration gift! Take it! And... today... you did alright."

content: {达菲不知何时来到你身边，狐耳因喧嚣微微颤动}
content_en: Duffy appeared beside you at some point, her fox ears twitching slightly from the noise.

content: {城主，大家都很开心呢。不过，请注意时间，稍后还有巡游环节。}
content_en: "Lord, everyone is so happy. But please mind the time. The parade segment is later."

content: {谢谢你，达菲。也谢谢大家，没有你们，就没有今天的一切。}
content_en: "Thank you, Duffy. And thank you, everyone. Without all of you, today wouldn't exist."

content: {夕阳将所有人的身影拉长，欢歌笑语随着晚风飘向远方}
content_en: The setting sun stretched everyone's shadows long. Songs and laughter drifted with the evening breeze into the distance.

content: {你独自漫步在庆典边缘的街道上，远离中心的喧嚣，静静观察着往来的人群。不同种族的居民们脸上洋溢着笑容，孩子们追逐嬉戏，商贩们热情地招呼着顾客，一派和谐繁荣的景象。}
content_en: You strolled alone along a street at the edge of the celebration, away from the central clamor, quietly observing the passing crowds. Residents of different races wore smiles on their faces. Children chased and played. Vendors enthusiastically greeted customers—a scene of harmonious prosperity.

content: {人流如织，充满活力……这就是我们努力建设的城邦啊。}
content_en: "Such bustling, vibrant crowds... this is the city-state we've strived to build."

content: {一个陌生的声音从身后传来，平静中带着一丝探究。}
content_en: An unfamiliar voice came from behind, calm yet carrying a hint of inquiry.

content: {你就是城主吗？}
content_en: "Are you the Lord?"

content: {是的，我是。请问你是？}
content_en: Yes, I am. May I ask who you are?

content: {名字不重要。我只是个过客，看到这里的繁荣，有些好奇。}
content_en: The name is unimportant. I am merely a passerby. Seeing this prosperity, I grew curious.

content: {欢迎来到我们的城市。}
content_en: Welcome to our city.

content: {你的理想是什么？建设这样一座城市，是为了权力，财富，还是其他？}
content_en: What is your ideal? Building such a city—for power, wealth, or something else?

content: {你停下脚步，认真思考着这个突如其来的深刻问题}
content_en: You stopped walking, seriously contemplating this sudden, profound question.

content: {我的理想吗？很简单，但也很难。是“世界和平”。}
content_en: "My ideal? It's simple, yet difficult. 'World peace.'"

content: {世界和平？很宏大的词。具体指什么？}
content_en: "World peace? A grand term. What does it specifically mean?"

content: {让每个孩子都能在阳光下安然入睡，不必担心战火。让每个人都能自由追求幸福，不必忍受不公。让不同的种族能像今天这样，彼此微笑，而非兵戎相见。}
content_en: "Let every child sleep soundly under the sun, without fear of war. Let everyone freely pursue happiness without enduring injustice. Let different races smile at each other like today, not take up arms against one another."

content: {听起来像是天真的童话。你真的相信能实现？}
content_en: "It sounds like a naive fairy tale. Do you truly believe it can be achieved?"

content: {完全实现或许很难。但正因为困难，才更需要有人去做，去努力靠近。就像点亮一盏灯，虽然无法照亮整个世界，但至少能驱散身边的黑暗。一座城、两座城……慢慢扩大光明的地方。}
content_en: "Complete realization may be difficult. But precisely because it's difficult, it requires someone to do it, to strive to come closer. Like lighting a lamp—it cannot illuminate the whole world, but at least it can dispel the darkness nearby. One city, two cities... gradually expanding the places of light."

content: {即使过程中会遇到背叛、牺牲和无法想象的阻力？}
content_en: "Even if you encounter betrayal, sacrifice, and unimaginable resistance along the way?"

content: {嗯。但我已经见过太多因战乱和压迫而流的眼泪。正因为见过黑暗，才更想守护光明。这条路很难，但我的同伴们让我相信，这不是痴人说梦。}
content_en: "Mhm. But I have seen too many tears shed because of war and oppression. Precisely because I've seen darkness, I want to protect the light even more. This path is hard, but my companions make me believe it's not a fool's dream."

content: {珀瑞斯沉默了片刻，目光似乎穿透了眼前的景象，望向更远的地方。}
content_en: Perris fell silent for a moment. Her gaze seemed to penetrate the present scene, looking toward a farther place.

content: {依靠自己，守护珍视之物……你的理想，和某个人的执着很像。祝你好运，城主。希望你的光，真能照亮更多地方。}
content_en: "Relying on oneself, protecting what is cherished... Your ideal resembles someone else's tenacity. Good luck, Lord. May your light truly illuminate more places."

content: {谢谢。要进城看看吗？庆典还没结束。}
content_en: "Thank you. Would you like to come into the city to look around? The celebration isn't over yet."

content: {不必了。我只是个旅人，还要继续我的路。告辞。}
content_en: "No need. I am but a traveler and must continue my journey. Farewell."

content: {珀瑞斯微微颔首，转身融入人群，身影很快消失在街角。你站在原地，望着她离去的方向，心中那份守护的信念更加坚定。}
content_en: Perris gave a slight nod, turned, and blended into the crowd. Her figure soon vanished around the street corner. You stood there, looking in the direction she left, the conviction to protect growing even firmer in your heart.

content: {这是未来三年的城市发展规划草案。目前人口持续增长，我们需要扩建东区居住区，并优化供水系统。}
content_en: "This is the draft for the city's development plan for the next three years. With the population continuously growing, we need to expand the eastern residential district and optimize the water supply system."

content: {根据各地传来的消息，不少地方听说了我们的事，开始效仿我们的法律和治理方式。和平的思潮正在蔓延。}
content_en: "According to news from various regions, many places have heard of our achievements and begun imitating our laws and governance methods. The tide of peace is spreading."

content: {这是好事，但我们也必须警惕。树大招风，曙光之城成为象征的同时，也成为了靶子。}
content_en: "That's good, but we must also be vigilant. 'A tall tree catches the wind.' While Dawnlight City becomes a symbol, it also becomes a target."

content: {你将草案轻轻放在桌上，目光扫过在场的每一位}
content_en: You gently placed the draft on the table, your gaze sweeping over everyone present.

content: {经济方面，与精灵、兽人的贸易路线需要进一步巩固。诗嘉古尔和雅雅的情报网显示，仍有残余势力在暗中活动。}
content_en: "Economically, trade routes with Elves and Orcs need further consolidation. Skagull and Yaya's intelligence network shows remnants are still active in the shadows."

content: {那些家伙，敢来捣乱就让他们尝尝魔法的厉害！}
content_en: "Those guys dare to cause trouble? Let them taste some magic!"

content: {莉莉丝，力量需要克制。我们需要的是持久的安宁，而非一时的镇压。希娜伽团长也加强了边境的巡逻。}
content_en: "Lilith, power requires restraint. What we need is lasting peace, not temporary suppression. Captain Synaga has also strengthened border patrols."

content: {你缓缓站起身，走到窗边望向城区的方向}
content_en: You slowly stood up and walked to the window, looking toward the city.

content: {大家说得对。我们肩负的责任更重了。不仅是守护这座城，更是守护这份刚刚萌芽的希望。}
content_en: "Everyone is right. The responsibility on our shoulders is heavier. It's not just protecting this city, but protecting this newly sprouted hope."

content: {各方势力错综复杂，维持平衡需要极大的智慧和力量。财政压力也不小。}
content_en: "Various factions are complex. Maintaining balance requires great wisdom and strength. Financial pressure is also significant."

content: {阿古丽娅向前一步，铠甲发出轻微的声响}
content_en: Aguria took a step forward, her armor emitting a faint sound.

content: {但只要我们像向日葵追寻太阳一样，坚守内心的光明，就没有克服不了的困难。}
content_en: "But as long as we, like sunflowers seeking the sun, hold fast to the light within, no difficulty is insurmountable."

content: {说得对！我们可是最强的盟友！}
content_en: "Well said! We are the strongest allies!"

content: {你转身面对众人，露出坚定的神色}
content_en: You turned to face everyone with a determined expression.

content: {有你们在，我坚信我们能走下去。达菲，规划草案我会详细看。莉莉丝，继续留意大陆动向。阿古丽娅，骑士团的训练不能松懈。}
content_en: "With you here, I firmly believe we can walk this path. Duffy, I'll review the development draft in detail. Lilith, continue monitoring the continent's movements. Aguria, the Knight's training must not slacken."

content: {明白}
content_en: "Understood."

content: {包在我身上。}
content_en: "Leave it to me."

content: {为了更光明的未来。}
content_en: "For a brighter future."

content: {你走向门口，突然停下脚步}
content_en: You walked toward the door but suddenly stopped.

content: {另外，明天我想亲自巡视新建的居民区。达菲，请安排一下。}
content_en: "Additionally, tomorrow I wish to personally inspect the newly built residential district. Duffy, please arrange it."

content: {好的，我立即去准备。}
content_en: "Alright. I'll prepare immediately."

content: {莉莉丝轻轻笑了起来}
content_en: Lilith chuckled softly.

content: {要不要我派几个小可爱暗中保护？}
content_en: "Want me to send a few little 'darlings' for covert protection?"

content: {不用了。我相信这座城市的人民。}
content_en: "No need. I trust the people of this city."

content: {阿古丽娅微微颔首，阳光照在她的肩甲上反射出温暖的光晕}
content_en: Aguria gave a slight nod. Sunlight reflected off her shoulder armor, casting a warm halo.

content: {愿光明与你同在。}
content_en: "May the light be with you."

content: {你从睡梦中醒来，阳光透过窗帘洒进房间，温暖的光线让你感到一丝宁静。}
content_en: You awoke from sleep. Sunlight streamed through the curtains into the room, the warm rays bringing a sense of tranquility.

content: {你回想起过去的点点滴滴，从那个雨夜醒来，占据这具身体，迷茫地面对陌生的一切……到现在，竟然过去了这么久。}
content_en: You recalled past events—waking up in that rainy night, occupying this body, bewilderedly facing an unfamiliar world... So much time had passed.

content: {达菲是第一个看穿你的人，却选择引导你，帮助你。}
content_en: Duffy was the first to see through you, yet she chose to guide and help you.

content: {从税收到律法，从人际到战略……是她帮你一点点适应了这个身份。莉莉丝，嘴上不饶人，却一次次为你挡下危险。}
content_en: From taxes to laws, from relationships to strategy... she helped you adapt to this identity bit by bit. Lilith, sharp-tongued, yet shielded you from danger time and again.

content: {阿古丽娅，像太阳一样温暖坚定，她的骑士团是城市的盾牌。}
content_en: Aguria, warm and firm like the sun—her Knights were the city's shield.

content: {贝罗娜的忠诚，诗嘉古尔和雅雅在阴影中的守望，缪西卡的理解，斯莉德的信任，荒跨越时间的陪伴……还有那么多面孔。}
content_en: Bellona's loyalty, Skagull and Yaya's watch from the shadows, Mousika's understanding, Slider's trust, Susabi's companionship across time... and so many more faces.

content: {德莉法和德古娜姐妹重归于好，波蒙的坚守，米娅的新生……你见证了太多的故事，也与他们的人生深深交织。}
content_en: Derifa and Degunnr reconciled, Pomon's steadfastness, Mia's new beginning... You witnessed too many stories, deeply interwoven with their lives.

content: {这个世界，早已不是一场游戏或一个梦。}
content_en: This world was no longer a game or a dream.

content: {这里的欢笑、泪水、奋斗与希望，都是如此真实。}
content_en: The laughter, tears, struggles, and hopes here were all so real.

content: {他们，都是你无法割舍的家人。}
content_en: They were all family you could not bear to part with.

content: {这份羁绊，是责任，是力量，也是你存在的证明。}
content_en: These bonds were responsibility, strength, and proof of your existence.

content: {为了守护这一切，你必须继续前行，无论前方还有什么挑战。}
content_en: To protect all this, you must continue forward, no matter what challenges lay ahead.

content: {敲门声}
content_en: Knock, knock.

content: {城主，您醒了吗？新一天的日程安排需要向您汇报。}
content_en: "Lord, are you awake? I need to report the schedule for the new day."

content: {进来吧，达菲。}
content_en: "Come in, Duffy."

content: {早上好，城主。这是今天的日程。}
content_en: "Good morning, Lord. Here is today's schedule."

content: {上午九点，与阿古丽娅团长商议边境防务；十一点，接见来自南方商队的代表；下午还有与市政厅的会议，讨论城市扩建事宜。}
content_en: "Nine a.m.: Discuss border defense with Captain Aguria. Eleven a.m.: Meet with representatives from the southern merchant caravan. Afternoon: Meeting with the city council to discuss urban expansion plans."

content: {你微笑着倾听，心中充满感激}
content_en: You listened with a smile, heart filled with gratitude.

content: {嗯，安排得很妥当。}
content_en: "Mhm, well arranged."

content: {另外，德莉法小姐送来了新插的花，我放在窗台了。还有，莉莉丝小姐似乎又找到了新的宝石，说要给您看呢。}
content_en: "Also, Miss Derifa sent a new floral arrangement. I've placed it on the windowsill. And, Miss Lilith seems to have found new gems again. She said she wants to show you."

content: {好的，我知道了。谢谢你，达菲。有你在，我总能安心。}
content_en: "Good, I know. Thank you, Duffy. With you here, I can always feel at ease."

content: {达菲耳朵微动，尾巴轻轻摇晃，脸上泛起一丝红晕}
content_en: Duffy's ears twitched slightly, her tail swaying gently, a faint blush appearing on her face.

content: {这、这是我的职责。那么，我们出发吧？}
content_en: "Th-this is my duty. Well then, shall we set off?"

content: {好。一起去迎接新的一天吧。}
content_en: "Yes. Let's go together to welcome a new day."

content: {是，城主。新的一天，新的开始。}
content_en: "Yes, Lord. A new day, a new beginning."
